**BREAKING AZ ELECTION NEWS**

A cyber expert who worked for nine years at the lab that certifies the machines used in Maricopa County has given testimony that our election results are illegitimate.

“Machine failures Arizona voters experienced on Election Day could not have occurred absent intentional misconduct.”

**This is not conjecture. This is expert testimony.**

People are stepping up; we will expose this corrupt system for what it is — a total farce.

It’s only a matter of time.

name: urgent petition (VPP)
subject: Raskin 𝐒𝐋𝐀𝐌𝐌𝐄𝐃 Trump!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
The MAGA Party is FURIOUS. >>
| | **BREAKING: Rep. Raskin Lays Out Jan. 6 Criminal Referrals for Trump, Others** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-raskin/?source=VPP_20221226_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=5921%2E878179%2ET0K2Zw) The MAGA Party is FURIOUS. **They’re brutally attacking Rep. Raskin to FORCE his silence and get Trump off scot‐free!**

[**So we’re launching a MASSIVE 50,000 signature petition to stand with Jamie Raskin! But if we fall even one signature short, the MAGA Party’s attacks could SILENCE him! Please: Sign IMMEDIATELY to stand with Rep. Jamie Raskin »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-raskin/?source=VPP_20221226_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=5921%2E878179%2ET0K2Zw) | [**I STAND WITH JAMIE RASKIN »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-raskin/?source=VPP_20221226_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=5921%2E878179%2ET0K2Zw)
---
We’re in awe of Jamie Raskin’s resolve in the face of disgusting attacks from MAGA Republicans.

But if we want to find out the full truth about that terrible day and hold Trump accountable, Raskin MUST continue his fight.

[**And unless 50,000 good Democrats stand with Jamie Raskin by MIDNIGHT, Trump’s cronies will succeed! Rep. Raskin needs us now – SIGN IMMEDIATELY TO STAND WITH JAMIE RASKIN »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-raskin/?source=VPP_20221226_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=5921%2E878179%2ET0K2Zw)
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-raskin/?source=VPP_20221226_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=10&akid=5921%2E878179%2ET0K2Zw)
[**I STAND WITH JAMIE RASKIN »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-raskin/?source=VPP_20221226_EMPET_E4_T0_AC_RS&t=11&akid=5921%2E878179%2ET0K2Zw)
---
Thank you,

_VPP_

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=5921%2E878179%2ET0K2Zw). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=5921%2E878179%2ET0K2Zw).**

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: Before I retire:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
Sorry for the late email...

| |
---
| | |
---

clean_body: How I'm going to make it happen | | | | | | | | | | Friend, I’m officially challenging Kevin McCarthy as Speaker in the new Republican Congress. If you agree a CONSERVATIVE should lead us in Washington... not another RINO Establishment hack like McCarthy... My efforts to win over Congress are FAR more powerful if they know that VOTERS want a conservative in charge. | | | | Kevin McCarthy does NOT have the values, the backbone, or the courage to stand up to Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer. Like most Establishment Republicans, he sees conservative voters like you and me as the real enemy...and he’ll stab us in the back every chance he gets. For 2 years, I served as Chairman of the House Freedom Caucus... the most powerful and successful congressional bloc of conservatives ever. I figured out exactly how the Establishment operates and exactly how to defeat them at their own game. I’ll make you this promise right now, Friend: I will NEVER betray conservative voters, surrender my principles, or stop fighting for what matters most. We won the House in November because the American people voted to STOP Biden’s radicalism and BREAK the Establishment’s stranglehold on this nation. McCarthy won’t fight for us...so we’ve got to do it ourselves. But we only have a couple weeks before Congress picks our new Speaker. | | | | | | | | | Yours in Freedom, Andy Biggs Republican Congressman, AZ-5 | | | | Paid for by Biggs for Congress

name: American Update
subject: Watch these videos today
body:
Does America need a “Great Reset?” [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0249%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=f581yX47qMpTAIB3B4Mf7Q&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44781%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OvKyFntuSE0AVAcyO%2bdBmQ&sysid=1)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, Does America need a “Great Reset?” In 2020, members of the world’s elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, “we need a ‘Great Reset’ of capitalism.” If successful, this would have the effect of canceling our American way of life. A recent Hillsdale College seminar considered the idea of the Great Reset, its ramifications for America, and pro-freedom alternatives. **This seminar --titled [“The Great Reset?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44782%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=y67csBCNJTOQ0H7iNmW1ww&sysid=1)****[”](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44783%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XrXw%2fGxqiNCsDn07MIHQcw&sysid=1)[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44781%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OvKyFntuSE0AVAcyO%2bdBmQ&sysid=1)--is now available as a free online video series.**

---
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44784%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vHCVO%2bhp7aUiNwv92lp8dQ&sysid=1)
---
| |
Filmed on the Hillsdale campus, this video series will give you insight into:
* The origins and leaders of the Great Reset
* How the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations
* The connection between a cashless society and the Great Reset
* What “environmental justice” has to do with the Great Reset
* The Great Reset from China’s perspective
* Alternatives to the Great Reset

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44795%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nefZTiJpFn7FvBlcZJCtTA&sysid=1)** You will learn about the Great Reset, the dangers it poses, and pro-freedom alternatives. And you can share these lessons with your family, friends, and more. As America’s economy continues to struggle in the aftermath of disastrous elite decisions, lessons like these are essential to the defense of the free market and American liberty. Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Lawrence W. Reed
subject: These teens are smarter than Joe Biden
body:
After attending our FEE in the Classroom workshop, I dare say these kids are smarter than 90% of the politicians in Congress too
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zk0mk9pjrocmupjl89g42gvl08o8udejd5p91iao_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chj61o74cth2bs)

Hello Friend,

These teenagers are smarter than Biden.

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ze6gmqdrf17nug3cio2qsbhvfhv6s853ue15htmo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chj61o74cth2bs)

_However, that isn 't saying a lot these days._

And after attending our FEE in the Classroom workshop, I dare say _these kids are smarter than 90% of the politicians in Congress too_.

How do I know? Because we taught them free market economics and the ideas behind the foundational concepts of a free society.

Let me introduce myself. I am Lawrence W. Reed, President Emeritus of the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE). FEE has educated over 54,000 students on the ideas of liberty and free market economics this year through **FEE in the Classroom. **

**And with your help, we can reach even more students next year. I 've set a goal to raise $25,000 by the end of the month to keep FEE in the Classroom free of charge for schools.**

[_**Can you join me in supporting these students with a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to send your gift >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zama8hgv0el6ns57b2mjl8uj9qj02kik4pbea38g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chj61o74cth2bs)

FEE in the Classroom directly engages students through our educational workshops.

Our classroom-savvy workshop instructors -- totaling more than 30 throughout the country -- cover topics such as individual liberty, free enterprise, limited government, personal responsibility, and entrepreneurship.

Afterward, we provide them with take-home materials, including the classic _I, Pencil_ by Leonard E. Read, FEE's Founder, and _Economics in One Lesson_ by Henry Hazlitt, _The Law_ by Frederick Bastiat, and the U.S. Constitution.

**With access to these additional resources, students are well-equipped to continue their liberty journey and remain engaged with FEE.**

Parents can no longer rely on schools to teach their children about these ideas, so we are reaching young people who might never have encountered them otherwise.

**That 's why our mission is crucial to the future of our country.**

[_**By teaching students about the principles of liberty and the free market,**__**you are giving them a gift that will last throughout their lifetime**_ _**. Please support FEE in the Classroom today >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhcarcggod0ncnqo9do1c74liksuudro9b9d94lo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chj61o74cth2bs)

Before the collapse of the Soviet Empire, I smuggled books into Eastern European countries such as Poland and the Soviet Union itself.

I organized translations of and publications in Polish of works by Ludwig von Mises, F. A. Hayek, and others.

Today, we see indoctrination happening in American schools as socialists try to reinvigorate the disastrous and evil ideas of socialism. The only way to truly defeat these ideas isn't through bans but by offering our own ideas to counter them.

We defeated the Soviet Union. Now, we must defeat the socialists again.

Friend, can I count on you to join me in educating students on the ideas of liberty and free market economics? **Click below to help meet our goal of raising $25,000 by the end of the year.**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zampkiesu5ffb561l09cbluslr3t0l8l13l24fg8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chj61o74cth2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zk9buup37pc517gvlh0fnabps6ks56dkh4ntgfq0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chj61o74cth2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhnkshk0i7220o1728vor0n59k3rkjnbe64nelbg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chj61o74cth2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9gjr84058rer7i421gppphfif7ss43o370d79bg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chj61o74cth2bs)

However, that isn 't saying a lot these days. And after attending our FEE in the Classroom workshop, I dare say these kids are smarter than 90% of the politicians in Congress too. How do I know? Because we taught them free market economics and the ideas behind the foundational concepts of a free society. Let me introduce myself. I am Lawrence W. Reed, President Emeritus of the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE). FEE has educated over 54,000 students on the ideas of liberty and free market economics this year through FEE in the Classroom. And with your help, we can reach even more students next year. I 've set a goal to raise $25,000 by the end of the month to keep FEE in the Classroom free of charge for schools. FEE in the Classroom directly engages students through our educational workshops. Our classroom-savvy workshop instructors -- totaling more than 30 throughout the country -- cover topics such as individual liberty, free enterprise, limited government, personal responsibility, and entrepreneurship. Afterward, we provide them with take-home materials, including the classic I, Pencil by Leonard E. Read, FEE's Founder, and Economics in One Lesson by Henry Hazlitt, The Law by Frederick Bastiat, and the U.S. Constitution. With access to these additional resources, students are well-equipped to continue their liberty journey and remain engaged with FEE. Parents can no longer rely on schools to teach their children about these ideas, so we are reaching young people who might never have encountered them otherwise. That 's why our mission is crucial to the future of our country. Before the collapse of the Soviet Empire, I smuggled books into Eastern European countries such as Poland and the Soviet Union itself. I organized translations of and publications in Polish of works by Ludwig von Mises, F. A. Hayek, and others. Today, we see indoctrination happening in American schools as socialists try to reinvigorate the disastrous and evil ideas of socialism. The only way to truly defeat these ideas isn't through bans but by offering our own ideas to counter them. We defeated the Soviet Union. Now, we must defeat the socialists again. Friend, can I count on you to join me in educating students on the ideas of liberty and free market economics? Click below to help meet our goal of raising $25,000 by the end of the year. name: American Defense News
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
In 2020, members of the world’s elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the
| | | This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3cvrfhvqhj1tenk5bcc1l0naedt0knvt0ta6cc8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chj61o70cjh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, Does America need a “Great Reset?” In 2020, members of the world’s elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab—the founder and executive director of the Forum—wrote, “we need a ‘Great Reset’ of capitalism.” If successful, this would have the effect of canceling our American way of life. A recent Hillsdale College seminar considered the idea of the Great Reset, its ramifications for America, and pro-freedom alternatives. **This seminar—titled[“The Great Reset?](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zt38r4oupgtoirnvfrqlgg4hdb30n44vq62t0ll0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chj61o70cjh2bs)****[”](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8j93kd7jk6hs8pt8p31pa78bth7d9i6aa46q6io_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chj61o70cjh2bs)[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5bbeerhct372riffrruq6m78hipc0oeain2qpf0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chj61o70cjh2bs)—is now available as a free online video series.**

---
[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zliuithpi75eok5m5uijc1akmtuj4quk98h6qtb0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chj61o70cjh2bs)
---
| |
Filmed on the Hillsdale campus, this video series will give you insight into:
* The origins and leaders of the Great Reset
* How the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations
* The connection between a cashless society and the Great Reset
* What “environmental justice” has to do with the Great Reset
* The Great Reset from China’s perspective
* Alternatives to the Great Reset

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgt199pn4pve7028ttbcqo4q1ac22g3dtrn6hqi0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chj61o70cjh2bs)** You will learn about the Great Reset, the dangers it poses, and pro-freedom alternatives. And you can share these lessons with your family, friends, and more. As America’s economy continues to struggle in the aftermath of disastrous elite decisions, lessons like these are essential to the defense of the free market and American liberty. Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Be one of the first
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course
| | | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcoo7l4l6r9fgtdqi0eidvnomg8hu0p5q77d9eb8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chj61o74clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zp8e4qg809fubhvvj8bsufnqsepf1uok64uudv40_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chj61o74clh2bs) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zeueva1t9frnmdvrhtnn5im05sogda8d7o3rmeno_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chj61o74clh2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844
---

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: I’m taking the Four Pillars Pledge—will you?
body:
As we approach the end of another year, I've been taking some time to reflect on all the things I have to be grateful for.
|
---
| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zdouc30ac1fmaacn10vcvmed1b38hdtrq0dg74c0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chj61o74cth2bs)
---
| Fellow Patriot,

This is Dr. Ben Carson. As we approach the end of another year, I've been taking some time to reflect on all the things I have to be grateful for. And this year, I'm especially grateful for patriots who are standing in defense of America's guiding values in 2022. [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zahac93kul8tirqsdqe5ftbqpc36f28jjim5iep8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chj61o74cth2bs) So before you close out this email, [can you spare two quick minutes to join me in signing your name to our special Four Pillars Pledge?](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zq4ehkq64abrn5ermf3jc2qja7v4d3gstknf2lqg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chj61o74cth2bs)

This pledge will affirm your support for America's guiding values and will help us show elected leaders that you care about forging a better path forward for America.

[**To complete this quick 2-minute Four Pillars Pledge just click here now »**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zp744muu9bc4ut810ko2iocnvi0e9rk3dng0ptdg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chj61o74cth2bs)

**This special pledge reads:

**
* I believe in the four pillars of American society: faith, liberty, community, and life
* I know these pillars are the foundation for the greatest, freest nation the world has ever seen
* I will help promote and preserve these cornerstones to secure the United States as a beacon of hope and freedom for generations to come
* As 2023 nears, I'm ready to strengthen the bonds that hold our country together by promoting conservative, common-sense solutions to the challenges facing our country

[**If these words reflect what you want for our country in 2023 and beyond, please join me in taking this special pledge today.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zhah5bgro7v3ng48aegt063b0uugs41i42dqm2lo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chj61o74cth2bs)

This is a critical time to advance freedom in America--so let's head into 2023 with a full head of steam by reminding ourselves, together, of what really matters.

The fight for liberty is more crucial than ever, even if more liberty-minded leaders were sent to Congress. We must remain vigilant in our fight.

You can take this value-affirming pledge now by clicking the secure link below:

[**https://offers.americancornerstone.org/four-pillars-pledge/**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zgdfa35sibnu497lqlqkhv2j83i7a5n85fj1ali0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chj61o74cth2bs)

I've already completed mine--and I hope you'll join me on the list of patriots who are pledging their support for the guiding values that make our nation so exceptional.

May God bless you and your family throughout the holidays.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2022 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9ssq13cb5o7dn7jduor2jk0edi0ofmfgj7j4908_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chj61o74cjh2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844
---
---

subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
In 2020, members of the world’s elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the
| | | This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zsdcv38v269gtehcd02ruu1po8v7rhee231id1p8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chj61o74cdh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, Does America need a “Great Reset?” In 2020, members of the world’s elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab—the founder and executive director of the Forum—wrote, “we need a ‘Great Reset’ of capitalism.” If successful, this would have the effect of canceling our American way of life. A recent Hillsdale College seminar considered the idea of the Great Reset, its ramifications for America, and pro-freedom alternatives. **This seminar—titled[“The Great Reset?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zffiquds0id99nch79tul8o9g1qe9n78tt9mv96o_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chj61o74cdh2bs)****[”](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zv4jaar04fmmac7b4rtfo94h1ks63vm3oa4naa10_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chj61o74cdh2bs)[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z6p4agun60quer5naa9btdr5fvhdn2r0k3jmcgo8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chj61o74cdh2bs)—is now available as a free online video series.**

---
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ztsfdb606vjpjk0p43d743ge4kavbe35p24kdm08_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chj61o74cdh2bs)
---
| |
Filmed on the Hillsdale campus, this video series will give you insight into:
* The origins and leaders of the Great Reset
* How the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations
* The connection between a cashless society and the Great Reset
* What “environmental justice” has to do with the Great Reset
* The Great Reset from China’s perspective
* Alternatives to the Great Reset

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z7pv4ralr7tblnn9db9227ag9jmglkatcc4aubeg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chj61o74cdh2bs)** You will learn about the Great Reset, the dangers it poses, and pro-freedom alternatives. And you can share these lessons with your family, friends, and more. As America’s economy continues to struggle in the aftermath of disastrous elite decisions, lessons like these are essential to the defense of the free market and American liberty. Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Tom Brejcha
subject: 11 years in prison for defending his son
body:
I need your immediate support to help the Thomas More Society defend a father-of-seven pro-life advocate against false criminal
| |
---
| | Dear Friend,I need your immediate support to help the Thomas More Society defend a father-of-seven pro-life advocate against false criminal charges.Please let me explain.In the early morning of September 23, roughly twenty-five FBI agents wearing tactical gear threatened to break down the door of Mark Houck's home if he didn't let them in immediately.**With guns pointed at Mark, they hauled him off to jail while his wife and kids looked on, screaming.** Now he's facing multiple criminal charges and eleven years in federal prison due to an incident involving an aggressively abusive Planned Parenthood escort – which is why our team is representing him in court. [**Can I count on your best, tax-deductible gift of $40 or more to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND to help us give him the legal defense he deserves?**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zr147k6h91bn2nor889lrbid1h3bupff9mbhvsbo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chgm4ob6c5h2bs) Mark is a dedicated pro-life author, speaker, and sidewalk counselor. He would drive two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for hours at a time, praying the Rosary and offering support to women who are so desperate they think they have no alternative than to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son. But one day, **a Planned Parenthood escort got in his young son's face, ridiculing him and his father in vulgar and aggressive ways**.Mark defended his son and himself against the escort, after having repeatedly asked him to stop the abuse. The escort then wanted Mark prosecuted for assault and battery, despite Mark acting of self-defense and defense of his son, but the State Courts in Philadelphia threw out the case. Instead of the matter ending there, Joe Biden's Department of Justice charged Mark with violating the federal FACE Act...** _and now this courageous pro-life hero faces up to eleven years in federal prison for advocating for life and for defending his family._** We're pulling out all the stops to make sure the DOJ and the abortion clinic escort who are trying to destroy Mark and his family don't get away with this.**Mark’s trial is set to begin on January 24th** , so we’re running out of time. [**That's where your emergency donation to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND comes in** – ** by giving today you can stand with Mark in his hour of need.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z2keu2kfunqjranrqphbkpdbs2vo68sg1lvf9838_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chgm4ob6c5h2bs)Make no mistake, friend, Mark's arrest was a targeted attack specifically intended to intimidate pro-lifers and people of faith. The incident at the abortion clinic was so minor that the authorities refused to press charges and when the escort filed charges himself, his case was thrown out.Fortunately for Mark and his family, if anyone has experience defending pro-life heroes against Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood, it's us. My name is Tom Brejcha and I'm the president and chief counsel of the Thomas More Society – the not-for-profit law firm defending Mark Houck. We're proud to have defended many renowned leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe Scheidler and the Pro-Life Action League, David Bereit, David Daleiden, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, Lila Rose and Live Action, the March for Life, and many more. But without the help of generous donors, none of our crucial work would be possible. Because the reality is, while you can't be the one personally defending Mark in the courtroom, by donating you can help us vindicate this brave father and pro-life hero who is being ground through the system in an unjust prosecution. [**Can I count on your gift of $40, $60, $100, or more to stand with Mark Houck today and fight back against the dark forces of Planned Parenthood?**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zaa7hngq5pth1p80p959tlrg8tqtblm0t6533hgg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chgm4ob6c5h2bs) I will be grateful for whatever you're able to send today. Whether it's $10, $40, $60, $250 or more... ...because time is of the essence.We're expecting that Mark's defense may cost us as much as hundreds of thousands of dollars, as the Justice Department is out for blood and targeting Mark with its vast resources, all at taxpayer expense. To put it as bluntly as possible, **_Mark could be facing years behind bars for a crime he didn't commit, while his seven children grow up without him and his wife Ryan-Marie is forced to raise their family alone._** Not only that, but pro-life sidewalk counselors across the country may be deterred from going to the clinics out of concern that they, too, could end up in costly legal battles and even face federal charges simply for defending the unborn.So, I do ask that you make your gift as soon as you can. [**Please don't delay in sending your tax-deductible donations to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND immediately.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zb0rjmmrcc9joeps3kh8497j875frvhc84n45mf0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chgm4ob6c5h2bs) I've asked my staff to let me know as soon as we get your generous gift so I can let Mark know that you're standing with him. Again, the January 24th trial date is FAST approaching, so please don’t hesitate!I know Mark and his family will be deeply touched by your generous support.
---
| | May God bless you,
---
---
Tom Brejcha
President & Chief Counsel
---
P.S. Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood want to destroy pro-life, father-of-seven Mark Houck and intimidate people of faith everywhere. They'd love to see Mark rotting away in federal prison for his selfless devotion to the unborn, using his defense of his young son as the excuse. You and I cannot let that happen. [**Can I count on you to support the official criminal defense fund of Mark Houck with a tax-deductible donation today?**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z6j72a1nt4r5l7gphe22e4tn4p352ea6sr6bidc0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chgm4ob6c5h2bs)
---
[**DONATE
**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z7abcodrf3m0un1rdglo41f3ubmp7a36819pkoig_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chgm4ob6c5h2bs)
---
| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z2k2bclq7dvv7jtst2nk7lfvlaee3q52qveemv60_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chgm4ob6c5h2bs)
---
[_Please consider supporting our efforts with a generous, tax-deductible donation._](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z8vldiuc2rrcd8re45h6bgmuk38oh69lgru1givo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chgm4ob6c5h2bs) © Thomas More Society | [www.thomasmoresociety.org](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zmh3qdmk4ankmbp1kvdeugmnpgl0sm4qcbm5nd8g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chgm4ob6c5h2bs)

name: Trump News HQ
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future.
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7k4206svqt7cr9dh1v594ahfrqqa4qncaj53tg8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chj61o74cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zts8dtptj2l2c1vm21imvkqliafu1sq5messhh1g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chj61o74cdh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi951snuf6b212l1gvm0n91gq5f8rbrv09an45h0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chj61o74cdh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;” Reaching over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. name: Your America
subject: Americans find this “British Bulldog” captivating
body:
You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, “Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,” on DVD. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7682%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=6ca5pFSmHchusK7MPX6M9w&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99516%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cTIS4GDvbES4vUUFFHfrpw&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,”** on DVD. Thousands of people have enjoyed this in-depth course online since its release, _**and now you can add it to your personal library or give it as a gift.**_ In recent years Winston Churchill, who is best known for his leadership during World War II, has been portrayed in numerous films and television shows, proving without a doubt that Americans find the “British Bulldog” captivating. The reasons for this sustained interest in Churchill are profound. No statesman has better diagnosed the threat of modern technology; no statesman has spoken more effectively in opposition to socialism; and, no statesman has displayed more courage in the face of tyranny. It should come as little surprise that so many “academics” and activists are working to smear his legacy, which makes studying a true account of Churchill’s accomplishments more important than ever. **For precisely this reason, I am so excited to offer you this powerful DVD set:** **_[https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99517%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=e%2b1gp37qFa7JwZc%2bOB%2frrg&sysid=1)_** As a student of Dr. Arnn myself, I know that his lectures on Churchill will teach you more about this subject than any of the many books and videos available to you, and they will reveal profound lessons that can be applied to the urgent problems of today. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99516%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cTIS4GDvbES4vUUFFHfrpw&sysid=1) Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you’ll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift--before they’re gone. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship** ” on DVD: _[**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99518%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0cveu5h1RkGaRvilApQitQ&sysid=1)_ You’ll undoubtedly enjoy this close study of Churchill’s words and deeds.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College |
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7682%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=6ca5pFSmHchusK7MPX6M9w&sysid=1)_

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Reserve your DVD box set
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivatin

| | | This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z0pjm3ba034b41sjctnj52pd4t6eo0ibcehp49v0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chgm6o32c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z5nc79b5t5dum412tcmijpgfgpfuq79eas9k7at8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chgm6o32c1h2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zt66d50b15jokv7o5gqtsf1r9e816hgi3gv8uttg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chgm6o32c1h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ziicpsgnqhkc5jv2mi69kc1g2smadfnue3ae1v4o_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chgm6o32c1h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgkraal305asui8l5ttnrfthjk7vshlbihg79gc8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chgm6o32c1h2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2za16s1a9a3jsa2o4a9q7qn8co84mbnrut4qbt93g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chgm6o32c1h2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: Why I created the BLEXIT Foundation
body:
This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zn3v43j0b2fgoa5mvojknndq3417pm93p2h0uk28_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chgm6o34cdh2bs)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdjvlp23qcdcanv3m6l944nvbtc14to4n9ak10jg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chgm6o34cdh2bs)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbqpn0itqlie2g2ts8jr4kljie21461b76c4v6b8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chgm6o34cdh2bs)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztn2rd7d8pmoqvu3or3ue30tu7l132n07uqgjal8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chgm6o34cdh2bs)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbs1q686e9ahrvggb0pl4epkr62v3qn28utqdvt8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chgm6o34cdh2bs)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6vjjqjn705cbq8aij950m4h0huhuc280651s908_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chgm6o34cdh2bs)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9mra8lb0fomk2oqhocnh6p5ppmldpue10ba59r8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chgm6o34cdh2bs)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zv0dpgk086cjp2roq52va6or57quaio597naoamg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chgm6o34cdh2bs)

What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztgbt1tacf2q6c5hlk7sbrfmvj3n63onsv6j51dg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chgm6o34cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrilr88avqucto6tmcaeogo3ojg3lv6cn54ot670_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chgm6o34cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvmsnp2lvtka3960afl5mb0nk4l1vtfdkt5n4t80_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chgm6o34cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z94vk8o29d9l8j857pi8v6e1llv0iqah2u8gr770_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chgm6o34cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztc37fskv1vj93r9t4tvj4ot812ilu68sqh2gu20_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chgm6o34cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9qt7q4c3ecstk9e0s35p3qmo7b6uah32k4pqahg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chgm6o34cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo94ms9g1qf2k64ugeoi9s7vd45hgnghncbnv8eg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chgm6o34cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zupps656tos6egodkasq979cfqv9ugl8g3inc3t0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chgm6o34cdh2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5hg6rcl6o0t7qrbqldp53gntihvlm1i8dsvri9g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chgm6o34cdh2bs)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

[_**Please consider making the most generous donation you can today by clicking here.**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zr6b3lbktg1favd3glqirdlr9vtrcsrmklnknu20_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chgm6o34cdh2bs)

Thank you, Friend.

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Trumptrainnews, [please use this preferences page](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/prefs/9z2z27kluhlihh3jh80sh0uu4uqrselb8r39vp31lg0).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo2rtjunpshh6gsh2ke72h4e45fp29mr5hoks63o_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7c9i62or0chhm49fg)

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Join me?
body:
As we approach the end of another year, I've been taking some time to reflect on all the things I have to be grateful for.
|
---
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z61rcv1838hd36prqvrfi00s86mm9b14poahhd58_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chgm6o32c1h2bs)
---
| Fellow Patriot,

This is Dr. Ben Carson. As we approach the end of another year, I've been taking some time to reflect on all the things I have to be grateful for. And this year, I'm especially grateful for patriots who are standing in defense of America's guiding values in 2022. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2akid0o4sfteeqija6nbj0sop14m1b1615jkh68_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chgm6o32c1h2bs) So before you close out this email, [can you spare two quick minutes to join me in signing your name to our special Four Pillars Pledge?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze0uo2qs7l439ub51qcb1hed4432gbkvhipthnjg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chgm6o32c1h2bs)

This pledge will affirm your support for America's guiding values and will help us show elected leaders that you care about forging a better path forward for America.

[**To complete this quick 2-minute Four Pillars Pledge just click here now »**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8oijiss883f0bl0in8l4inr8uh54l21259gjqpo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chgm6o32c1h2bs)

**This special pledge reads:

**
* I believe in the four pillars of American society: faith, liberty, community, and life
* I know these pillars are the foundation for the greatest, freest nation the world has ever seen
* I will help promote and preserve these cornerstones to secure the United States as a beacon of hope and freedom for generations to come
* As 2023 nears, I'm ready to strengthen the bonds that hold our country together by promoting conservative, common-sense solutions to the challenges facing our country

[**If these words reflect what you want for our country in 2023 and beyond, please join me in taking this special pledge today.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv7v2qvn0r6n50vfoesdvvfpvc1ipiv73j1uu7l8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chgm6o32c1h2bs)

This is a critical time to advance freedom in America--so let's head into 2023 with a full head of steam by reminding ourselves, together, of what really matters.

The fight for liberty is more crucial than ever, even if more liberty-minded leaders were sent to Congress. We must remain vigilant in our fight.

You can take this value-affirming pledge now by clicking the secure link below:

[**https://offers.americancornerstone.org/four-pillars-pledge/**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zeeab9bf12uj252thfdermk2foocmankjo09pcm8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chgm6o32c1h2bs)

I've already completed mine--and I hope you'll join me on the list of patriots who are pledging their support for the guiding values that make our nation so exceptional.

May God bless you and your family throughout the holidays.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2022 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znvaia8a49qjavts1vt9tduacglgf1o4n99njnn0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chgm6o32c1h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: I’m taking the Four Pillars Pledge—will you?
body:
This is Dr. Ben Carson. As we approach the end of another year, I've been taking some time to reflect on all the things I have to be grateful for. And this year, I'm especially grateful for patriots who are standing in defense of America's guiding values in 2022. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7695%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=1TmkdPMW%2biCKkNMjJHcCQg&sysid=1)
ACI - Giving Tuesday 2022 |
---
| | | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99511%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jPugKy4ecryMHO3qv7pp0w&sysid=1)
---
| Fellow Patriot,

This is Dr. Ben Carson. As we approach the end of another year, I've been taking some time to reflect on all the things I have to be grateful for. And this year, I'm especially grateful for patriots who are standing in defense of America's guiding values in 2022. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99512%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QsYWWqhgAMdsluXOu7HM7A&sysid=1) So before you close out this email, [can you spare two quick minutes to join me in signing your name to our special Four Pillars Pledge?](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99513%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mSQNN8uXLZqnO55DgLcO0Q&sysid=1)

This pledge will affirm your support for America’s guiding values and will help us show elected leaders that you care about forging a better path forward for America.

[**To complete this quick 2-minute Four Pillars Pledge just click here now »**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99514%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=r80Ae34N7MerlZupuu6agA&sysid=1)

**This special pledge reads:

**
* I believe in the four pillars of American society: faith, liberty, community, and life
* I know these pillars are the foundation for the greatest, freest nation the world has ever seen
* I will help promote and preserve these cornerstones to secure the United States as a beacon of hope and freedom for generations to come
* As 2023 nears, I’m ready to strengthen the bonds that hold our country together by promoting conservative, common-sense solutions to the challenges facing our country

[**If these words reflect what you want for our country in 2023 and beyond, please join me in taking this special pledge today.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99525%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=x0EcXfWMMncYHTVD80RYxQ&sysid=1)

This is a critical time to advance freedom in America--so let’s head into 2023 with a full head of steam by reminding ourselves, together, of what really matters.

The fight for liberty is more crucial than ever, even if more liberty-minded leaders were sent to Congress. We must remain vigilant in our fight.

You can take this value-affirming pledge now by clicking the secure link below:

[**https://offers.americancornerstone.org/four-pillars-pledge/**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99526%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rIM%2fYhgu3TRTM3PcbbYgkA&sysid=1)

I’ve already completed mine--and I hope you’ll join me on the list of patriots who are pledging their support for the guiding values that make our nation so exceptional.

May God bless you and your family throughout the holidays.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright(C) 2022 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7695%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=1TmkdPMW%2biCKkNMjJHcCQg&sysid=1)

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: The 2023 Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional is here
body:
As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zt1a2le0n69174i8vtoehepr6ndm89aqlas65m9g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chgm9or1clh2bs)
---
Hello Friend, As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help you grow closer to Jesus all year long, so that you, in turn, can impact the world around you. That’s why I’ve written the brand-new 2023 _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth so that you can face each day with spiritual readiness. Here is an outline of what we’ll be studying together if you choose to follow along:
---
* From January to February, we’ll begin a spiritual fitness program using wisdom from the book of Hebrews.
* From March through May, we’ll learn how to walk with God by faith in our everyday lives by studying the life of Abraham.
* In the summer, we’ll gain a biblical understanding of grace, and discover the joy and freedom of living obediently.
* And in the fall and winter, we’ll meditate together on the parables of Jesus!

---
[Request your 2023 Daily Devotional](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdqkicjtrelcgons1tsudmopu20q50qsvav4etqg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chgm9or1clh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zts4tetfrmgrjhcktnp69l9ac69jq22l5ihjkmq0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chgm9or1clh2bs)
---
| The _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a slate-blue leather cover and inlaid rich brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional is built to be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment for your day.
---
| | We’re offering this devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to _Pathway to Victory_ this month. **And the best part is, whatever donation you make will be doubled in its impact thanks to the matching gift challenge that is running until December 31.** To support the work God is doing through _Pathway to Victory_ , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: [https://ptv.org/donate/light-in-the-darkness-matching-challenge/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgaugl0k2dcda5kip1qv3o873s5och401ihbcli8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chgm9or1clh2bs) What if we all committed to spending more time with Jesus in 2023? What do you think we would accomplish? I’m excited to find out. Thanks for your partnership with this ministry. Sharing the Truth of God’s Word, Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

Just like our loyalty to our home team, the Eagles, we want to let you know we will always have your back!

Help us win a seat on Philadelphia City Council as a Council member at-Large, and you will have a seat at the table as well.

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Join me?
body:
As we approach the end of another year, I've been taking some time to reflect on all the things I have to be grateful for.
|
---
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqrq0nuu9runfbduq9trnht9jlp2b174kp7c8t3g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chgm9or6cdh2bs)
---
| Fellow Patriot,

This is Dr. Ben Carson. As we approach the end of another year, I've been taking some time to reflect on all the things I have to be grateful for. And this year, I'm especially grateful for patriots who are standing in defense of America's guiding values in 2022. [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdhr1ftn3p50b6ufb71vmgqepveck1q3t3erdaq0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chgm9or6cdh2bs) So before you close out this email, [can you spare two quick minutes to join me in signing your name to our special Four Pillars Pledge?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1gnbcjln4695dcd8ekaem6itakb43o6ua6hu8fo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chgm9or6cdh2bs)

This pledge will affirm your support for America's guiding values and will help us show elected leaders that you care about forging a better path forward for America.

[**To complete this quick 2-minute Four Pillars Pledge just click here now »**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zj3eichcdb3lis2uh7o3btt5qrajbdommm93cc0g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chgm9or6cdh2bs)

**This special pledge reads:

**
* I believe in the four pillars of American society: faith, liberty, community, and life
* I know these pillars are the foundation for the greatest, freest nation the world has ever seen
* I will help promote and preserve these cornerstones to secure the United States as a beacon of hope and freedom for generations to come
* As 2023 nears, I'm ready to strengthen the bonds that hold our country together by promoting conservative, common-sense solutions to the challenges facing our country

[**If these words reflect what you want for our country in 2023 and beyond, please join me in taking this special pledge today.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zq8d11o27rfqv1srqabtqu14leb3imjgahje0ldo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chgm9or6cdh2bs)

This is a critical time to advance freedom in America--so let's head into 2023 with a full head of steam by reminding ourselves, together, of what really matters.

The fight for liberty is more crucial than ever, even if more liberty-minded leaders were sent to Congress. We must remain vigilant in our fight.

You can take this value-affirming pledge now by clicking the secure link below:

[**https://offers.americancornerstone.org/four-pillars-pledge/**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z30cn3ltltk9s46fsr72hcij5pvj0m7u5nlh5gqg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chgm9or6cdh2bs)

I've already completed mine--and I hope you'll join me on the list of patriots who are pledging their support for the guiding values that make our nation so exceptional.

May God bless you and your family throughout the holidays.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2022 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

name: American Update
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0240%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=iePA9s7encvXjUGWn1mIWw&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44798%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pmvHWh6mjSbSxokDdyyYAg&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44799%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=n89F6oiDnkgoR6reAKCtIw&sysid=1)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44799%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=n89F6oiDnkgoR6reAKCtIw&sysid=1)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0240%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=iePA9s7encvXjUGWn1mIWw&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0240%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=iePA9s7encvXjUGWn1mIWw&sysid=1)
