You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Unintended pregnancy is a leading cause of extreme mother and child poverty, which can cause lifelong trauma to children and set off a vicious, downward spiral of financial catastrophe for entire families. You can help women take control of their reproductive decisions right now, protecting their ability to increase their families only when they’re ready.
body:
stop a vicious cycle
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1d880a02-2df0-433d-8c39-b06e1464944c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, With the freezing temperatures enveloping much of the country, and travel made much more difficult, we want to do anything we can to help those who are suffering. __After the cruel Dobbs decision by the Supreme Court, we're naturally thinking of pregnant women forced to become mothers, even though it sends their families into poverty. Or hiding from those reading their social media posts and spying on their behavior in anti-abortion police-states, all to turn them into Republican Big Brother running their local or state government in the hope of collecting some kind of sick bounty.__ _This is where the National Network of Abortion Funds (NNAF) steps in. They ensure that women, no matter their geography, gerrymandered state legislature, economic status or any other factors have access to their most basic right--control of their bodies. _ **_An unplanned pregnancy is often a significant factor in dire, intractable family poverty, and economic insecurity so severe that it causes children lifelong trauma. Giving women back control over their reproductive futures can help entire families, and in the end it helps all of us live in stronger, more stable communities._** [**Can you give $5, $10, $25 or more to the NNAF to ensure these women don't become cautionary statistics, but thrive?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc3aa3ac2-c6b5-423d-9cd7-411dd61df705/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE: Support abortion access**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5b152263-f95a-4ad0-8b08-684a8265f6aa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | **__The Network helps with financial costs of the procedure, childcare, travel, translation (if necessary) and a place to stay. They are truly doing the work of the angels, continuing a long tradition that includes the underground railroad, to help those whom our government has abandoned or is actively trying to harm. __** **_Let's just be decent human beings--let that guide us as we care for others in the very same manner we'd hope they'd care for us, if we found ourselves in a similarly desperate, heartbreaking situation._** [**Can you give $5, $10, $25 or more to the NNAF to ensure these women don't become cautionary statistics, but thrive?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T317bacdb-d56d-47dd-b641-d462c2f080a1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for your compassion, Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T47b40dfe-3fa4-4a6a-8d04-87b0864a552a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Liz Walters, Team ODP
subject: In 2023, we need to start strong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
With your help, we can hit this one last fundraising goal for 2022
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56461888/385077086/-438463598?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZGU1YjkyNC1mNzg1LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3SdWF6xYOx_qt_eW4-J_LezVxyuuGuzWAk6QB6ENjvo=) | Team,

It has been a _hectic_ year for politics, especially here in Ohio. Despite facing over $35 million in negative attacks, we showed that we can still compete in Ohio. Greg Landsman, Emilia Sykes, and Marcy Kaptur had some of the most critical wins in the House and made the so-called red wave look more like a red ripple.

**In 2024 the House majority AND the Senate majority will run through Ohio. That’s why we must start preparing for the next election right away.**

name: Barack Obama
subject: The good and the bad
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:

Friend,

Our democracy is resilient, as long as we stay engaged.

We saw that engagement during the last election, when a majority of voters cast their ballots with fair maps -- some for the first time in decades. In Colorado and Michigan, voters passed redistricting reforms. In Pennsylvania, citizens proposed a fair map in court. Across the country, from North Carolina to Kansas, people spoke up in public hearings on behalf of their communities. All of this helped ensure that maps were more fair than before.

But as important as it is to stay engaged around elections, it’s even more important to stay engaged between elections. That’s because the next phase of redistricting is underway and will have consequential impacts on the 2024 elections.

**[Will you make an end-of-year donation to All On The Line? Your support will help them engage voters, mobilize activists, and continue to champion voting rights in 2023.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56462325/385077800/1275189963?refcode=20221227_AOTL_P_BHO_3_ActivesxOpeners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRkZTViOTI0LWY3ODUtZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMGQzYTllYjkxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=IX6h0WtP7KUY2xw-Gq9WOTvkmQOQv9OQkcvZxvwaxJQ=)**

Decisions by the U.S. Supreme Court allowed Alabama, Georgia, and Louisiana to hold their 2022 midterm elections with maps that were deemed _illegal_ by lower courts. As a result, millions of voters cast their ballots under gerrymandered maps, some of which violate the Voting Rights Act.

Communities of color were especially impacted by the Supreme Court’s failure to intervene. So while we’ve made progress, we have a lot further to go. We need to continue setting higher standards for the “fairest maps in decades” every time new maps are drawn.

**[Friend, will you make a donation to support All On The Line?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56462396/385077906/1275189963?refcode=20221227_AOTL_P_BHO_3_ActivesxOpeners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRkZTViOTI0LWY3ODUtZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMGQzYTllYjkxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=IX6h0WtP7KUY2xw-Gq9WOTvkmQOQv9OQkcvZxvwaxJQ=)**

I am a strong believer that progress doesn’t happen on its own. This movement is proof of that. Whether it was demanding affordable health care or paving the way for federal marriage rights, people like you have always led the way on progress. You’ve kept us marching forward, toward the promise of a better future.

We’re not there yet. But we’re a lot closer thanks to the persistence of voters, activists, and community leaders like you.

Thank you for everything you do,
Barack Obama

**_All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering._**

Across the country, from North Carolina to Kansas, people spoke up in public hearings on behalf of their communities. All of this helped ensure that maps were more fair than before. But as important as it is to stay engaged around elections, it’s even more important to stay engaged between elections. That’s because the next phase of redistricting is underway and will have consequential impacts on the 2024 elections. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Decisions by the U.S. Supreme Court allowed Alabama, Georgia, and Louisiana to hold their 2022 midterm elections with maps that were deemed illegal by lower courts. As a result, millions of voters cast their ballots under gerrymandered maps, some of which violate the Voting Rights Act. Communities of color were especially impacted by the Supreme Court’s failure to intervene. So while we’ve made progress, we have a lot further to go. We need to continue setting higher standards for the “fairest maps in decades” every time new maps are drawn. = I am a strong believer that progress doesn’t happen on its own. This movement is proof of that. Whether it was demanding affordable health care or paving the way for federal marriage rights, people like you have always led the way on progress. You’ve kept us marching forward, toward the promise of a better future. We’re not there yet. But we’re a lot closer thanks to the persistence of voters, activists, and community leaders like you. Thank you for everything you do, Barack Obama All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. TextFAIR to 88228 to receive recurring updates from AOTL by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. and | = | PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND. Contributions or gifts to The National Redistricting Action Fund are not tax deductible. 700 13th Street NW, Suite 600, Washington, D.C. 20005 This email was sent to:dpwillis67@gmail.com

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7699%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=e1oDFE259VIdUcf2a1zRcA&sysid=1)
[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99529%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iuq0RG6KcyY7T9bK2GPHUQ&sysid=1)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America’s black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation’s mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99520%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yhfzGdDZNoDQwKecs0%2fxug&sysid=1)

**_Now I’ll share my story_ ... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how “helpless” I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We’re taught to believe we’re victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I’ve dealt with racism... _**I’ve even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99521%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ge0lAUFeuw%2b%2bC1IHqpUHgw&sysid=1)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I’m not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don’t want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a “think tank”, but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting “DO-tank”. We’re doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation’s values, what we’re doing to reach Black communities, and what we’re fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly “fighting for minorities” are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT’s efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99522%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UNdHkbS%2fUjJJPSuWr231tA&sysid=1)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99523%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4ZTkJpWgiJDxv5iIhNBIAQ&sysid=1)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we’re actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99524%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LxOtyafGAqPbA6wC8TIMWw&sysid=1)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99535%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XFT6N3mWJvWUJvQCWVjDEg&sysid=1)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we’ve allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We’re hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We’re not just preaching to the choir, and these aren’t boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT’s events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99536%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QyA%2bsj7KKdciiekMbJNIqw&sysid=1)

What does “BLEXIT” mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I’ve copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99537%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Gj%2bowDmCR3nduuuP75b4FQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99538%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mAPrLJymXzNKpD5AN65njQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99539%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=skqRvpXXjFIPZ2uc5FCdyQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99530%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iYgbuHBTZrgkiEs%2bGRTCqg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99531%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YT8qN3OqDs7alLajW3o%2fmA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99532%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zhx15sha8v0FDOBjtis%2beQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99533%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=msQm07orojvu1SmP4Y6HAQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99534%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bvXAPWddAmtfqMh6At%2bhKw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99545%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=W3EUMzQ0%2fffVhUCeFugfmQ&sysid=1)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

[_**Please consider making the most generous donation you can today by clicking here.**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99546%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jR1oZwZCT1vWAZlBYJNxwQ&sysid=1)

Thank you, Friend.

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7699%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=e1oDFE259VIdUcf2a1zRcA&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7699%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=e1oDFE259VIdUcf2a1zRcA&sysid=1)

name: Team Casey
subject: We can predict the future
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
It's not hard to see what's coming. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56465476/385087857/-744169294?refcode=Header&ms=Header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MmIwOGM1Ny1mYjg1LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pkoa4quEopa_k_PlK-gWp8UWpynnwQudD1eP0GkJn5A=&emci=70f51fbb-b47f-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=42b08c57-fb85-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=8943725) Peter,

They're holding meet and greets, chatting up billionaires, and making big promises to corporate PACs.

You don't need a crystal ball to see that Republicans are hungry to win this seat in the next election.

But here's the thing they don't see coming: **You.**

name: Delegate John McGuire III
subject: You are Invited to my Campaign Kickoff 7 Jan 2023
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire
body:
Delegate John McGuire for State Senate District 10
---
| | | | | |
---
| Campaign Kickoff
7 Jan 2023
Delegate John McGuire
For State Senator for Virginia's 10th District
---
|
---
| Greetings,
We hope you are enjoying the holiday season with family and friends. Tracy and I were blessed to have 3 of our 5 children home for Christmas!
It is time to kick my senate race into full gear! Please join us at the Sportspage Bar and Grill 7 January 11am to 2pm for the Delegate John McGuire for Senate District 10 Campaign Kickoff Party! Bishop E.W. Jackson, Sandy Rios Conservative Christian Talk Show Host, Senator Amanda Chase, Phil Van Cleave President VCDL, Rusty McGuire Louisa County Commonwealth Attorney, Kirby Burch President Virginia Hunting Dog Alliance VAHDA, and other speakers will be there. Refreshments provided. Please bring friends and share!
RSVP to brittonross9@gmail.com
Convention Update:
It was decided that we will have a convention, probably in May, for State Senate District 10. Please [Click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001et1q-gyCt4sk5XdSxVsrsjj07mkn9JCT1oecoPmcwZyxKv0XEWHUwwTZ9CjHif7qPBh0vZJFjs54gTwf3TgwgpqKiD2VwWh7znr4bCfsoRhqXbR3zlZXhBhOlJiWmBExAQEQdYTUu6bdVuuemjdeZj0gSoig5KJhwaBq8GVBRj4JfwP5a2SPMosNZcE0tuvIH3EAe6xllyknm0m3HQANlxwWcjIXSrP1FXqwO6DXocEpsz39WFmLOU-I2uiMmkkO&c=0sWAy9qaLJ9YnxqaXKAekA_eOughmuoixmrNO8-CYkwApaK-BqqTkg==&ch=IyQHTJKpMK7zXr8sQwn6Yt6LQRnV8fdEjuxxK3woNrDSzzs-mc1sXg==) and fill out the form to submit your commitment to being a delegate for John McGuire at the Senate District 10 convention. We do not have a date or location for you to vote yet, but by signing up now we can keep you informed and let you know when we know ASAP.
I respectfully ask you to forward this email/ [link](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001et1q-gyCt4sk5XdSxVsrsjj07mkn9JCT1oecoPmcwZyxKv0XEWHUwwTZ9CjHif7qPBh0vZJFjs54gTwf3TgwgpqKiD2VwWh7znr4bCfsoRhqXbR3zlZXhBhOlJiWmBExAQEQdYTUu6bdVuuemjdeZj0gSoig5KJhwaBq8GVBRj4JfwP5a2SPMosNZcE0tuvIH3EAe6xllyknm0m3HQANlxwWcjIXSrP1FXqwO6DXocEpsz39WFmLOU-I2uiMmkkO&c=0sWAy9qaLJ9YnxqaXKAekA_eOughmuoixmrNO8-CYkwApaK-BqqTkg==&ch=IyQHTJKpMK7zXr8sQwn6Yt6LQRnV8fdEjuxxK3woNrDSzzs-mc1sXg==) to family and friends in Senate District 10. This is a numbers game and we need as many delegate sign ups as possible. Thank you!

Please join us at the Sportspage Bar and Grill 7 January 11am to 2pm for the Delegate John McGuire for Senate District 10 Campaign Kickoff Party! Bishop E.W. Jackson, Sandy Rios Conservative Christian Talk Show Host, Senator Amanda Chase, Phil Van Cleave President VCDL, Rusty McGuire Louisa County Commonwealth Attorney, Kirby Burch President Virginia Hunting Dog Alliance VAHDA, and other speakers will be there. Refreshments provided. Please bring friends and share! RSVP to brittonross9@gmail.com Convention Update: It was decided that we will have a convention, probably in May, for State Senate District 10. Please == and fill out the form to submit your commitment to being a delegate for John McGuire at the Senate District 10 convention. We do not have a date or location for you to vote yet, but by signing up now we can keep you informed and let you know when we know ASAP. name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Be one of the first
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. | | | This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e25c4a4971d745a5a786a5ff2c4e2e77&_e=XA-KBtUt9NmFGJZ8RL9jVyEY9X6xHAymvzBZ-7CfHWBqqbNWXZnDweDO0m1N-oBuM5ZQx1XLL1bkSvfnTVpnMXYSEi2qS8w9RFkYxb8KWKZhYp9skpxWr5d6TYDTC5f9HHaN2lawBUbAOdujiUR2T9GaL_t1zbDg6jN_hZzHLE2uxw5lBfiHbICua0YfxLwfc5V8hfl4j2ZQkuk-Cg_LK7TIDkdvQp4TZH1ZUxmVdXQr6TQ89hJibr9vq8ChRyeH_UpsoIxrtKKtn1F3pjLOSUhbB1wtLmOYcJlaAWnvIBoSoqoJMBXBzkAo_A7Qn1KiSYihVusfprPQ3eiLaWsKBi6XoyfCO9U2F5aSceJwyUlVANKx_gRCZevvMgz2eWz2AG63wuWvm6Ha-vs8VrWuUA%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e25c4a4971d745a5a786a5ff2c4e2e77&_e=XA-KBtUt9NmFGJZ8RL9jVyEY9X6xHAymvzBZ-7CfHWBqqbNWXZnDweDO0m1N-oBuM5ZQx1XLL1bkSvfnTVpnMXYSEi2qS8w9RFkYxb8KWKZhYp9skpxWr5d6TYDTC5f9HHaN2lawBUbAOdujiUR2T9GaL_t1zbDg6jN_hZzHLE2uxw5lBfiHbICua0YfxLwfc5V8hfl4j2ZQkuk-Cg_LK7TIDkdvQp4TZH1ZUxmVdXQr6TQ89hJibr9vq8ChRyeHyNW292vNm5QJX49ecg6OUSucieOXZQ_RhsnPlCZNrXVWwl013Hpi6I0eA-TjZeTLfttVnTQjd_YNgycsl-ez_UcjiX8-uz5gbP9sAKI4LQXuRVHncmOsh6Zou7eizWsWJfmxfRWR2l0NKgfrilJ9ag%3D%3D) I hope you're having a great day so far. Today, I'm writing to let you know that we've produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our "Constitution 101" course, and I'd like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College's world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. "Constitution 101" is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e25c4a4971d745a5a786a5ff2c4e2e77&_e=XA-KBtUt9NmFGJZ8RL9jVyEY9X6xHAymvzBZ-7CfHWBqqbNWXZnDweDO0m1N-oBuM5ZQx1XLL1bkSvfnTVpnMXYSEi2qS8w9RFkYxb8KWKZhYp9skpxWr5d6TYDTC5f9HHaN2lawBUbAOdujiUR2T9GaL_t1zbDg6jN_hZzHLE2uxw5lBfiHbICua0YfxLwfc5V8hfl4j2ZQkuk-Cg_LK7TIDkdvQp4TZH1ZUxmVdXQr6TQ89hJibr9vq8ChRyeH5G6ZH9hs65KLE4q47B8jWyeFjoXp6h5Ju0lSKTOBur0hRl0o3fcbTmp6NoA2yJcBDpOSKc2hB0Ysr4CrYeuj2J9VLXvexdXsSL2PGpTw3NxHWWTbpqxzykIENGxf2wGWmH7QkuUQxHyOPShnGv2MFA%3D%3D) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new "Constitution 101" DVD box set are limited, so I hope you'll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth--Defending Liberty since 1844
---

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: The Great Reset and socialism
body:
In 2020, members of the world’s elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy. | This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=74f07aeb79494f4797fcee5f6a637e67&_e=3PtbERxcj9Gu-MRiNvdU_gQMei_kdX4VljIBtQnbHZL7QNISPp-fRxZAnWNJ9q2HxNh1yNwC-LNtMGklpyznR4kdI2jHH3bCz5d-UPAL-vJ3EG8KH3DrsHnSN2uRR8VusjiO26380kfUIRFI5Jwaxe508L3YqDi4_1xScRvFLsveiSNimZF1IZlDz0XcAlKA67tkW4v-uPmv7EN8t1TKaPQoLECLagcWZvjAtmKLLZBlRH69tqljiDrdpOFkFty1ESsw2xPZ1rI6XZcpb6rN9qE--HSYfMkpf7-sfzG9IZiLgHLXb6wnMgDWropdr0912qLlaJR9rLU8nN_0PtCE0sNbbEkW0kjzixmmjO967zDuq9M5NyimaL3bPLz6LsuX)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,
Does America need a “Great Reset?”
In 2020, members of the world’s elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy.
As Klaus Schwab—the founder and executive director of the Forum—wrote, “we need a ‘Great Reset’ of capitalism.” If successful, this would have the effect of canceling our American way of life.
A recent Hillsdale College seminar considered the idea of the Great Reset, its ramifications for America, and pro-freedom alternatives.
**This seminar—titled[“The Great Reset?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=74f07aeb79494f4797fcee5f6a637e67&_e=3PtbERxcj9Gu-MRiNvdU_gQMei_kdX4VljIBtQnbHZL7QNISPp-fRxZAnWNJ9q2HxNh1yNwC-LNtMGklpyznR4kdI2jHH3bCz5d-UPAL-vJ3EG8KH3DrsHnSN2uRR8VusjiO26380kfUIRFI5Jwaxe508L3YqDi4_1xScRvFLsveiSNimZF1IZlDz0XcAlKA67tkW4v-uPmv7EN8t1TKaPQoLECLagcWZvjAtmKLLZAnJO9UZujW3DqPYU9Apfkds1YiZb6Ff19hdK45wTXSK_h8QmxHGMlAlebRdzJqs6ICp7l215ruF55rgIk7Is3xZVoH5RrVPaSOk7tXoUVzZ0DMCxajA4xRGcpFPWHyfvIO7VFPopmKaB-D4opRYb-1)****[”](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=74f07aeb79494f4797fcee5f6a637e67&_e=3PtbERxcj9Gu-MRiNvdU_gQMei_kdX4VljIBtQnbHZL7QNISPp-fRxZAnWNJ9q2HxNh1yNwC-LNtMGklpyznR4kdI2jHH3bCz5d-UPAL-vJ3EG8KH3DrsHnSN2uRR8VusjiO26380kfUIRFI5Jwaxe508L3YqDi4_1xScRvFLsveiSNimZF1IZlDz0XcAlKA67tkW4v-uPmv7EN8t1TKaPQoLECLagcWZvjAtmKLLZCL21ykiYiWKf_IfTNcTu3LsuNsVSeIBszHjlvag8xhFsdDWkSK1R6LWi8dBTd3tKMBmBkwlV8rd_a5SIAgUDTtGMRj1N_gOlU736UnXLBjxuCKb_du9EtgqzBZ0HC9iR-6dHYxGV71aPacNWuyp107) —is now available as a free online video series.**
---
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=74f07aeb79494f4797fcee5f6a637e67&_e=3PtbERxcj9Gu-MRiNvdU_gQMei_kdX4VljIBtQnbHZL7QNISPp-fRxZAnWNJ9q2HxNh1yNwC-LNtMGklpyznR4kdI2jHH3bCz5d-UPAL-vJ3EG8KH3DrsHnSN2uRR8VusjiO26380kfUIRFI5Jwaxe508L3YqDi4_1xScRvFLsveiSNimZF1IZlDz0XcAlKA67tkW4v-uPmv7EN8t1TKaPQoLECLagcWZvjAtmKLLZD6DRwlQk1GX8NLqfD25uVuoK243N8m5K3wMGKuMYXtkGKRJZN_ktHm5Ssq8FEMwicEwbZKEgnRB61woh32ziMDsxZb90nIUqeIy878kIY_7MMuAeu8uE7-pmgFo5h_n-dj2pkZqEiodTIwAwyKrCKA)
---
| | Filmed on the Hillsdale campus, this video series will give you insight into:
* The origins and leaders of the Great Reset
* How the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations
* The connection between a cashless society and the Great Reset
* What “environmental justice” has to do with the Great Reset
* The Great Reset from China’s perspective
* Alternatives to the Great Reset

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:**
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=74f07aeb79494f4797fcee5f6a637e67&_e=3PtbERxcj9Gu-MRiNvdU_gQMei_kdX4VljIBtQnbHZL7QNISPp-fRxZAnWNJ9q2HxNh1yNwC-LNtMGklpyznR4kdI2jHH3bCz5d-UPAL-vJ3EG8KH3DrsHnSN2uRR8VusjiO26380kfUIRFI5Jwaxe508L3YqDi4_1xScRvFLsveiSNimZF1IZlDz0XcAlKA67tkW4v-uPmv7EN8t1TKaPQoLECLagcWZvjAtmKLLZBEWRn7qxU0LQ4jfDm2SVP5KVCW9o5AlMUbbuDGi6_Q7tn3MHR04Sum3Ei0WZ-g1kynntixnfNRcLzAfST3drZgYPOvu1g6dgvGHu0EO_LTFxbFrQDzeWhsIvDiOB3elenOZOSWBScj4dg8arHIYDEH)**
You will learn about the Great Reset, the dangers it poses, and pro-freedom alternatives. And you can share these lessons with your family, friends, and more.
As America’s economy continues to struggle in the aftermath of disastrous elite decisions, lessons like these are essential to the defense of the free market and American liberty.
Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

This seminar—titled —is now available as a free online video series. | | Filmed on the Hillsdale campus, this video series will give you insight into: The origins and leaders of the Great Reset How the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations The connection between a cashless society and the Great Reset What “environmental justice” has to do with the Great Reset The Great Reset from China’s perspective Alternatives to the Great Reset You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link: You will learn about the Great Reset, the dangers it poses, and pro-freedom alternatives. And you can share these lessons with your family, friends, and more. As America’s economy continues to struggle in the aftermath of disastrous elite decisions, lessons like these are essential to the defense of the free market and American liberty. Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Full Mag News
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=16e3b049f1a3443295df16a2c8cd96b7&_e=2hsAuXqA4ilhSzGJ0dQKI4uPKrIU-F5sN5tYN7D7d2KeMgwBXzyjKAi17nODo-BqweDvAx2tF8RMt5WPMuRrBGEbSFLdB8BoublvI6jTo3oUl3dNnlvsPgjwuRUdVWhuGJ3GkItaiB-ozkI2WUQ0SwipH7qdW3vQxH8Ff_fGuAYjimqwggBSf6bG9tyD3sjm1m75JNK4HtnYtAk2DX1j2Lz2WIHf_0PbU_rBJ6JrD3bbTmk-FoAT0KtgkKvp13HeBxYicy4OuOpANYS9UV5QqkrBLwi1WFKTEjXTkxu6pVQLy5t_NUC-Yw9O50K4bIM3z1WOJGXocIJBTsrL7ov7K6aLZKpOwJCKRPnk_XN76kU5XuOayQj-DrrFCMh-FodVGLweClRriioZvZ-qYa2nDg%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=16e3b049f1a3443295df16a2c8cd96b7&_e=2hsAuXqA4ilhSzGJ0dQKI4uPKrIU-F5sN5tYN7D7d2KeMgwBXzyjKAi17nODo-BqweDvAx2tF8RMt5WPMuRrBGEbSFLdB8BoublvI6jTo3oUl3dNnlvsPgjwuRUdVWhuGJ3GkItaiB-ozkI2WUQ0SwipH7qdW3vQxH8Ff_fGuAYjimqwggBSf6bG9tyD3sjm1m75JNK4HtnYtAk2DX1j2Lz2WIHf_0PbU_rBJ6JrD3Yoz4Xw3FK3K57AMmxRwXTfWk-gnuxGr1SbBEhnwvGsQXxal2cKQ0-ysYzEJfZJ0S_XvdIy4F-4LCMBcwWosVP3xEL91WKdy4Q6iLSdtRRM1QU4JW24xCikifEn1iJjYJNbu0XVCpaiU7kdlXltB2eTn1Dd-kgKZGi1b_xArrB9qg%3D%3D)** For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=16e3b049f1a3443295df16a2c8cd96b7&_e=2hsAuXqA4ilhSzGJ0dQKI4uPKrIU-F5sN5tYN7D7d2KeMgwBXzyjKAi17nODo-BqweDvAx2tF8RMt5WPMuRrBGEbSFLdB8BoublvI6jTo3oUl3dNnlvsPgjwuRUdVWhuGJ3GkItaiB-ozkI2WUQ0SwipH7qdW3vQxH8Ff_fGuAYjimqwggBSf6bG9tyD3sjm1m75JNK4HtnYtAk2DX1j2Lz2WIHf_0PbU_rBJ6JrD3bpdV_VqvGBzCy-dlXIphjNVU4rRrrCkfjNw7PAGOcykGao79qLFVbA3mnJysuHch12hUKuW1uLhs3fWEEIEZtqZ--4WUSAtyCJiO6N7fGx38nO5_EROG4ZG4XNSULzQtbnDMrBHcTDpMF2a1JkI5jo_rJg3vBYJglIdtQ6qvWRlQ%3D%3D)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Studying his accomplishments is needed
body:
You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, “Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,” on DVD. This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9eeebee49e5140cd98aba988b88cc952&_e=kWEy6CggfZTxatmW6ANyhcTG4R6MVvLyR3bSjj34hnat8j1yywwutIxzdOCRZP8xoouAP0BAPj9I9lBevmXtmBIN1CLrcYyfkfMJBt8Gj2KUSCgLlOm8HH5YXazW3ZdN3aj5xjnYZctL31KiUeguX-cIVIYvK4x33Ic4UIf5usjSHxmi7OycaKYfkS-bpyxK3MlHWAXznTaCtIp2H2VJ8YhLuDWNcUWB5fW48bupjrg1-G7obqXBoA2bwZ3tu7k7ORpsQj7V74P8Qq4yZnHCxUmNBUpw3v-ifHK3GdGgFvxfyvLo0F155zmW3bITW_vw1bb17fd5P0dIRCutnQ2CZRJaY_R0PJi46PM1Xc_01XBIsNYjjdXZVkZZkVzAaOHpvbwh7FtscbiFeNy1XmtCvA%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, You can now own one of Hillsdale College's most popular online courses, **" Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,"** on DVD. Thousands of people have enjoyed this in-depth course online since its release, _**and now you can add it to your personal library or give it as a gift.**_ In recent years Winston Churchill, who is best known for his leadership during World War II, has been portrayed in numerous films and television shows, proving without a doubt that Americans find the "British Bulldog" captivating. The reasons for this sustained interest in Churchill are profound. No statesman has better diagnosed the threat of modern technology; no statesman has spoken more effectively in opposition to socialism; and, no statesman has displayed more courage in the face of tyranny. It should come as little surprise that so many "academics" and activists are working to smear his legacy, which makes studying a true account of Churchill's accomplishments more important than ever. **For precisely this reason, I am so excited to offer you this powerful DVD set:** **_[https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9eeebee49e5140cd98aba988b88cc952&_e=kWEy6CggfZTxatmW6ANyhcTG4R6MVvLyR3bSjj34hnat8j1yywwutIxzdOCRZP8xoouAP0BAPj9I9lBevmXtmBIN1CLrcYyfkfMJBt8Gj2KUSCgLlOm8HH5YXazW3ZdN3aj5xjnYZctL31KiUeguX-cIVIYvK4x33Ic4UIf5usjSHxmi7OycaKYfkS-bpyxK3MlHWAXznTaCtIp2H2VJ8YhLuDWNcUWB5fW48bupjrg1-G7obqXBoA2bwZ3tu7k7KA5a3gM3xRMwqIxm4N3tBumtv9mvWkfHyN5r5LUGipWLLqHxqjGLvU35qVzyCSVuvxMBUVugH8XN5lURaYBEvW2RWt7dRYn0MruhGM-Xm6akQ24whYkMgpyMnHQgMq14VvJ0E2dUqIfw69jH47gyMg%3D%3D)_** As a student of Dr. Arnn myself, I know that his lectures on Churchill will teach you more about this subject than any of the many books and videos available to you, and they will reveal profound lessons that can be applied to the urgent problems of today. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9eeebee49e5140cd98aba988b88cc952&_e=kWEy6CggfZTxatmW6ANyhcTG4R6MVvLyR3bSjj34hnat8j1yywwutIxzdOCRZP8xoouAP0BAPj9I9lBevmXtmBIN1CLrcYyfkfMJBt8Gj2KUSCgLlOm8HH5YXazW3ZdN3aj5xjnYZctL31KiUeguX-cIVIYvK4x33Ic4UIf5usjSHxmi7OycaKYfkS-bpyxK3MlHWAXznTaCtIp2H2VJ8YhLuDWNcUWB5fW48bupjrg1-G7obqXBoA2bwZ3tu7k7JS_QFWDxl3f77XIqN0gYBEHjEsrBXSjFQlZM41aIpFiEJbFVCsrnvnV_WFiES1SZ5o4xKGmyOZcClcAXyLVIrv5LBCXD7CiYW9AVXJNIx8HAT6mCEeyIl7FOrkN0snIy-0xYcizrkLNzWLMaDdn7Vw%3D%3D) Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you'll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift--before they're gone. Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of **" Winston Churchill and Statesmanship**" on DVD: _[**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9eeebee49e5140cd98aba988b88cc952&_e=kWEy6CggfZTxatmW6ANyhcTG4R6MVvLyR3bSjj34hnat8j1yywwutIxzdOCRZP8xoouAP0BAPj9I9lBevmXtmBIN1CLrcYyfkfMJBt8Gj2KUSCgLlOm8HH5YXazW3ZdN3aj5xjnYZctL31KiUeguX-cIVIYvK4x33Ic4UIf5usjSHxmi7OycaKYfkS-bpyxK3MlHWAXznTaCtIp2H2VJ8YhLuDWNcUWB5fW48bupjrg1-G7obqXBoA2bwZ3tu7k7o6VJmTIhfLr3PN_GjRpx1cqLKi48oFItpAw2X5rf2_lWSBw690TecQo4vJWKgDZMaGFM8t9FijE6Fu6kDgcl40vsqe4SYEdDBSX91q5s9q-fzJZ7I-SlHJqsG2PIakKajYgvaeyJy5TYbnH3jtTthw%3D%3D)_ You'll undoubtedly enjoy this close study of Churchill's words and deeds.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College |

So how did Heritage Action stop this **BAD BILL **from becoming law? _Inside and outside pressure._

clean_body: Heritage Action just led the defeat of a radical piece of legislation that Nancy tried to sneak through. Here’s how. | | | | | Fellow Conservative, Heritage Action recently defeated a radical piece of legislation called the "EAGLE Act" that Nancy Pelosi tried to sneak through right before Christmas . This legislation would have empowered China, hurt American workers, and worsened our current immigration crisis by increasing chain migration. So how did Heritage Action stop this BAD BILL from becoming law? Inside and outside pressure. | | | | Fellow Conservative, Heritage Action raised the alarm and the grassroots pressure from our nationwide network of Sentinel activists convinced representatives who initially supported the bill to change their position. In the end, Pelosi pulled the scheduled vote for the EAGLE Act--she knew she didn't have enough votes to pass it! name: Conservatives Give
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=41a3679f30c34004b3cd174fc0c5c749&_e=QF_AqKIpVU-TCKSsme3Z_YmMG_KFzT51bFs9wM6_TrxhBCGzkpJX0MQGITKUorJBpR_WEEFKL-HXIo5cru2EOMaUy9eS8ugcZjovensg_OSEZpwlSIOnBtn2XkwQpS1jSJBO1JNGMbVorkQJmK0X4wpCI_s56uljS0bLl_oenFsYX7fekc4y1Bg2pwu6JSfQ0X750RFN_5VUy_emQwVpIvPZUr9NwPkZeUQfjd8_S8LZkZJOSikbEFmquZ0sgwnppRsaU8VoMgJpdgFDvACPeoZ_xpko2CROSEU047DkU_O47D7PtF6aUXvVsdWW-9McxeN-6tiqKKL_A-Ik-3YlUzbnPt4tj0trDeZIrugu2iaWeOtPKgVv10KKMrGv8tYaoXMQd-MWGiy8CWP2IEBKKA%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=41a3679f30c34004b3cd174fc0c5c749&_e=QF_AqKIpVU-TCKSsme3Z_YmMG_KFzT51bFs9wM6_TrxhBCGzkpJX0MQGITKUorJBpR_WEEFKL-HXIo5cru2EOMaUy9eS8ugcZjovensg_OSEZpwlSIOnBtn2XkwQpS1jSJBO1JNGMbVorkQJmK0X4wpCI_s56uljS0bLl_oenFsYX7fekc4y1Bg2pwu6JSfQ0X750RFN_5VUy_emQwVpIvPZUr9NwPkZeUQfjd8_S8Lz2vFktbCrZSp_0q1-XgxwdRw5W0piiwcZsQ0SeawOk6t_LNEEcqrazfbAMAPaP1Yt3ybXlSPZXwheC47STHyiE_goTGsO9jN6-oCrvBBw8Jsnqv-oaaMBCckn6sP2k1c1WkbEGE0zc1crENhwVMilVZTnYO_g_MPZUFR4cGNKqQ%3D%3D)** For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=41a3679f30c34004b3cd174fc0c5c749&_e=QF_AqKIpVU-TCKSsme3Z_YmMG_KFzT51bFs9wM6_TrxhBCGzkpJX0MQGITKUorJBpR_WEEFKL-HXIo5cru2EOMaUy9eS8ugcZjovensg_OSEZpwlSIOnBtn2XkwQpS1jSJBO1JNGMbVorkQJmK0X4wpCI_s56uljS0bLl_oenFsYX7fekc4y1Bg2pwu6JSfQ0X750RFN_5VUy_emQwVpIvPZUr9NwPkZeUQfjd8_S8K6BM3uEuD959_eA7UdW-aZqnht3KMaYsgC_PVSojsxQFBa0HY_qzT-hmPJtG91J9orKoQQsV3IOdb-SmgLSyx5jUm-G-CxIIqC1Lss5BpULwMheNtzNy3WCbSw_2oLGJ8hG6tg_QGLefsd7N7k5jHfk78KI8wmVU4a_0O_CBlc_w%3D%3D)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Sent to Conservatives Give subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
[**unsubscribe**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=41a3679f30c34004b3cd174fc0c5c749&_t=qIKFf5KIytqDRdPgPJhyFV0-_D0DnR2FyAzlhM2JkBOZMWgKqtBH3wxCtyjprzZyh0YBJwWLpbHuxfm0BkJujgZ3qOzD9YRKH8QJ_ps6PO80lgSbQZomH1b8oQjC0cMpj2V5wiGbMKHrNE3IPhlzb6uVQOZEzLWFwkbDEFFL2f4%3D)

body:
Rolling Stone Just Came After Me This morning, the Rolling Stone released a VERY vicious and unfair hit piece on me and the newly formed Pastors For
| | |
---
## Rolling Stone Just Came After Me
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16403043.9454.1.a413e24c6455fa9cabd317ef9c3141e9)
---
This morning, the [Rolling Stone](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16403043.9455.1.1e048a1a475b2307f70e5a02af7e622d) released a VERY _vicious_ and _unfair_ hit piece on me and the newly formed [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16403043.9456.1.5e9e6737c435580de5733ddead1e3b45) organization.
Why did the [Rolling Stone](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16403043.9457.1.6449c0db6d4fed9dc011667e7b92a148) do a feature story on me and [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16403043.9458.1.e1316f9e30197f766355da75c237bb18)?
They know what we know. **If Pastors rally for President Trump then the largest voting bloc in America** (the Christian vote) **will rally behind President Trump and he will defeat the Democrat nominee in 2024 for the Presidency of the United States.**
Therefore, _radical left-wing pseudo-news outlets_ like the [Rolling Stone](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16403043.9459.1.6fa0c6ecaa9fcd1c1d4372a66069fce2) will continue coming after me and [Pastors for Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16403043.9460.1.d646e3c00201f2982cf5725a7832ec62) to try and stop the incredible momentum we have right now.
Here is what I know: **it will backfire on them**.
In 2021, the [Washington Post](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16403043.9461.1.82e09104fd320e4ef8fe66b1becd1057) (which is TOTAL trash) did a hit piece on me for signing [COVID19 religious exemptions](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16403043.9462.1.56f5bf2468ff481ee9194b73a43ae09d) as the Pastor of [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16403043.9463.1.67cdafa093fce04a384b0afb0cf6b3a0) in Tulsa, OK.
That hit piece actually caused HUGE traffic to flood my website, [www.jacksonlahmeyer.com/nomandate](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16403043.9464.1.437a59a5548559f8c9a99539cc96d44f), and propelled me to signing now over 60,000 [COVID19 religious exemption forms](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16403043.9465.1.4d7cfbf799ffe290a34c1af1f9965787) for Americans all across the country saving thousands of jobs.
If the [Washington Post](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16403043.9466.1.b16fc6fc2917bd0e478d45672d61b4b7) (which is TOTAL trash once again) would not have written a hit piece on me then I would have never been in a position to help over 60,000 Americans.
It reminds me of what Joseph said to his brothers in _Genesis 50:20_ , **"You intended to harm me, but God intended it for good to accomplish what is now being done, the saving of many lives."**
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer
Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16403043.9467.1.26588bfd4f9c7a97bd92cf5aceefe80f), [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16403043.9468.1.c256ba7b78abe943e9e07f897801a2b2), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16403043.9469.1.b225006b24df680f946104371b0608b7), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16403043.9470.1.5ec50615d5d293e93287b111f722ef1d), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16403043.9471.1.28edb4cfaff132c41633ede62b81b875) & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16403043.9472.1.8e204913dd0dce8eb6f1445a6ae800a4)).

## This Will Cause Some Controversy...
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16403043.9475.1.0d2acd84c0e4bc37792e9e1396c3e0e3)
---
Today, the [Gateway Pundit](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16403043.9476.1.bb5f089b2f3776cf4ad676e91c4e1331) published my Op-Ed on why I refuse to abandon **President Trump** as a Christian leader even though other Christian leaders are doing so.
In this Op-Ed, I make the case of _why_ Christians in America should support **Donald Trump** for the Presidency in 2024.
You can read the Op-Ed by visiting: [https://www.thegatewaypundit.com/2022/12/christian-leaders-abandoned-trump-refuse/](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16403043.9477.1.270fc2671882fe5a4b7cc711396b3efa)
| | [ Jackson Lahmeyer's Op-Ed ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16403043.9478.1.f8c358e45151ebec1eab6a322d78b669)
---
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16403043.9479.1.98eb86ecadafc2463323e8fede6ad617)
---
Last week, **President Donald Trump** sent me a message of thanks over the newly formed [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16403043.9480.1.8341ef38a7748880c7eb050f0fead83f) organization that he also recently shared about on **TruthSocial**. You can read the Pastors For Trump full **[PRESS RELEASE](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16403043.9481.1.84a7b62d780f245c81fbc04a77978053)** here: [Pastors For Trump Press Release](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16403043.9482.1.ca615c8b2ef04e1dd2926aaa9d1ae5b8) We are off to a TREMENDOUS start and with **President Trump's** share, our numbers are highly increasing. Many media outlets have reported on the formation of the Coalition such as **Newsweek** , **Rolling Stone** , **One America News Network** , **Real America's Voice** , **Gateway Pundit** , **Right Wing Watch** , **Baptist News Global** and others. This coalition is made up of **Pastors & Ministry Leaders** from different denominations across all 50 states having the common ground of wanting to **Make America Great Again by Making America Godly Again**. [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16403043.9483.1.dcd7ab0c9ba094a1866eb5c4b5021a31) is NOT just limited to **Pastors/Ministry Leaders** but is for _every_ believer in America. There will be _monthly Prayer Calls_ starting in January that will host _prominent_ leaders within the America First movement who will give updates of what is taking place within our nation from their unique vantage point. I want to encourage you to visit [www.pastors4trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16403043.9484.1.00cdaa1ddf7f3851714fd9a6128a5de9) today and register to join in on the Prayer Calls so you can be informed as well as a participant in praying for our country. **Dr. Billy Graham** once said, _"For America to get back on its' feet, the people of God must first get down on their knees and pray."_ Not only should you register to join the monthly Prayer Calls and receive updates from prominent America First leaders, but you should also send the [www.pastors4trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16403043.9485.1.18250b8d16b221c01566180db78f9270) link to your Pastor/Ministry Leader and encourage him/her to join the coalition with many other Pastor/Ministry Leaders throughout the country. Every Pastor/Ministry Leader will remain confidential, and their identity will not be released to the public unless they are in the role of a State/Regional Director. Pastors/Ministry Leaders that join the coalition will receive opportunities to meet (in-person) many of the America First leaders through upcoming rallies and events as well as have their voice heard by giving input on what issues should be presented to **President Trump** by the [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16403043.9486.1.b8db5260e09bb4c076cd9b39744d40bb) coalition. Please go visit [www.Pastors4Trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16403043.9487.1.1c9889153e44c3d87a49a9113db7fae0) today and be a part of the effort to **Make America Great Again by Making America Godly Again**.

## Don't Miss Out!
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16403043.9488.1.dd4f955e90c92e127c1fe06c493161c7)
---
Right now, **Biblical ILLITERACY** is at an _all-time high_ in America. Fewer than half of all adults can name the four Gospel writers, while 82% of Americans believe that _"God helps those who help themselves"_ is a Bible verse.
In a recent **LifeWay Research** study, the Bible reading habits among church attendees was shocking:
\- 19% read the Bible everyday
\- 26% read the Bible a few times per week
\- 14% read the Bible once a week
\- 22% read the Bible once a month
\- 18% read the Bible rarely or never
In general, American Christians have a poor foundation in the Word of God. This is a major problem and is the reason why I decided to launch [Sheridan Bible College](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16403043.9489.1.3b0cbd514b248e305b1dfa51708db7d0).
I want to encourage you to consider [Sheridan Bible College](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16403043.9490.1.5ce6e0c23b0ea1ee701a4eba1912ae68) as a means for you to grow in your faith and go from a convert to a true disciple.
[Sheridan Bible College](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16403043.9491.1.601915b711beed3906c79d101c2dc7e2) is a 1 year intensive program consisting of 12 courses divided between 2 semesters. Classes are offered in-person & online.
_"Study to show yourself approved to God, a worker who does not need to be ashamed, rightly dividing the word of truth"_ \- **2 Timothy 2:15**
Enrolling in [Sheridan Bible College](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16403043.9492.1.8d6451d0cb87ef30ff582e0085283178) is not something you will regret. We have intentionally made tuition VERY inexpensive: $300 per semester.
**Fall Semester** :
\- Old Testament Introduction
\- New Testament Introduction
\- Theology of Worship
\- Church History 1
\- Faith & Prayer
\- Spiritual Growth
**Spring Semester** :
\- Christian Theology
\- Pauline Epistles
\- Apologetics
\- Church History 2
\- Leadership & Ethics
\- Evangelism & Outreach
Classes for the Spring 2023 Semester begin January 17. Enroll today at [www.sheridan.church/biblecollege](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=16403043.9493.1.6149a5309b384dbd450ef646e3c646ec)

In a moment, **[I’m going to ask if you can pitch in one more time before our last fundraising deadline of 2022.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56468754/385101297/685856095?refcode=fl_email_fr_20221227eoy1_gv_od90ds_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGEzZmNkNi0wMzg2LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0mn4DN7Bhgk3jgqsChTCM6XvbH0mUdArumzoGnIJxZg=)** But before I do, I hope you’ll let me explain why your contribution matters. But before 2023 has even begun, our former far-right opponent is already planning her rematch against me in 2024. Yvette Herrell filed to run last month, and she just went on a right-wing news outlet to say, _“I will definitely be staying in the fight, and next year we’ll definitely be making some announcements.”_ We won this critical race in November to flip NM-02 blue, and I aim to make every moment of this two-year term matter. But we can’t get complacent: while I serve New Mexicans in Washington, we have to start rebuilding our momentum with an eye toward 2024. **My team and I are working hard to finish this year off strong by raising $25,000 before December ends, but right now, we’re not on track to reach our goal in time.** **[That’s why I’m coming to you: can you chip in $10 or more to help us reach our grassroots fundraising goal by 11:59 PM on December 31? name: Andy Biggs
subject: My plan to defeat McCarthy and restore conservative power in Congress >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biggs for Congress
body:
How I'm going to make it happen
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdmu2uaavi5qt50tlqptgn1173ogc3fi2avfee1o_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chim6o74chh2bs)
---
| Fellow Patriot,
**I’m officially challenging Kevin McCarthy as Speaker in the new Republican Congress.**
If you agree a CONSERVATIVE should lead us in Washington... not another RINO Establishment hack like McCarthy...**[I need you to help us mount a pressure campaign over the next 4 weeks.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1p15d4mto8h5aqrlcfup9etmtdosvahilqqj1cg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chim6o74chh2bs)**
My efforts to win over Congress are FAR more powerful if they know that VOTERS want a conservative in charge.
**[Pitch in just $30 to turbocharge our emergency efforts to break the Establishment and elect a CONSERVATIVE Speaker of the House >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zamh6pf5pfsqmhnn9b3u29s6h22ap0bcte4di7jo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chim6o74chh2bs)** | | | | [FIGHT WITH $30](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb70o245lqf35tu6ng3ca9n8cd7u77i45h7ngi7g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chim6o74chh2bs)
---
**Kevin McCarthy does NOT have the values, the backbone, or the courage** to stand up to Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer.

Like most Establishment Republicans, he sees conservative voters like you and me as the real enemy...and he’ll stab us in the back every chance he gets.

For 2 years, I served as Chairman of the House Freedom Caucus... the most powerful and successful congressional bloc of conservatives ever. **I figured out exactly how the Establishment operates and exactly how to defeat them at their own game.**

I’ll make you this promise right now: I will NEVER betray conservative voters, surrender my principles, or stop fighting for what matters most.

We won the House in November because the American people voted to STOP Biden’s radicalism and BREAK the Establishment’s stranglehold on this nation. **McCarthy won’t fight for us...so we’ve got to do it ourselves.**

body:
Join the fight for strong conservative leadership
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zoga6kg886vjujt9vrgp7v6f6vonqie0voua77gg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ej3fctmekp76t1heipnacpne4pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sr3msr76tj4ehi72pj16dgb5dbjc1h79c5m6iq66dlm6moj6d1mmapbfcdncuoefkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj32s5jc3g74c36e1qbacj7m2qmash1k8gn48n24hhmeoj4clgecp71c8iv0)
---
| | | | | | | | | [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zqr48vqf7v72ihhutb0mb17leb6ntk6os84qv98g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chim1pj4s5h2bs)
---
| Fellow American, As we close one of the most consequential years in American history, the question of whether or not the GOP will gain real conservative leadership still remains. And the only way we'll defeat RINOs and establishment hacks trying to regain control of the Republican Party is if we take our momentum into the New Year. My finance team informed me this morning that election costs have drained our accounts and that we're struggling to push forward...**At this pace, I simply cannot reach our 2022 End of Year fundraising goal.** **[You can help me block Kevin McCarthy from becoming Speaker of the House and take back strong conservative leadership if you help me crush this goal.](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zpf2lfpcr30sa3uk8d4oc8daikr3pant8f6ltehg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chim1pj4s5h2bs)** | | | | [CRUSH THIS GOAL](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z6ieh8f2e62msdkcbbahvd77366crjljr4718rio_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chim1pj4s5h2bs "Generic Button")
---
We've worked too tirelessly to sit back and let Democrats and their RINO friends once again profit from the American taxpayer and sell off our nation's best interests for personal profit.

Now is not the time to waiver on the America First movement. We must step up and fight like hell if we want to save our party and our country.

**Next year, I 'll lead the fight to launch investigations into Anthony Fauci, the Biden family, and expose corruption everywhere it exists.**

But I cannot get there if we fall short before the end of the year...

**[So please, help me reach my final End of Year goal before the deadline to push forward with great momentum and reclaim conservative leadership in the House>>](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z3kkk8c02ti92mbsq8n6v5rjca8ohg5t7mbq28kg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chim1pj4s5h2bs)**

Thank you in advance for your help!

Yours in Liberty,

Andy Biggs
Republican Congressman, AZ-5
| | [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zja39lcvlbjt7frmr7fshuf8p88ma4r8m8k7sq80_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chim1pj4s5h2bs)

name: C7 Tac
subject: When nature smacks you, it’s time to fight back…
body:
I had my Tactical Balaclava around my neck...
---
| | | | | | | **WE GOT YOUR 6.**
---

| | |

Greetings friend!

When I left my house this morning, a blast of cool 19 degree wind blasted me in the face, tracing its way around my ears!

Talk about being caught off guard!

Then I realized...

I had my Tactical Balaclava around my neck...

I quickly pulled it up over my head and within seconds I was protected from that nasty NYC winter gust.

Let me tell you...

[Tactical Balaclavas](https://links.c7tac.com/a/1537/click/11039/6374453/0b3e5b1507f5ac71cce761eb3f13b75376937034/c135fd6fc9b0030e22dc8abc9771610527107f37) are an absolute necessity for any outdoor enthusiast.

They’re made of durable, breathable material and designed to protect your head and neck from harsh weather. And they can be worn several different ways, depending on the style you’re going for.

They’re also a solid solution for protection against UV rays, bugs, and other outdoor annoyances.

I love mine and it goes with me almost all the time.

And right now, Gunner Gear has a steal running for the holidays...

[If you buy one balaclava, they’re giving away an additional 3 (THREE) for FREE! ](https://links.c7tac.com/a/1537/click/11039/6374453/0b3e5b1507f5ac71cce761eb3f13b75376937034/c135fd6fc9b0030e22dc8abc9771610527107f37)

That’s unheard of and an untouchable deal!

For real, hurry up before they run out...

With the holidays here, tactical enthusiasts are snagging them up quick!

Don’t lose out, [go here now](https://links.c7tac.com/a/1537/click/11039/6374453/0b3e5b1507f5ac71cce761eb3f13b75376937034/c135fd6fc9b0030e22dc8abc9771610527107f37) and get some for yourself and your friends.

All the best,

---
* * *

[_**TACTICAL | SHOP | CONTACT US**_](https://links.c7tac.com/a/1537/click/11039/6374453/6aa9ab53b7d5386dd9b370b3493857e2e20a15f6/c135fd6fc9b0030e22dc8abc9771610527107f37)

P.S. If you have ANY questions or concerns, please drop us an email, support@c7tac.com. ~ _Nicole_
---

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biggs for Congress
body:
How I'm going to make it happen | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=c02603064a&e=fdefed58de)
---
| Fellow Patriot,
**I’m officially challenging Kevin McCarthy as Speaker in the new Republican Congress.**
If you agree a CONSERVATIVE should lead us in Washington... not another RINO Establishment hack like McCarthy...**[I need you to help us mount a pressure campaign over the next weeks.](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=60b6cc20da&e=fdefed58de)**
My efforts to win over Congress are FAR more powerful if they know that VOTERS want a conservative in charge.
**[Pitch in just $30 to turbocharge our emergency efforts to break the Establishment and elect a CONSERVATIVE Speaker of the House>>](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=4450aae837&e=fdefed58de)** | | | | [FIGHT WITH $30](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=b9bcdcf14e&e=fdefed58de)
---
**Kevin McCarthy does NOT have the values, the backbone, or the courage** to stand up to Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer.

Like most Establishment Republicans, he sees conservative voters like you and me as the real enemy...and he’ll stab us in the back every chance he gets.

For 2 years, I served as Chairman of the House Freedom Caucus... the most powerful and successful congressional bloc of conservatives ever. **I figured out exactly how the Establishment operates and exactly how to defeat them at their own game.**

I’ll make you this promise right now: I will NEVER betray conservative voters, surrender my principles, or stop fighting for what matters most.

We won the House in November because the American people voted to STOP Biden’s radicalism and BREAK the Establishment’s stranglehold on this nation. **McCarthy won’t fight for us...so we’ve got to do it ourselves.**

But we only have a couple weeks before Congress picks our new Speaker. **[We need you to LEAD this fight and power our pressure campaign.](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=782314d83a&e=fdefed58de)**

**[Just $30—or anything you can afford—will make sure Congress knows the stakes and feels the heat. Come through for this nation with an emergency gift>>](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=7300070121&e=fdefed58de)**
| | | [FIGHT WITH $30](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=b77e0cb95d&e=fdefed58de)
---
| | | [FIGHT WITH $55](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=2b7fc7adce&e=fdefed58de)
---
| | | [FIGHT WITH $80](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=c41d4c0109&e=fdefed58de)
---
Yours in Freedom,

Andy Biggs
Republican Congressman, AZ-5

Just over two years ago, we were a great Nation—and soon, we will be a great Nation again. With YOU by my side, we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN. To no one’s surprise, the Left will do everything in its power to stop me– it never ends. But our movement is just getting started, so I need to know EVERY American Patriot will do their part. I wrote a $47 check to our movement, and I am calling on YOU to MATCH my donation. If every Patriot stepped up and matched my $47 donation TODAY, we will send an overwhelming message to the Left – in 2024, we WILL MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN. This is URGENT, Friend.
