subject: I’m taking the Four Pillars Pledge—will you?
body:
|
---
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=8323a94d69774f7db0ae4570217fe6ce&_e=ZhADF87xQudyrQjYp7Rd7h9DK_UN4F_dE7VQZv4m2hmeQsGM0JE7N3PhyLUklu4_REIbeCJe1p7B6g1Rpe4K7wbv92PvsyHQu5vyJFQ4cDgzeTEr6wwk5fuFnb_BhQtsuKT9C3wjB9oxFyii45z6NvuccERTHJ5iFIYjoXyxa52jwq0wjDR6ihZ0vJxOQosWeLYc3BxppnSj2NzERlE9NM6elSB8rKl1NSo8C4zC2ZQ76KiyBr7O_FuVl_uocl0Ebw3XMxv21VT_az8FbN4pt1xjLkmxiLqI-aTWtpTATJBocfjEl8BI9G1WUHPOMcthxtzyTonKCTw8nk3rrvQjXwOLad5vf1Ujwj8o2Z8k6zhGBjuga13C9YiMOWNfrhiU)
---
| Fellow Patriot,

This is Dr. Ben Carson. As we approach the end of another year, I've been taking some time to reflect on all the things I have to be grateful for. And this year, I'm especially grateful for patriots who are standing in defense of America's guiding values in 2022. [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=8323a94d69774f7db0ae4570217fe6ce&_e=ZhADF87xQudyrQjYp7Rd7h9DK_UN4F_dE7VQZv4m2hmeQsGM0JE7N3PhyLUklu4_REIbeCJe1p7B6g1Rpe4K7wbv92PvsyHQu5vyJFQ4cDgzeTEr6wwk5fuFnb_BhQtsuKT9C3wjB9oxFyii45z6NvuccERTHJ5iFIYjoXyxa52jwq0wjDR6ihZ0vJxOQosWeLYc3BxppnSj2NzERlE9NM6elSB8rKl1NSo8C4zC2ZT19rGSHV94ydB-zhyIGNKtHvGvcO_JCDaxZBnRERXJzBXN4IW0-jqlywtCAAfs28r3wHn1MjZxgSyOJZeLaf03oNKOkbTB1B6kTGIhXYYdZFDyA_aV_V7ByI5Hzt_5vTHBV2VgLKSLHdbaVfin7UjL) So before you close out this email, [can you spare two quick minutes to join me in signing your name to our special Four Pillars Pledge?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=8323a94d69774f7db0ae4570217fe6ce&_e=ZhADF87xQudyrQjYp7Rd7h9DK_UN4F_dE7VQZv4m2hmeQsGM0JE7N3PhyLUklu4_REIbeCJe1p7B6g1Rpe4K7wbv92PvsyHQu5vyJFQ4cDgzeTEr6wwk5fuFnb_BhQtsuKT9C3wjB9oxFyii45z6NvuccERTHJ5iFIYjoXyxa52jwq0wjDR6ihZ0vJxOQosWeLYc3BxppnSj2NzERlE9NM6elSB8rKl1NSo8C4zC2ZSelX8ZkZyGTFlsry_CLssgrmuRyV8AJ0Wtg47LB7swdJHcOMXHF5n_ZcGNwXsRJ64KLO8LhJWpUkE96GzmyTbB9us8z8on_5M_G7hEcBQnFczdrguH7nNzrRFA6gOcySH7BhfxEBnWrLY4LMPn3ZTI)

This pledge will affirm your support for America’s guiding values and will help us show elected leaders that you care about forging a better path forward for America.

[**To complete this quick 2-minute Four Pillars Pledge just click here now »**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=8323a94d69774f7db0ae4570217fe6ce&_e=ZhADF87xQudyrQjYp7Rd7h9DK_UN4F_dE7VQZv4m2hmeQsGM0JE7N3PhyLUklu4_REIbeCJe1p7B6g1Rpe4K7wbv92PvsyHQu5vyJFQ4cDgzeTEr6wwk5fuFnb_BhQtsuKT9C3wjB9oxFyii45z6NvuccERTHJ5iFIYjoXyxa52jwq0wjDR6ihZ0vJxOQosWeLYc3BxppnSj2NzERlE9NM6elSB8rKl1NSo8C4zC2ZRaBPCRxyBJVyzekYGu7xhIYd2Kqn23ZZHOouq0frt_awZ16VrZtQnGJnKmBvxpL8YemNf_sJl7A21ybPgCa1AQacLZTTL2hJtK_q4gsVDEfbbWenQ3y3GdvTEAiRyJ4MeV_AbLvqFbaeNiNSmFblkN)

**This special pledge reads: **

* I believe in the four pillars of American society: faith, liberty, community, and life
* I know these pillars are the foundation for the greatest, freest nation the world has ever seen
* I will help promote and preserve these cornerstones to secure the United States as a beacon of hope and freedom for generations to come
* As 2023 nears, I’m ready to strengthen the bonds that hold our country together by promoting conservative, common-sense solutions to the challenges facing our country

[**If these words reflect what you want for our country in 2023 and beyond, please join me in taking this special pledge today.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=8323a94d69774f7db0ae4570217fe6ce&_e=ZhADF87xQudyrQjYp7Rd7h9DK_UN4F_dE7VQZv4m2hmeQsGM0JE7N3PhyLUklu4_REIbeCJe1p7B6g1Rpe4K7wbv92PvsyHQu5vyJFQ4cDgzeTEr6wwk5fuFnb_BhQtsuKT9C3wjB9oxFyii45z6NvuccERTHJ5iFIYjoXyxa52jwq0wjDR6ihZ0vJxOQosWeLYc3BxppnSj2NzERlE9NM6elSB8rKl1NSo8C4zC2ZS6JjfhuMwWmXa6K3ln6LFoakYJuaxioyujWm-O1OhpkogSZdUa7j5e_cxhuybisPMrCl0cIN1_RT2aLeBlZ1K8t8L6TF7AM6-g_J8SSmAXbYlxuoFkTk7Q80woyExAE502Qqx93V6U7PVMLNPvcG6z)

This is a critical time to advance freedom in America—so let’s head into 2023 with a full head of steam by reminding ourselves, together, of what really matters.

The fight for liberty is more crucial than ever, even if more liberty-minded leaders were sent to Congress. We must remain vigilant in our fight.

You can take this value-affirming pledge now by clicking the secure link below:

[**https://offers.americancornerstone.org/four-pillars-pledge/**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=8323a94d69774f7db0ae4570217fe6ce&_e=ZhADF87xQudyrQjYp7Rd7h9DK_UN4F_dE7VQZv4m2hmeQsGM0JE7N3PhyLUklu4_REIbeCJe1p7B6g1Rpe4K7wbv92PvsyHQu5vyJFQ4cDgzeTEr6wwk5fuFnb_BhQtsuKT9C3wjB9oxFyii45z6NvuccERTHJ5iFIYjoXyxa52jwq0wjDR6ihZ0vJxOQosWeLYc3BxppnSj2NzERlE9NM6elSB8rKl1NSo8C4zC2ZRwN4oR_dD0GzYmUO7xLbtccDeu7v-rcsntjLF4tfj3jSnUsGrLK8JdRG_99zSvJ9h8Sb-zo6JdJL5aS9NdZUxLcbkUxzk-dLc3xIQN_RAFEjEfruMUCv6Ype_aKarDhYwsL_LW2i9qGO4-k5JpsfH7)

I’ve already completed mine—and I hope you’ll join me on the list of patriots who are pledging their support for the guiding values that make our nation so exceptional.

May God bless you and your family throughout the holidays.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6f31fe46cbc24ed5a3e555471bc6e76b&_e=cSd64N4F0Ih4Lw0EniU8xqtcCX6XckMStBCAT-bT6zosDeDJNpYGzG7raElWm_G7A2invWQH7nNdJz30dqq1W7wKfvGU9bPEvZ1sIb4zUiJbsqWMcvmZNr4T72tchmZmKDNP967qTQ6oUpI5m7U14X3cCc5mBpMFIVq3D_iSRYFfdZlxvrB_KM8-NRBU_TFjOZTBZVJjGo8fcR8pA77cHdn6c01xOaHH8ZuQyVaVLQTZ3xgvyP7xFgtYc9eOPjosINvdMXUsttFhwsbH6X9gRY0xO3D_cz-1uDaHTdAitn5swRGN_uIUlximZ7tFatxyUevh3rFmzCxK8w14b-tJZKodX_65iU868e6b_doRxdhqObN-s_FflRk8cEX5JiijaItDVSsDE5Plzi_OlrMWHA%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.
A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.
That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.**
By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.
You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below:
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6f31fe46cbc24ed5a3e555471bc6e76b&_e=cSd64N4F0Ih4Lw0EniU8xqtcCX6XckMStBCAT-bT6zosDeDJNpYGzG7raElWm_G7A2invWQH7nNdJz30dqq1W7wKfvGU9bPEvZ1sIb4zUiJbsqWMcvmZNr4T72tchmZmKDNP967qTQ6oUpI5m7U14X3cCc5mBpMFIVq3D_iSRYFfdZlxvrB_KM8-NRBU_TFjOZTBZVJjGo8fcR8pA77cHdn6c01xOaHH8ZuQyVaVLQRqGJtJFRHP1i-VMa1TH96YsY7FBRhF6H0t6RVFtzD9qtQkqMKlCuhIcU_lBAMWvWQtc-6szTYbLy-OTvfvLsx_W_2r6R8O_CQ8iTj25i08mv1_Uz3FwUxohHSHqJQpHCJ1LrkutVSH8B4N_1Q5iMObe6iyZBp84gmPxgf7TS1soA%3D%3D)**
For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.
**But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.**
This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.
Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states.
These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College.
**And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.**
So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.
**You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:**
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6f31fe46cbc24ed5a3e555471bc6e76b&_e=cSd64N4F0Ih4Lw0EniU8xqtcCX6XckMStBCAT-bT6zosDeDJNpYGzG7raElWm_G7A2invWQH7nNdJz30dqq1W7wKfvGU9bPEvZ1sIb4zUiJbsqWMcvmZNr4T72tchmZmKDNP967qTQ6oUpI5m7U14X3cCc5mBpMFIVq3D_iSRYFfdZlxvrB_KM8-NRBU_TFjOZTBZVJjGo8fcR8pA77cHdn6c01xOaHH8ZuQyVaVLQSiXS5TOm8fw8i23yyqnjztuuA3Qk2lA-M8thMBB1Up9W3AjG7iHWcyf2NDeZC9b2YLZbNxu6eKaP6CWS3JJBsVF0O7aJaaI9e1PSo59JcASslurb6xQLM4chKRCtjbb3OnLWRaemz3gjsPX3_lmRFaaDnVWgU0EOFWDGxQVshbQw%3D%3D)**
And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.
Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.
Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

If Democrats take control of the Supreme Court, they'll destroy our Conservative legacy in the blink of an eye. We can 't let them get away with sidelining one of our best Supreme Court Justices. **** Thank you, SCOTUS ALERTS Sent via Team Scalise Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. 320 First Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: I’m taking the Four Pillars Pledge—will you?
body:
This is Dr. Ben Carson. As we approach the end of another year, I've been taking some time to reflect on all the things I have to be grateful for. |
---
| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6653287bc06b4da7809fd5c1f1c97ae8&_e=aSp5uHGhghraQ5I6bvrcC8KtUlfjDrfPGHDjHAhQ5984sAgK78M97KA0kmN14HCfoWh_iU3FaEkw40cYJqx6BWBq9OHSinShsr4RtfswvxgpEz6KH66BZOuLpCIYWjc_QJPHQbcyca_CxKdNrQ2Wf3amvLGfTRmUnouXCudHKOWDEU_8a3G-OXZmYe-XExu7cfI-6y4HIwUqNnFEQJhboBZ-sMLcmqrslv3ihhd2iWEwtnsdlhwfBgJuSKBkxsuxkjibaI01imhO66ePWelUxIiNve0E-JRSrHcz0o4YU7gM2xuaZMY7xEKXx_V_2rlnZRe2KHiKb9YPCc0iMvLReuSvJc_dcF2XmzgpPKS0NJEmW1StYS7hpdg0fjWRosS4)
---
| Fellow Patriot,

This is Dr. Ben Carson. As we approach the end of another year, I've been taking some time to reflect on all the things I have to be grateful for. And this year, I'm especially grateful for patriots who are standing in defense of America's guiding values in 2022. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6653287bc06b4da7809fd5c1f1c97ae8&_e=aSp5uHGhghraQ5I6bvrcC8KtUlfjDrfPGHDjHAhQ5984sAgK78M97KA0kmN14HCfoWh_iU3FaEkw40cYJqx6BWBq9OHSinShsr4RtfswvxgpEz6KH66BZOuLpCIYWjc_QJPHQbcyca_CxKdNrQ2Wf3amvLGfTRmUnouXCudHKOWDEU_8a3G-OXZmYe-XExu7cfI-6y4HIwUqNnFEQJhboBZ-sMLcmqrslv3ihhd2iWE00KdcVlc0lSkAHYBdfDUySpKlR_e6QEQZYRLYUcA8oA0e8s2I7P2FHRk1MLMy14r0kSd9ifno0O8Pd-FMMSNHvXBuGO5GniNoLGrqsoyXJ99sXeNLA_XmuMIGY8P2WbjNIFxJbvRtIHhk1AMMytSO) So before you close out this email, [can you spare two quick minutes to join me in signing your name to our special Four Pillars Pledge?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6653287bc06b4da7809fd5c1f1c97ae8&_e=aSp5uHGhghraQ5I6bvrcC8KtUlfjDrfPGHDjHAhQ5984sAgK78M97KA0kmN14HCfoWh_iU3FaEkw40cYJqx6BWBq9OHSinShsr4RtfswvxgpEz6KH66BZOuLpCIYWjc_QJPHQbcyca_CxKdNrQ2Wf3amvLGfTRmUnouXCudHKOWDEU_8a3G-OXZmYe-XExu7cfI-6y4HIwUqNnFEQJhboBZ-sMLcmqrslv3ihhd2iWH28N5QcycwzY-5yvKK1N9VEubS1U6hXAd4bbrGxEYfOdoglb_AXkgVKk9hsUrEQzCnVwJisshcFmEtQoQhQ04AHY9dzeq-NPlSf4jw9U7bQgWBlsflj8_JeAMZw6usNKhSYiUWZH17RvGCXP9CVBtw)

This pledge will affirm your support for America's guiding values and will help us show elected leaders that you care about forging a better path forward for America.

[**To complete this quick 2-minute Four Pillars Pledge just click here now »**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6653287bc06b4da7809fd5c1f1c97ae8&_e=aSp5uHGhghraQ5I6bvrcC8KtUlfjDrfPGHDjHAhQ5984sAgK78M97KA0kmN14HCfoWh_iU3FaEkw40cYJqx6BWBq9OHSinShsr4RtfswvxgpEz6KH66BZOuLpCIYWjc_QJPHQbcyca_CxKdNrQ2Wf3amvLGfTRmUnouXCudHKOWDEU_8a3G-OXZmYe-XExu7cfI-6y4HIwUqNnFEQJhboBZ-sMLcmqrslv3ihhd2iWFPw5v8SUL3Arau4XA6GjbPqQWJDxmcSFhLRdditODYV1h5B0EoMigNjm9XVDek08s5ez7A01MUN-qT0sj6BCK7l-9tEB0oNtEjwsQ2Nc6spnOjQLTM9bmM9KywidSC7XhdaHyNg42qguOcBGRUAtrG)

**This special pledge reads:

**
* I believe in the four pillars of American society: faith, liberty, community, and life
* I know these pillars are the foundation for the greatest, freest nation the world has ever seen
* I will help promote and preserve these cornerstones to secure the United States as a beacon of hope and freedom for generations to come
* As 2023 nears, I'm ready to strengthen the bonds that hold our country together by promoting conservative, common-sense solutions to the challenges facing our country

[**If these words reflect what you want for our country in 2023 and beyond, please join me in taking this special pledge today.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6653287bc06b4da7809fd5c1f1c97ae8&_e=aSp5uHGhghraQ5I6bvrcC8KtUlfjDrfPGHDjHAhQ5984sAgK78M97KA0kmN14HCfoWh_iU3FaEkw40cYJqx6BWBq9OHSinShsr4RtfswvxgpEz6KH66BZOuLpCIYWjc_QJPHQbcyca_CxKdNrQ2Wf3amvLGfTRmUnouXCudHKOWDEU_8a3G-OXZmYe-XExu7cfI-6y4HIwUqNnFEQJhboBZ-sMLcmqrslv3ihhd2iWFVET_QRyegAL6jzOPYklw4teMFctNjV0e1VGpgWMVxcgG8FMcRiiG2cv8Ba_N0mB18PjKaIjLsJd4i2AYY834f5vwFqOaar-rY9KgXc83s1yzHEeDBv3v9eaLB6FYaGPUX_s5JpUbiB_ie1k11bcNQ)

This is a critical time to advance freedom in America--so let's head into 2023 with a full head of steam by reminding ourselves, together, of what really matters.

The fight for liberty is more crucial than ever, even if more liberty-minded leaders were sent to Congress. We must remain vigilant in our fight.

You can take this value-affirming pledge now by clicking the secure link below:

[**https://offers.americancornerstone.org/four-pillars-pledge/**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6653287bc06b4da7809fd5c1f1c97ae8&_e=aSp5uHGhghraQ5I6bvrcC8KtUlfjDrfPGHDjHAhQ5984sAgK78M97KA0kmN14HCfoWh_iU3FaEkw40cYJqx6BWBq9OHSinShsr4RtfswvxgpEz6KH66BZOuLpCIYWjc_QJPHQbcyca_CxKdNrQ2Wf3amvLGfTRmUnouXCudHKOWDEU_8a3G-OXZmYe-XExu7cfI-6y4HIwUqNnFEQJhboBZ-sMLcmqrslv3ihhd2iWF1bf-yFCF2B6Dug_ZvDq9DKWInUlfmnNeSmIipAj20WuMN3dvEBLmvYXQxQeenAyBab_A919nQC8k_Xi4tSexP1-igHKdMPQC0XPlIFzrhmGurgf-gBao6KMTnNAeftLX_wJCKEVjaujHHHjIz7vte)

I've already completed mine--and I hope you'll join me on the list of patriots who are pledging their support for the guiding values that make our nation so exceptional.

May God bless you and your family throughout the holidays.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.
---
|

---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Peaceful Protester Christopher Worrell committed no crimes on January 6th. He simply exercised his First Amendment right to free speech, along with thousands of other patriots outside the Capitol building.

But he was arrested anyway and thrown into the infamous D.C. jail that’s torturing and abusing patriots as I write you this urgent email.

**Christopher was jailed with stage 1 cancer, a non-Hodgkin’s lymphoma. Prescription medication kept it in remission. But it grew aggressively into stage 3 cancer over eight months, because the D.C. jail doctors REFUSED to let him take his medications...and REFUSED to let him see an oncologist!**

The abuse Christopher endured was so bad, that a federal judge finally ordered him to be released from jail based on an investigation by the U.S. Marshals.

Christopher is back home now, but he’s been in and out of the hospital. He’s in very bad shape, even after five rounds of chemotherapy.

Christopher’s fiancée, Trish, went public about the outrageous violation of his human rights on Tucker Carlson’s show recently.

**And when Tucker asked her if any politicians were coming to their aid, Trish said, “They’re ignoring us.”**

So, the D.C. jail is torturing and abusing peaceful protesters...blocking lifesaving medical care...and no one on Capitol Hill is helping them!

**If the Department of Justice and the D.C. jail can persecute and destroy the health of a peaceful protester for simply speaking up outside the Capitol building on January 6th, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.**

That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.**

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Canceling student debt means:

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b00c958ec4fc400ba596b7a5fd1002d7&_e=sr21NJ-1uyw-PDbgklcRKiKQonqSUUXuSL0nXmhu3Slg0cDlNEhNCDnt4U7jX1ousYom94iqZCyLlSqA8uhVqmIwHXpy6HlxvbFkv9GGCp_mBBnhXBEwtU7JunLha2YAPj3KvEyYIaPKpTKK2xUp8HxKXGi8doqlxr4k5XsrRgz_xnYxk_twwIeFdCOau01yNjNjIkdpmgu3PDFFiQKdkkMLtJb2vYMi99-F9EZ5HGEz7gBCkc8RYL5FUEOG608yZ0Dc4K3JzU1c9mkrdCwI0nunack3jMdQwSC8L9-q1PA%3D)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b00c958ec4fc400ba596b7a5fd1002d7&_e=sr21NJ-1uyw-PDbgklcRKiKQonqSUUXuSL0nXmhu3Slg0cDlNEhNCDnt4U7jX1ousYom94iqZCyLlSqA8uhVqmIwHXpy6HlxvbFkv9GGCp_mBBnhXBEwtU7JunLha2YAPj3KvEyYIaPKpTKK2xUp8O_MMviwZ4xhErWaz8MNEGYTBMZY750FjtV7_3hyKepDiN7-eJkzjzZNJpZFDfl9wKTXVe-z0CPO6jHmt4Ll8_78btO59FYZK7PUEGkM2FIZghVZU7Rl32aG5AmrCR5mYqO2bAE9B8StzJ1dsB2vjNY%3D)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b00c958ec4fc400ba596b7a5fd1002d7&_e=sr21NJ-1uyw-PDbgklcRKiKQonqSUUXuSL0nXmhu3Slg0cDlNEhNCDnt4U7jX1ousYom94iqZCyLlSqA8uhVqmIwHXpy6HlxvbFkv9GGCp_mBBnhXBEwtU7JunLha2YAPj3KvEyYIaPKpTKK2xUp8KxF5ts0U8vHLzDkG3-Cm9uNyP2rj3mEfR_sUw6mR6OfKi4YCb5VGoIGD-czye0OFo4HGn136xI0mVYXXzr7ElSv3osGa4hUUd4CHC6IEBcWNKXEl9e6xiFvIxNPK9wzyIn4Jptvh386u2bNyfnCrhI%3D)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b00c958ec4fc400ba596b7a5fd1002d7&_e=sr21NJ-1uyw-PDbgklcRKiKQonqSUUXuSL0nXmhu3Slg0cDlNEhNCDnt4U7jX1ousYom94iqZCyLlSqA8uhVqmIwHXpy6HlxvbFkv9GGCp_mBBnhXBEwtU7JunLha2YAPj3KvEyYIaPKpTKK2xUp8KO6ASMc5Y-h4-fZ6KMSH6e5hvvOl0Q8pA1Y44QwCrkscyPYA86-aEKH0lob5rK4crNSyKnTSAF3qN_kDf1kVvYpoi2ymoaNxhrU9gtPbL8eEwwoh0LaWx_O51d-dWJE9mz_N-tk6ow0r88BIL5c9NA%3D)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b00c958ec4fc400ba596b7a5fd1002d7&_e=sr21NJ-1uyw-PDbgklcRKiKQonqSUUXuSL0nXmhu3Slg0cDlNEhNCDnt4U7jX1ousYom94iqZCyLlSqA8uhVqmIwHXpy6HlxvbFkv9GGCp_mBBnhXBEwtU7JunLha2YAPj3KvEyYIaPKpTKK2xUp8Dq2Yvy9rAAu9qvktBwfL90Ii5WHn1cgLJdNEu4F4Q1H-NZuau9t03kyrF_-czI_-BqjT7rt8YbTSffAJMAkkHigcZgZtDDEkgZzY_9bHuNPevb-Kp_i979M14dK9fuIZivrFGYnWMYOXt07jkFYMTQ%3D)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b00c958ec4fc400ba596b7a5fd1002d7&_e=sr21NJ-1uyw-PDbgklcRKiKQonqSUUXuSL0nXmhu3Slg0cDlNEhNCDnt4U7jX1ousYom94iqZCyLlSqA8uhVqmIwHXpy6HlxvbFkv9GGCp_mBBnhXBEwtU7JunLha2YAPj3KvEyYIaPKpTKK2xUp8GIAPhGukdstkYamx9TFALjUzB3yBrTPithfFxmUzz-0s1bddHplDiQAliyJ7sKjHx6XA-Oy4O6yxEKUTZ8SKswyoXLr7HmVcx4sN9DqNi6vBKYBnEUIMWtmQAtiwjG5-ZV1dyXsjGmwz3DvJkGyem4%3D)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b00c958ec4fc400ba596b7a5fd1002d7&_e=sr21NJ-1uyw-PDbgklcRKiKQonqSUUXuSL0nXmhu3Slg0cDlNEhNCDnt4U7jX1ousYom94iqZCyLlSqA8uhVqmIwHXpy6HlxvbFkv9GGCp_mBBnhXBEwtU7JunLha2YAPj3KvEyYIaPKpTKK2xUp8POm2Meo1Th8BiSb1u9Q3M5QpuQBxM_xGnhmcPeUKeh0LWHezZL1DECsUynf-1SX28LeGDoZvUOr4Vz9FvT9lLHKcHwL4JqRFz0SZE4b5TDMTJijK3d7g_YaSmCOrndQ76hFoSipRyG57RheM4Do4p8%3D)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b00c958ec4fc400ba596b7a5fd1002d7&_e=sr21NJ-1uyw-PDbgklcRKiKQonqSUUXuSL0nXmhu3Slg0cDlNEhNCDnt4U7jX1ousYom94iqZCyLlSqA8uhVqmIwHXpy6HlxvbFkv9GGCp_mBBnhXBEwtU7JunLha2YAPj3KvEyYIaPKpTKK2xUp8F0LkDeQSfymoIcvLklS1u1ra5MFfT0GeMsakEcicLTrbp31ObvIauwAM9L1uTO8bh53Zym08visDi9QJ1e56vwRVLP1BIj9V8_Mb9gqjQD6NI4KmvIj-cxbQskuuTv7T4Lp-luBUSgDsdgzSRQQiVs%3D)

What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b00c958ec4fc400ba596b7a5fd1002d7&_e=sr21NJ-1uyw-PDbgklcRKiKQonqSUUXuSL0nXmhu3Slg0cDlNEhNCDnt4U7jX1ousYom94iqZCyLlSqA8uhVqmIwHXpy6HlxvbFkv9GGCp_mBBnhXBEwtU7JunLha2YAbvSCbzoJLrWn6U624ZYkHSz9zN1362RZyuDqAjnhf1ejDVeI7ZbRbh-GAgKeo1PAr_EnYVwBREBtq4V9MnRsOQvQm5I_SuaqEUQnJ7e5LlDfl5AtloXHNJhP140k4fJVc_oSyEy3z3nMgNZ-aRJgQg5ZnmgSkSyU3SXizbNovI8%3D)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b00c958ec4fc400ba596b7a5fd1002d7&_e=sr21NJ-1uyw-PDbgklcRKiKQonqSUUXuSL0nXmhu3Slg0cDlNEhNCDnt4U7jX1ousYom94iqZCyLlSqA8uhVqmIwHXpy6HlxvbFkv9GGCp_mBBnhXBEwtU7JunLha2YAlGYzNMwJP9-sUKm-oon323KOHkzjUZgzFiCvw7o5Vw1uiJ-teAfufT0fVNlFYfcyAnKbCPcS8vWxzDXxB89KmX6oQ4OnzTO-GelAOgr-wRc4RYAPpfQFWCQsMHh9Z-8FamK8rmP-WXOLKlGnXECoCADK9F19Q4EUmDIKssqGe2E%3D)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b00c958ec4fc400ba596b7a5fd1002d7&_e=sr21NJ-1uyw-PDbgklcRKiKQonqSUUXuSL0nXmhu3Slg0cDlNEhNCDnt4U7jX1ousYom94iqZCyLlSqA8uhVqmIwHXpy6HlxvbFkv9GGCp_mBBnhXBEwtU7JunLha2YAyX55wuoHnz1GcCYZE3gUhBaEeqiEW1_L2WAw04GzghlZ3DftKMwb60111Uvljp583-LiHOHhyGOV4S4l1WHjjxGVZ69bKH3GlhLP0WtnbZwN87iyO6iTnVsVU35hO9CI4NH6RN5vNfb3C2XgtuYj9fEqLZC6oxjqkjL9qz8oYQA%3D)

[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b00c958ec4fc400ba596b7a5fd1002d7&_e=sr21NJ-1uyw-PDbgklcRKiKQonqSUUXuSL0nXmhu3Slg0cDlNEhNCDnt4U7jX1ousYom94iqZCyLlSqA8uhVqmIwHXpy6HlxvbFkv9GGCp_mBBnhXBEwtU7JunLha2YALjfQnUoiGvidGF79KuEqsabxcoed9e7dbcxLVDBkgmIRgYB2NIgxPpOXHEldki8C7uEPFEjVrUo2n-lGzxSPutnEGaCRX1oMXdAnpuz428yYT2GK9dPlA-GWyQtZ1rpvY55SOOYes7U-T3LcR-H1IQlg65FIS3DDwlV828HyI6e0opwLvb5-wj78REZOSlcQ)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b00c958ec4fc400ba596b7a5fd1002d7&_e=sr21NJ-1uyw-PDbgklcRKiKQonqSUUXuSL0nXmhu3Slg0cDlNEhNCDnt4U7jX1ousYom94iqZCyLlSqA8uhVqmIwHXpy6HlxvbFkv9GGCp_mBBnhXBEwtU7JunLha2YAC60Fgu5mEQ4QurEcdkijgeASgf7iSZ6izJRzHLCiBzbjmkVNlQroIH8tEIrTjtQDRHyVXKgVFQl8b67auLByDUX3nITVasfrDmHBYme925u3B0t4sKS48HvkQh8W2BkCpT1rm0_vKGXkZPAD1OLlsLMy_c2Igu46PGFY85wFt3YT6ieTxUN6CfepXskW5QTN)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

[_**Please consider making the most generous donation you can today by clicking here.**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b00c958ec4fc400ba596b7a5fd1002d7&_e=sr21NJ-1uyw-PDbgklcRKiKQonqSUUXuSL0nXmhu3Slg0cDlNEhNCDnt4U7jX1ousYom94iqZCyLlSqA8uhVqmIwHXpy6HlxvbFkv9GGCp_mBBnhXBEwtU7JunLha2YAPj3KvEyYIaPKpTKK2xUp8E2qFY8p1S4OhT7ezUqwZngXWCrzcwPlzNvMsHCDecyXongyvx6wY1lAJYATIH1ur7ENcTsfyeekdwjJbB42FOjEl-9cUqFk98DdA8qBajIQ-rj2E2rOlJo6GV8r23BY7QoIVZ-IPfrkmq-gmGgf6AE%3D)

Thank you, Friend.

Candace Owens

The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause. Thank you, Friend. Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation Sent to Full Mag News subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: Why I created the BLEXIT Foundation
body:
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a7fe37d8f08a4b2aad9346dcc825fb5a&_e=nIkd7QdYB792Calr2Ht3utrqfDVOy3d9nFU-u5kkKLJ3lqWaeY1-eI3ORpEN712tmuNZWeuglo7EBbmruyK4FD002_IBoRmYGm69VOMkOTXqRN1HLbghMD8fSE7i_-F1v-CzcOlp9Yvc9bRYCE2k_RBnnT-qZ9B-7MlN4Lv3Pe2ZqRSVrNRZlbyKA2pXwYezWqWreEbeJVhzhnAMCuWe7ivXT4QQzIdax8vU9b3omnNLwhKve2LW_IJELR0mPU6SFMP1RBx8-B9mWvOu4-taMxTnMw6E2JKYljiD-ZBXYUY%3D)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America’s black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation’s mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a7fe37d8f08a4b2aad9346dcc825fb5a&_e=nIkd7QdYB792Calr2Ht3utrqfDVOy3d9nFU-u5kkKLJ3lqWaeY1-eI3ORpEN712tmuNZWeuglo7EBbmruyK4FD002_IBoRmYGm69VOMkOTXqRN1HLbghMD8fSE7i_-F1v-CzcOlp9Yvc9bRYCE2k_Rfc7Z-ivWmBC-B4TqCGZGOA6kcG-pyTay49DoyLbFpcpfu-bPv2_JludN5VgJ_Zz2LEg3PonUvVvbJelpmHP9anJuBFMbegMSa2JIvRHudTvrGhm_Yq70xpNzk-pFZfDTL04gnE_EsOftzPS_WkfXs%3D)

**_Now I’ll share my story_ ... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how “helpless” I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We’re taught to believe we’re victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I’ve dealt with racism... _**I’ve even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a7fe37d8f08a4b2aad9346dcc825fb5a&_e=nIkd7QdYB792Calr2Ht3utrqfDVOy3d9nFU-u5kkKLJ3lqWaeY1-eI3ORpEN712tmuNZWeuglo7EBbmruyK4FD002_IBoRmYGm69VOMkOTXqRN1HLbghMD8fSE7i_-F1v-CzcOlp9Yvc9bRYCE2k_V5JVxa8dYiIKhNt5d4iJ2LgyxnqegrCUbGmTNmQUD5pjtzjf4Jts5QN0yexMPwhBiLqE6PpVSq7wEWR2Sx6oNJibQixm_QyAUU3qIsfKjuVzbpTbCrudGysJm0dyT_KxnYG6x9ubb9sIBPGO7FQUUM%3D)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I’m not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don’t want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a “think tank”, but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting “DO-tank”. We’re doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation’s values, what we’re doing to reach Black communities, and what we’re fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly “fighting for minorities” are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT’s efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a7fe37d8f08a4b2aad9346dcc825fb5a&_e=nIkd7QdYB792Calr2Ht3utrqfDVOy3d9nFU-u5kkKLJ3lqWaeY1-eI3ORpEN712tmuNZWeuglo7EBbmruyK4FD002_IBoRmYGm69VOMkOTXqRN1HLbghMD8fSE7i_-F1v-CzcOlp9Yvc9bRYCE2k_dY0KioeURjdiBw1vM__tjOhHAhnjTQW9UqxpPT9YBQzU0kIZbS7L6zXSZk4bkBRB6mY7JAxAxY-BMAEiSyQqMK3hF-jZnhqeX87BxbgE-olTJmGt8wUdZ5N-lVZw3yiLkPUhoEwov8b21o7v3Xc2wU%3D)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a7fe37d8f08a4b2aad9346dcc825fb5a&_e=nIkd7QdYB792Calr2Ht3utrqfDVOy3d9nFU-u5kkKLJ3lqWaeY1-eI3ORpEN712tmuNZWeuglo7EBbmruyK4FD002_IBoRmYGm69VOMkOTXqRN1HLbghMD8fSE7i_-F1v-CzcOlp9Yvc9bRYCE2k_dpSJJtG0ORAUPtOzkjx9fR3NVA3BpmESTvpNBp8znaHM-rZTMtmKgFQMwZWzQSgPBH2G6beOWYItMIqQteonbbn16ajQp5ZmnEYsqfHFHKZ-mBkgcDt4Cbh7WTO9KjfMoErrIjvig9BqzxcqNhTLHE%3D)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we’re actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a7fe37d8f08a4b2aad9346dcc825fb5a&_e=nIkd7QdYB792Calr2Ht3utrqfDVOy3d9nFU-u5kkKLJ3lqWaeY1-eI3ORpEN712tmuNZWeuglo7EBbmruyK4FD002_IBoRmYGm69VOMkOTXqRN1HLbghMD8fSE7i_-F1v-CzcOlp9Yvc9bRYCE2k_RpwShuLwqujc-FbASFAB5ALscHnHgrHl_1MHZnPdNKbknmijlhty23zHwX8sCNbbaQPDsMDc_pqrCp09c7fx65GgMZdg2GCZKEREZgEY83h1GwXPQ1dP6RiIIFlbNnDIk9F38juiyMt93EnxsMf1to%3D)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a7fe37d8f08a4b2aad9346dcc825fb5a&_e=nIkd7QdYB792Calr2Ht3utrqfDVOy3d9nFU-u5kkKLJ3lqWaeY1-eI3ORpEN712tmuNZWeuglo7EBbmruyK4FD002_IBoRmYGm69VOMkOTXqRN1HLbghMD8fSE7i_-F1v-CzcOlp9Yvc9bRYCE2k_Zkk8gzuf12b3hxYcdzXV5IBXDUyYpCEiXqTc9TEAJukSIMujZ2228GG7osWmkE05y4HeSsVV_5CWgopsaNABelyUvZxcMc7B10XlZiJeApePqBOoqw7RowR2XZXrUTj3s-afoovmOLSyoOw_7ljjpA%3D)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we’ve allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We’re hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We’re not just preaching to the choir, and these aren’t boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT’s events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a7fe37d8f08a4b2aad9346dcc825fb5a&_e=nIkd7QdYB792Calr2Ht3utrqfDVOy3d9nFU-u5kkKLJ3lqWaeY1-eI3ORpEN712tmuNZWeuglo7EBbmruyK4FD002_IBoRmYGm69VOMkOTXqRN1HLbghMD8fSE7i_-F1v-CzcOlp9Yvc9bRYCE2k_Tj1nXgYRsMIPy9hRToodbq4EBh8XcHtLZtP3_nTXhcTYqkEkdf15_of0TSPRLCCTnIFOpnhUSl7vEBbn6J55d4NxzFlKAhDAh5NM7T3WljY_ortV6RaraYh9PWEL9Z_RaN_Hv7We-0SxELpCMnzjbk%3D)

What does “BLEXIT” mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I’ve copied below to donate today:

clean_body: Friend, This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation. For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop. In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America’s black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. Now I’ll share my story ... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities. Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how “helpless” I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking. We’re taught to believe we’re victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals. This is WRONG. I’ve dealt with racism... I’ve even received death threats. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable. But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up. I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. I am breaking the rules. It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... I’m not doing that. You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country. So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don’t want to miss). When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a “think tank”, but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting “DO-tank”. We’re doing things no other organization in the country is doing. Here are the BLEXIT Foundation’s values, what we’re doing to reach Black communities, and what we’re fighting for: School Choice: Often, the people allegedly “fighting for minorities” are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools. The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. Criminal Justice Reform: The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities. Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message. Entrepreneurship: I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire. BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we’re actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. Teaching History: Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we’ve allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore. The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We’re hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We’re not just preaching to the choir, and these aren’t boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. What does “BLEXIT” mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor. This is personal to me. I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I’ve copied below to donate today: This is my last message to you before you close this email. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment. My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause. Thank you, Friend. Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: =?utf-8?Q?Illinois=20Review?=
subject: ALERT: Conservative news update
body:
The Illinois Republican Party was not neutral during the primary for governor, and this should serve as “cause” for removing Don Tracy from Chair.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/3ef4ffab19b2/alert-conservative-news-update?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=13b1906fa4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_26_09_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-13b1906fa4-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

The Big Lie: How Don Tracy and the IL GOP Supported Democrat Richard Irvin's Gubernatorial Primary Campaign (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/the-big-lie-how-don-tracy-and-the-il-gop-supported-democrat-richard-irvins-primary-campaign.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=13b1906fa4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_26_09_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-13b1906fa4-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

In a February 22, 2022 article (https://www.theillinoize.com/articles/some-gop-operatives-believe-irvin?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=13b1906fa4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_26_09_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-13b1906fa4-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) about the Richard Irvin campaign taking over the IL GOP, chairman Don Tracy was initially not available for a comment. But shortly after the article went live, Tracy changed his mind, and offered this to say,
“The Illinois Republican Party has been neutral and will always be neutral (https://www.theillinoize.com/articles/some-gop-operatives-believe-irvin?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=13b1906fa4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_26_09_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-13b1906fa4-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) in the GOP primary for governor. Any accusation that we are coordinating with a particular campaign is absolutely false and I find it personally offensive to suggest otherwise.”

Tracy then concluded,
“It is our duty as the state party to focus on and take the fight to Gov. Pritzker on a daily basis. I’m proud of our efforts. All Republicans and every campaign at every level should be pointing out how Pritzker is a disaster for our state.”

But this statement by Tracy is a lie, and the IL GOP never was neutral during the GOP primary for governor.

============================================================
** (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/the-big-lie-how-don-tracy-and-the-il-gop-supported-democrat-richard-irvins-primary-campaign.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=13b1906fa4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_26_09_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-13b1906fa4-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
Democratic Speaker of the House Michael J. Madigan, left, and House Republican Leader Jim Durkin talk at the State Capitol in Springfield on May 30, 2019. (Zbigniew Bzdak | Chicago Tribune via AP)

In ** exclusive audio (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/exclusive-audio-don-tracy-admits-irvin-campaign-used-il-gop-postage-discount-during-primary.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=13b1906fa4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_26_09_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-13b1906fa4-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
recently obtained by Illinois Review, Tracy admitted during a July meeting with conservative leaders that the Irvin campaign for governor was allowed to use the IL GOP postage discount for mailers – a perk not afforded to other candidates for governor during the primary.

Using the IL GOP postage discount can save a statewide campaign tens of thousands of dollars on mailers – a unique perk for the Irvin campaign considering billionaire Ken Griffin’s support and $50 million.

Tracy acknowledges use of the postage discount in the recording, but says the IL GOP was taking its “direction from the House Caucus and the Senate Caucus.”

In other words, Tracy is merely a puppet taking orders from House GOP Minority leader Jim Durkin and Senate GOP Minority leader Dan McConchie.

A pitiful and astonishing admission from the Chairman of the Republican Party of Illinois.

Durkin was an early supporter of the Irvin campaign and was highlighted on the original
** endorsement list (https://www.politico.com/f/?id=0000017e-6d5c-dbc8-a1ff-7d7dbf990000&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=13b1906fa4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_26_09_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-13b1906fa4-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
.

McConchie didn’t officially endorse Irvin, but he praised him in an interview with
** reporter Mark Maxwell (https://www.wcia.com/illinois-capitol-news/irvin-scores-60-gop-endorsements-as-financial-filings-show-early-warning-signs-in-bailey-campaign/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=13b1906fa4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_26_09_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-13b1906fa4-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
the day after Irvin entered the race.

“He’s the only candidate that is from the suburbs,” and serving as mayor in a town where he grew up, “I think that’s a great story,” said McConchie during the interview.

Although Tracy didn’t officially endorse Irvin during the primary, his
** personal donation records (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/exclusive-audio-don-tracy-admits-irvin-campaign-used-il-gop-postage-discount-during-primary.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=13b1906fa4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_26_09_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-13b1906fa4-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
show that he only contributed to candidates aligned with Irvin’s campaign.

And in a document shared exclusively with
** Illinois Review (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/don-tracy-appoints-nimish-jani-who-rigged-lake-county-straw-poll-for-irvin-to-il-gop-executive-committee.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=13b1906fa4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_26_09_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-13b1906fa4-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
, it was recently revealed that in September, Tracy appointed new members of the IL GOP Executive Committee – and besides including current state central committee members, Tracy made three more additional appointments including Nimish Jani, who appears to have ** rigged (https://lakecountygazette.com/stories/627225206-reporter-asks-irvin-nimish-jani-did-you-promise-him-a-place-on-your-cabinet-to-bus-in-indian-senior-citizens?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=13b1906fa4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_26_09_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-13b1906fa4-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
the Lake County Republican straw poll by bussing in Indian-American senior citizens in favor of Richard Irvin.

DuPage County board member Jim Zay and Sangamon County Administrator Brad Mills were the other two appointments.

And what do
** Zay (https://capitolfax.com/2022/01/18/irvin-rolls-out-over-60-gop-endorsements/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=13b1906fa4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_26_09_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-13b1906fa4-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
and ** Mills (https://myemail.constantcontact.com/Growing-List-of-GOP-Leaders-Across-Illinois-Join-Irvin-Bourne-Campaign-as-Co-Chairs-.html?soid=1138421113912&aid=du7jpsQIDKQ&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=13b1906fa4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_26_09_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-13b1906fa4-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
have in common? They both endorsed Irvin for governor.

In May, it was revealed in
** first quarter campaign filings (https://prairiestatewire.com/stories/625874805-illinois-state-board-of-elections-irvin-campaign-spent-11-9-million-in-first-quarter?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=13b1906fa4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_26_09_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-13b1906fa4-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
that the Irvin campaign spent over $546,000 on payroll including staffers and political consultants. The filings also revealed a direct connection to Tracy and the IL GOP.

>From January 2019 to January 2020, Derek Murphy served as Executive Director of the IL GOP. In January 2022, Murphy joined the Irvin campaign as Deputy Campaign Manager.

>From January 2020 to January 2022, Anthony Sarros served as Executive Director of the IL GOP. In January 2022, Sarros joined the Irvin campaign as Senior Political Director.

On February 9, 2021, Tracy was elected chairman of the Illinois Republican Party – meaning Sarros was his top deputy and closest confidante before resigning his position as Executive Director of the IL GOP and taking a role with the Irvin campaign.

It was also revealed that the Irvin campaign hired Elaine “Eleni” Demertzis, House GOP Minority leader Jim Durkin’s spokesperson since 2017; Jon Nelson, former senior staffer to Senate GOP Minority leader Dan McConchie, who interestingly is also a former Durkin staffer; and John Fogarty, the longtime general counsel to the Illinois Republican Party.

Fogarty serving as general counsel to Tracy and the IL GOP, and paid legal advisor to the Irvin campaign certainly presents the potential of a conflict of interest.

It also once again proves Tracy’s earlier statement that the IL GOP was neutral during the GOP primary for governor as a total lie.

The Illinois Republican Party was not neutral during the primary for governor, and this should serve as “cause” for removing Tracy and other senior IL GOP leaders from their positions within the party.

Tracy is either a liar or incompetent. Or both.

Either way, he’s lost the trust of Republicans in Illinois – especially the grassroots, and it’s time for him to plan his exit.
To learn more about Illinois Review, visit ** www.illinoisreview.com (https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=13b1906fa4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_26_09_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-13b1906fa4-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** Twitter (http://www.twitter.com/illinoisreview?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=13b1906fa4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_26_09_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-13b1906fa4-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** Facebook (http://www.facebook.com/illinois.review?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=13b1906fa4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_26_09_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-13b1906fa4-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** Website (https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=13b1906fa4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_26_09_22&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-13b1906fa4-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

name: American Update
subject: Studying his accomplishments is needed
body:
You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, “Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,” on DVD. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0247%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=%2bSdUW3OkoqlhTR9MJLOhqw&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44792%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BFOgFi6vJ9MJszVd24OYQg&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,”** on DVD. Thousands of people have enjoyed this in-depth course online since its release, _**and now you can add it to your personal library or give it as a gift.**_ In recent years Winston Churchill, who is best known for his leadership during World War II, has been portrayed in numerous films and television shows, proving without a doubt that Americans find the “British Bulldog” captivating. The reasons for this sustained interest in Churchill are profound. No statesman has better diagnosed the threat of modern technology; no statesman has spoken more effectively in opposition to socialism; and, no statesman has displayed more courage in the face of tyranny. It should come as little surprise that so many “academics” and activists are working to smear his legacy, which makes studying a true account of Churchill’s accomplishments more important than ever. **For precisely this reason, I am so excited to offer you this powerful DVD set:** **_[https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44793%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TP8CezJdtBq3432BFD3g9Q&sysid=1)_** As a student of Dr. Arnn myself, I know that his lectures on Churchill will teach you more about this subject than any of the many books and videos available to you, and they will reveal profound lessons that can be applied to the urgent problems of today. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44792%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BFOgFi6vJ9MJszVd24OYQg&sysid=1) Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you’ll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift--before they’re gone. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship** ” on DVD: _[**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44794%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Yu%2fbjZrLMroctupezNMaWQ&sysid=1)_ You’ll undoubtedly enjoy this close study of Churchill’s words and deeds.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College |
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0247%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=%2bSdUW3OkoqlhTR9MJLOhqw&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0247%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=%2bSdUW3OkoqlhTR9MJLOhqw&sysid=1)

name: Freedom First Project

Friend,

**Thanks to you, we protected and WON this seat! **

NY-11 is moving forward with conservative leadership from Congresswoman Malliotakis, and we're all eager to get to work.

**Are you ready to join us in continuing to make NY-11 the best place to live, work, raise a family, and start a business in New York?**
**We want to make sure you 're on our team. Now that we've made it to victory, we need you more than ever. **

****[If you haven't already joined us, please sign up today to be a member of Team Malliotakis. We'd love to have you. ](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=1f891ce6e0404c64a2ebc03c8a516421&_e=FHjZqgQ53arqAUC-FCD2VXJNQsiyH-mCKTaslJU3V1gPcUvZgZsYp2MIi00BR08scK7Ab1Tit3H_7TPCJE2pvzu3ejgsJENMquTB8ScHjCPUPLT-Hj1w_O-7N1RrFaMvlk4PaW_tN9t1CdYJx270zXXLWaRchvhmKoymizh7aEoDcEE15_s8MNXru0j9MczNdq80hgPY_fm3rvQvrIs8Ad9j2x_FdoskHvMgwYp4HbV-ibAWDsPPh9tU0zCDWm9b8dAw6Tl9BK9FEmeIZh-lY_-jxKn7GW37P8VOGSO1X63hXmxp8Kriupa42bGA95fi6JSigrUj5mnSXOpswn64OXhNzNdciEQQtuYjW5yKKL4AC6Zy2xA9s2PBqgEkjCCEOWVQ5vfD719p1YWn9qfqEEOiiFw1b2Fk6WvgvorjrPcDANU60rSGH8xfRQmEZG86Bnk88kyqDNOrbMyTAXDWwuq-xzlAJPu7jaRzUPzsNk7i5pzis1F4FurAR23DX5kx)** **

subject: Soros fellows are ruining our media
body:
| | |
---
Peter, Notorious globalist billionaire George Soros has gone on the record declaring himself a God and promising an audience at the World Economic Forum that the New World Order are making the necessary preparations to completely and utterly obliterate freedom in the USA.It’s now come out that George Soros, through his foundations, has paid at least 469 mainstream media journalists throughout the COVID-19 pandemic. These aren’t small sums of money either. It’s been reported that sums of anywhere from $63,000 to $85,000 have been paid out to promote his agenda to the masses.And what is his agenda, you may ask?An agenda that HATES freedom, HATES America and HATES YOU!Nothing proved this more than the COVID-19 pandemic, where Soros stood alongside those infringing on our freedoms and promoting medical tyranny. **He supported them as did Bill Gates and many other billionaires - but who stood with us?**
| [HELP THE Z FREEDOM FOUNDATION FIGHT BACK AGAINST MEDICAL TYRANNY!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=c1e13c7b12&e=fdefed58de)
---
Dr. Zev Zelenko was one of the lone voices who stepped up right from day one of this medically induced tyranny and called it out. His "Zelenko Protocol" saved millions and millions of Americans. He was one of the leaders of the medical freedom movement, showing us how truly important our bodily autonomy was.**He was UNAFRAID to call out George Soros by name. Now that he’s not here, we have to carry that fight on.**
With Zev’s passing, the Zelenko Freedom Foundation has been busy establishing the fundamentals per the IRS code, so that we may accept donations from people who want to support the vision and mission of Dr. Zelenko’s legacy. His legacy and the work he was doing to end medical tyranny **MUST** carry on - and that is our job.
| [DONATE NOW AND HELP US CARRY ON HIS LEGACY!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=aafd4970ec&e=fdefed58de)
---
Via his non-profit the Open Society Foundations (OSF), Soros is pumping cash to the media in the form of fellowships, or “Soros Justice Fellowships.”Well, we’re going to directly counter that crap with your help. We’ve set up Zelenko Fellowships, where we are going to help support the up & coming leaders of the **MEDICAL FREEDOM** movement. There is NO organization that supports freedom that does that - so WE need to be the ones to start.We cannot continue to complain about what these Leftist organizations do but not counteract it with ACTION. Your support of our mission is what will make us successful. I have decided to devote my life to carrying on Zev's mission. We must NEVER allow our medical autonomy to be stripped from us again. We must never become a nation of medical tyranny... BUT WE ARE ALREADY WELL ON OUR WAY!

Together, we can stand up against the powers trying to destroy us and ensure that big pharma's power over us comes to an end.**We can't wait on others, we must do it ourselves.****Your donations will jumpstart our work and help us to truly affect change in the medical freedom space. We can’t do this without you — please click below and donate today!**

name: Lawrence W. Reed
subject: These teens are smarter than Joe Biden
body:
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=73eb79fc7b724d98b9515344365e0fe3&_e=Id-CXoLrv3_Pd3stTzwRGcAmdfemqmdhNtt8zbZfCHvwGZKgVm77Fp1LX2J2xq5pRbFmTTpnFsEpo8q1amIEoNzN9vjaNnVQCMfwOASyE2sKx-peJ9CAgCupgxpMavmp5Ji2eZmsDDqio2TSXOfIcoO5DzESk3y_K9NA0KgDzz9p_-zwEfiYx7xslS6oQ2RWcfJAE2UOaSElx3Pxir52L4esmLsHx9OKA2AwYp7GOZpUOdWCfEH3Dud2CODsyX6LBEgyj0JvvDjMn_c7PTziuHA_atiVIKWLHrbuIQGc3_eXZz2tDBDoeJ865kr1mjd-)

Hello Friend,

These teenagers are smarter than Biden.

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=73eb79fc7b724d98b9515344365e0fe3&_e=Id-CXoLrv3_Pd3stTzwRGcAmdfemqmdhNtt8zbZfCHvwGZKgVm77Fp1LX2J2xq5pRbFmTTpnFsEpo8q1amIEoNzN9vjaNnVQCMfwOASyE2sKx-peJ9CAgCupgxpMavmp5Ji2eZmsDDqio2TSXOfIcmXbJu2DidqGItNWoLU-aNb8oZOZOn-2-WPWgx6XG4PX-PMpvkgETI-kIgT0SGQx1BBkWICQ0hpz0cbEwZDYW1mkGFRikTXzw_BE5KU-xNjYhSOQpKNmzS8AOuSxq0M7tYcD51Q91ywM21suzfgKJ8re7wNf-suEA6akACDwqRKL)

_However, that isn 't saying a lot these days._

And after attending our FEE in the Classroom workshop, I dare say _these kids are smarter than 90% of the politicians in Congress too_.

How do I know? Because we taught them free market economics and the ideas behind the foundational concepts of a free society.

Let me introduce myself. I am Lawrence W. Reed, President Emeritus of the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE). FEE has educated over 54,000 students on the ideas of liberty and free market economics this year through **FEE in the Classroom. **

**And with your help, we can reach even more students next year. I 've set a goal to raise $25,000 by the end of the month to keep FEE in the Classroom free of charge for schools.**

[_**Can you join me in supporting these students with a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to send your gift >>>**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=73eb79fc7b724d98b9515344365e0fe3&_e=Id-CXoLrv3_Pd3stTzwRGcAmdfemqmdhNtt8zbZfCHvwGZKgVm77Fp1LX2J2xq5pRbFmTTpnFsEpo8q1amIEoNzN9vjaNnVQCMfwOASyE2sKx-peJ9CAgCupgxpMavmp5Ji2eZmsDDqio2TSXOfIcqp3vtl7yzxXuKzR4_r4zqIii9ZvyMKpJCm62jUNcd7SXzHhPbpqvJfldVyVjFPxovYbLLbTMdOnnpY9TMaaxwwVS6qKx2qRIFLi2goVU2D7hVTwQ4aXaewZxTh_ksHRBE5RZWlltGlm1AtcFBRa2a3KcG-jheygk9pQhgq5Ee20)

FEE in the Classroom directly engages students through our educational workshops.

Our classroom-savvy workshop instructors -- totaling more than 30 throughout the country -- cover topics such as individual liberty, free enterprise, limited government, personal responsibility, and entrepreneurship.

Afterward, we provide them with take-home materials, including the classic _I, Pencil_ by Leonard E. Read, FEE's Founder, and _Economics in One Lesson_ by Henry Hazlitt, _The Law_ by Frederick Bastiat, and the U.S. Constitution.

**With access to these additional resources, students are well-equipped to continue their liberty journey and remain engaged with FEE.**

Parents can no longer rely on schools to teach their children about these ideas, so we are reaching young people who might never have encountered them otherwise.

**That 's why our mission is crucial to the future of our country.**

[_**By teaching students about the principles of liberty and the free market,**__**you are giving them a gift that will last throughout their lifetime**_ _**. Please support FEE in the Classroom today >>>**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=73eb79fc7b724d98b9515344365e0fe3&_e=Id-CXoLrv3_Pd3stTzwRGcAmdfemqmdhNtt8zbZfCHvwGZKgVm77Fp1LX2J2xq5pRbFmTTpnFsEpo8q1amIEoNzN9vjaNnVQCMfwOASyE2sKx-peJ9CAgCupgxpMavmp5Ji2eZmsDDqio2TSXOfIcsK7puwagN2wlrcqELvTEKXsK5aLGxczYu-TvYOa7R2-8C_6mlfqXh6xDFACE0RszYFwIfWtpf8vP2XQEFqJCa6vj6fuHBE1apaUWLbsMhq2uLTPw0uVl6aT5aI60YqIuAfAq_ZwRurDe7LZ8kslCSyde2ucPAzBRnQyYd6n6l7l)

Before the collapse of the Soviet Empire, I smuggled books into Eastern European countries such as Poland and the Soviet Union itself.

I organized translations of and publications in Polish of works by Ludwig von Mises, F. A. Hayek, and others.

Today, we see indoctrination happening in American schools as socialists try to reinvigorate the disastrous and evil ideas of socialism. The only way to truly defeat these ideas isn't through bans but by offering our own ideas to counter them.

We defeated the Soviet Union. Now, we must defeat the socialists again.

Friend, can I count on you to join me in educating students on the ideas of liberty and free market economics? **Click below to help meet our goal of raising $25,000 by the end of the year.**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=73eb79fc7b724d98b9515344365e0fe3&_e=Id-CXoLrv3_Pd3stTzwRGcAmdfemqmdhNtt8zbZfCHvwGZKgVm77Fp1LX2J2xq5pRbFmTTpnFsEpo8q1amIEoNzN9vjaNnVQCMfwOASyE2sKx-peJ9CAgCupgxpMavmpmpgFlVLUZMHEgTM05bRrYkfpsLuNPYOf-Ga5Dzso19LVTneCNon7TpIiBC4R7oJaU1jrtQHtKLGzulRU6zkDvNGv3jHef39lsGOXO_ZAkOXCZ1Hgk7S-a7CPlaWnbhL1it3VDCgNrH5RjM6dZG_MaYafaGkBS_5rwBXQleiNLYhsFvkSMhBBXlXNKqXOS0fs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=73eb79fc7b724d98b9515344365e0fe3&_e=Id-CXoLrv3_Pd3stTzwRGcAmdfemqmdhNtt8zbZfCHvwGZKgVm77Fp1LX2J2xq5pRbFmTTpnFsEpo8q1amIEoNzN9vjaNnVQCMfwOASyE2sKx-peJ9CAgCupgxpMavmpmpgFlVLUZMHEgTM05bRrYqFW3wJMlRlswZtc2sI3FnHPhdnT8AqN8M0MhooWnMavCwQUHwg-OjHUlixQCkSMloQ0H0mH_VWyuNW4gdVUUiHjIbAXNq-sz8PjMuGtfG3E8kQUdNxIHnnINyZSObpogbyJLGqWN0zgjon4GAPFbYx8EWxGtMD9ntq2zB8zw_by)

name: Mark Kelly
subject: My final ask
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
I can’t thank you enough for all of the hard work you put into this campaign this year.
#

Friends —
December is the final FEC deadline month of the year. What that means is when it’s over, we’re legally required to report how much money we raised AND the number of donations we received online will also become public.
We’ve accomplished incredible things together, but we’ve got a little bit more work to do to close things out for 2022. Now, the amount of money we raise in these final days is important, but what’s even more critical is the number of people chipping in, because this has always been a big people-powered team.
Our goals are within reach and I’m confident we can get there if a few more people chip in before Saturday. This is the last ask you’ll get from me before the new year, so please:
[**Can you please make your first $3 contribution today? This is our final push and we need a lot of donations before we’re legally required to release our numbers.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-dec22.rUmYtQ&refcode=em221227-1-7&t=1&akid=4858%2E6688874%2E-y0Vmn)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1396?c0=mek-em-dec22.ncZFYp&refcode=em221227-1-7&t=20&akid=4858%2E6688874%2E-y0Vmn)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1397?c0=mek-em-dec22.0Vx0xY&refcode=em221227-1-7&t=21&akid=4858%2E6688874%2E-y0Vmn)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1390?c0=mek-em-dec22.bp2r7c&refcode=em221227-1-7&t=22&akid=4858%2E6688874%2E-y0Vmn)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1391?c0=mek-em-dec22.sXIIYK&refcode=em221227-1-7&t=23&akid=4858%2E6688874%2E-y0Vmn)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1392?c0=mek-em-dec22.-rtLE6&refcode=em221227-1-7&t=24&akid=4858%2E6688874%2E-y0Vmn)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1395?c0=mek-em-dec22.EmLmmj&refcode=em221227-1-7&t=25&akid=4858%2E6688874%2E-y0Vmn)**
---
****
I can’t thank you enough for all of the hard work you put into this campaign this year. We succeeded in winning again in Arizona and I know that it wouldn’t have been possible without you and everyone on this team.
I’m so thankful to be serving a full term as Arizona’s Senator and I look forward to working together with you to tackle all of the challenges that lie ahead in 2023 and beyond.
Let’s finish this year on a high note, and I look forward to catching up with you in the new year.
I hope you and your families have a safe and happy New Year.
My very best,
Mark Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: one of the most important decisions of my life
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
It’s not an easy choice, as you can imagine.
#

Peter -
This is one of the most important decisions of my life:
Do I keep my safe seat in Congress — a good job, and one I love — or do I risk it all to run against Senator Sinema.
It’s not an easy choice, as you can imagine.
If I do it, I’ll need to know the grassroots support is there.
If I do it, I’ll need to know we have the resources to run a winning campaign and withstand attacks from day one.
Our final FEC deadline before I make my decision ends this week. And I’m using it as a marker to answer the questions above.
I know our campaign is the best chance to keep a Republican from winning. But I know I cannot do it alone. So please.
[**Can you contribute $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to my campaign before our FEC fundraising deadline comes to a close this week? It adds up when we’re all chipping in.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=gallego-em-dec.PtsJUf&refcode=em221227-1-30&t=1&akid=235%2E734936%2EIUw9O2)

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: I’m taking the Four Pillars Pledge—will you?
body:
This is Dr. Ben Carson. As we approach the end of another year, I've been taking some time to reflect on all the things I have t
|
---
| | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zj1civjkthj912m64541d8g4f3p929a16fpi7vh0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chjm8oj4c5h2bs)
---
| Fellow Patriot,

This is Dr. Ben Carson. As we approach the end of another year, I've been taking some time to reflect on all the things I have to be grateful for. And this year, I'm especially grateful for patriots who are standing in defense of America's guiding values in 2022. [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zmgit9m6k8scupkk3m5gck44qe1p33o2qu0flkjo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chjm8oj4c5h2bs) So before you close out this email, [can you spare two quick minutes to join me in signing your name to our special Four Pillars Pledge?](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z6qh1jvl4e58g9dbh44m6boj4fjcqovkgotsj35g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chjm8oj4c5h2bs)

This pledge will affirm your support for America's guiding values and will help us show elected leaders that you care about forging a better path forward for America.

[**To complete this quick 2-minute Four Pillars Pledge just click here now »**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zgv7piq4shnuf34vh6qngd88j1ig1c3j3jjd9390_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chjm8oj4c5h2bs)

**This special pledge reads:

**
* I believe in the four pillars of American society: faith, liberty, community, and life
* I know these pillars are the foundation for the greatest, freest nation the world has ever seen
* I will help promote and preserve these cornerstones to secure the United States as a beacon of hope and freedom for generations to come
* As 2023 nears, I'm ready to strengthen the bonds that hold our country together by promoting conservative, common-sense solutions to the challenges facing our country

[**If these words reflect what you want for our country in 2023 and beyond, please join me in taking this special pledge today.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ze7v1v8qc61r3nmq956f827rh4srfqnqoqvsmhlg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chjm8oj4c5h2bs)

This is a critical time to advance freedom in America--so let's head into 2023 with a full head of steam by reminding ourselves, together, of what really matters.

The fight for liberty is more crucial than ever, even if more liberty-minded leaders were sent to Congress. We must remain vigilant in our fight.

You can take this value-affirming pledge now by clicking the secure link below:
