| Hi, it’s Dan. Your support helped us have a decisive victory in last month’s election. Despite running in a Republican-leaning district, we won thanks to incredible grassroots supporters like you.

We also won because we knew the race would be competitive and we made early investments in our organizing and outreach efforts. Because of redistricting, our district will remain one of the most competitive (and expensive) House races, and holding this district will require around-the-clock organizing.

name: Mark Takano
subject: re: my family history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
This is a very personal story to me.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56489489/385134946/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzU2NTEzZC0yNTg2LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gIF3SHPmIFaGsr6QDeBO0HrnVZcACUjXNbZ46PqKFS8=)
---
Hey Peter, I’m Mark Takano and I’m proudly Japanese-American.

Like many Americans, my family pursued the American Dream. Eventually, they were successful. But, there was no shortage of obstacles.

Painfully, my grandparents and parents were all sent to Japanese internment camps during World War II because of racist, fear-mongering policies. They lost everything and had no choice but to rebuild their entire lives after the war.

**But now, I’m a U.S. Congressman -- and I’m asking for your support.**

American families like mine have come so far due to progressive and inclusive policies. And I’m working everyday in Congress to keep fighting for policies that further uplift and protect our diverse communities. [**But Peter, I can’t do it without your support -- so can I count on you to chip in $3 right now and help me build an America that is welcoming and prosperous for all families? clean_body: This is a very personal story to me. | = Hey Peter, I’m Mark Takano and I’m proudly Japanese-American. Like many Americans, my family pursued the American Dream. Eventually, they were successful. But, there was no shortage of obstacles. Painfully, my grandparents and parents were all sent to Japanese internment camps during World War II because of racist, fear-mongering policies. They lost everything and had no choice but to rebuild their entire lives after the war. But now, I’m a U.S. Congressman -- and I’m asking for your support. American families like mine have come so far due to progressive and inclusive policies. And I’m working everyday in Congress to keep fighting for policies that further uplift and protect our diverse communities. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = Thank you -- so glad to know I can count on you. \-- Mark Takano | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. name: LCV Rapid Response
subject: URGENT: House Republicans push MASSIVE drilling plan -- vote could be one of the first of the new year
body:
__We need to push back hard |
---

|
DEVELOPING... the new class of Congress is set to meet next week, and with the House set to be under Republican control, they're pushing quickly to make a dirty energy package their first bill out of the gate. [Please, make an urgent year-end contribution to help us block this bill. Even $5 is enough to help >>](https://links.messages.lcv.)

**Peter, -- this could be really, really bad.** We've just received word on what to expect and it includes:
* **Major** expansions offering up public lands for fossil fuel production.
* A green light on restarting construction of the **Keystone XL pipeline** (despite the _massive_ failure and oil disaster from the existing Keystone pipeline).
* A provision to tie the Biden Administration's hands from blocking drilling leases.****

The bill is also expected to completely gut the environmental review processes required by the National Environmental Policy Act (NEPA). This is the law that requires environmental impact studies for projects like pipelines, highways, and drilling on public lands -- and gives affected communities the chance to give input on these projects.

The truth is -- blocking these kinds of bills comes down to grassroots pressure. Campaigning. Flooding House and Senate office with calls, letters, and emails. Meetings with House champions and Senate leaders. As we stare down a major year-end fundraising deadline -- we're asking for your help. **Can you make an urgent year-end contribution to LCV?******

[Help power our fight to protect climate action. We need to raise $25,000 to make our voice heard on Capitol Hill. Please make a gift today -- even $5 helps.](https://links.messages.lcv.)

**I want you to know -- this is a fight we can win.** I know because I've seen what we can achieve when the environmental movement organizes is a major way. Here are just a few examples of what **you** helped achieve this year:
* ******After a decade of work, we passed historic climate legislation -- the Inflation Reduction Act -- into law.** This year, our nation made truly historic progress to protect people and the planet. In August, Congress passed and President Biden signed into law the Inflation Reduction Act, which contains roughly _$370 billion_ in transformative investments for clean energy, energy security, and environmental justice.
* **You turned out to vote, expanding environmental leadership in the Senate and creating a "green wave" in the states.** Voter support for candidates who back strong climate action was in abundant evidence this year, as against long odds, political headwinds, and historical trends, voters turned out and delivered a clear victory for climate and democracy in the 2022 elections.
* **We expanded protections for public lands with the historic designation of Camp Hale -Continental Divide National Monument.** After years of campaigning and pressure from the movement, President Biden designated Camp Hale-Continental Divide National Monument in Colorado, the first national monument his administration has declared -- AND we expect President Biden to soon designate Avi Kwa Ame, or Spirit Mountain, as a National Monument in Nevada.

We need to keep this kind of work going -- not just to block extremist Republican attempts to ramp up drilling, but to EXPAND clean energy, and to PROTECT clean air, clean water, and our communities and climate.

But that'll only happen when we hear from people like you -- people who know how high the stakes are for the planet. We can't afford to wait.

[Please -- before the year ends, make your contribution. If everyone reading this email made a gift as small as $5, we'd blow through our $25,000 goal in minutes.](https://links.messages.lcv.)

Thanks for everything that you do. We'll be in touch soon with more opportunities to make a difference.

Onward,

Adam, Caitlyn, Alex, Annie, Krysten, Norita
LCV Membership Team |

---

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=9042272&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTY0MDQ2ODQxMgS2&spReportId=MTY0MDQ2ODQxMgS2). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=9042272&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTY0MDQ2ODQxMgS2&spReportId=MTY0MDQ2ODQxMgS2) from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](mailto:feedback@lcv.org), or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

[740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683](https://links.messages.lcv.) |

name: The Giffords Team
subject: Our end of year fundraising deadline is approaching in just four days
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We need to make sure we report not just an impressive total amount we’ve raised in grassroots contributions, but we need to show that we have had enough individual contributions to our cause.
#

Friends -
In a moment, [**we’re going to ask you to make a $3 contribution to Giffords PAC.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec22.cgiIvC&refcode=em221227-1-15&t=1&akid=2899%2E3935704%2E2RUQGP)
But first, we want to explain why.
In just **four** days, we’re facing our critical end of year fundraising deadline. After this deadline, both the total amount we’ve raised in grassroots contributions and the number of individual contributions we’ve received will be publicly reported.
Every donation we receive sends a powerful message about the size and strength of the grassroots movement to keep our communities safe from violence. Now is our time to make a statement and show that commonsense gun safety legislation like universal background checks and safe storage laws are popular policies—ones that we’ll continue to fight for in the new year.
That’s why making your first online contribution of the year today would make a world of difference.
[**So, will you please contribute $3 to Giffords PAC today before our end of year fundraising drive comes to an end?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec22.cgiIvC&refcode=em221227-1-15&t=2&akid=2899%2E3935704%2E2RUQGP)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

---

| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-dec22.cw1qcH&refcode=em221227-1-15&t=22&akid=2899%2E3935704%2E2RUQGP)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-dec22.7SXY6R&refcode=em221227-1-15&t=23&akid=2899%2E3935704%2E2RUQGP)**

name: James Carville (via Democrats.org)
subject: Derek, the work of electing Democrats isn’t cheap.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
Saturday’s fundraising deadline is no joke. Hitting this goal will help Democrats make the investments we need to win in 2023 and beyond. I’m calling on you: | |
---
Derek, I’ve been in politics for a long time, and I’ll tell you one thing: **Democrats defied the odds in 2022.** Grassroots donors dug deep to support Democrats nationwide, and it paid off. _Now, my friends at the DNC have just four days to hit their goal, and -- dangit! -- they’re falling behind on their fundraising._ **Grassroots donations had tremendous power in this year’s elections, and it’d mean a lot if you made your first contribution of 2022. So, I’m humbly asking: Will you rush $7 to the DNC before their fundraising deadline on Saturday?**

body:
| | | Friend, it’s Chuck Schumer with some big news to share:

**I’ve just authorized a HUGE Triple-Impact Match ahead of our end-of-year fundraising deadline![Click here to chip in $5 _(becomes $15!)_ now:](https://go.dscc.org/go/11464?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20221227-ChuckSchumer-SchumerTMExplainerRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20221227-ChuckSchumer-SchumerTMExplainerRF-Pros-sl1&akid=9313%2E9716520%2EhzlEK_)**

| | [DONATE $5 (BECOMES $15)](https://go.dscc.org/go/11464?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20221227-ChuckSchumer-SchumerTMExplainerRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20221227-ChuckSchumer-SchumerTMExplainerRF-Pros-sl1&akid=9313%2E9716520%2EhzlEK_)

**Here’s what this opportunity means for you:**

✓ Every dollar you give will have _THREE TIMES_ the impact.
✓ You’ve never had a better chance to _ENSURE_ we have the resources we need to lay the groundwork for our most pivotal 2024 election battles.

body:
We've been through a lot in 2022 and I'm looking forward to an eventful 2023. Let's each commit to doing more to treat others with respect.| | | [](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=eb8c40aa01b34576bafeeb0006ba6efa&_e=x1uiBL7onnBenHV5Q4p0jnTXZ6nyEkUZKI4lRtueeX_QGeDJU6EZeHkhLXdZ4Atcx8_J_YnmwtTxeoxqx6QZGusk8SIvIo3EbRFa3GTv-ZSLUpp-jv5ZNiEQuKg2DhcTSV_ziLexl3xb3zneDTKW6WCL9y4i2V29xh4xbLsOMPzGTSOcF263sxfQQvXjbiY8HFtHI6NeAF9P5KZinT5BOg%3D%3D)

Peter, I wanted to reach out to wish you a happy holidays and joyous new year! We've been through a lot in 2022 and I'm looking forward to an eventful 2023. Let's each commit to doing more to treat others with respect and wish them the best, even when we disagree with them. **If you'd like to watch the short video message I recorded for you, you can view it on[Twitter (here)](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=eb8c40aa01b34576bafeeb0006ba6efa&_e=x1uiBL7onnBenHV5Q4p0jgYYrdtv6pdgny2TUiv-CByJc7K6RIMl3ym-HRW85oycqbXuXsH0Iq_FFvUtX4f9J3fQgpa2d6p-g6YrvVJnWuo1Yyhe_YaViCEzc_EHNXCjYYNSSIfGTnKZPlsTpRlR2odO0Kz4cto6saATpNOGLxSHdxoEegn6_efIsBdYaZ5IrqG-LR3zKsFjtvhk2YaVHTUWeqSeK-hIltn7qlXoTP4E0NxzmJb2v7bpWTlRe1O3rhM9b8pgGS7Vm4qDVSKsaE5eUPgg6-I_0bTwyyJai7o%3D) and [Facebook (here)](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=eb8c40aa01b34576bafeeb0006ba6efa&_e=x1uiBL7onnBenHV5Q4p0jqgZYgUJr5vTScpBrbXRYuEQMW6DjPpJllZh5B9MO21bYMW_nTN7BbqeYh4Euk3jrgHGyj-1eEBhWR62sb_FmT3Q-604aoj5ImuXg7UrCUwys_CdcxBSh0PFgLvJ6ng8XIafD0HXTLOmldMNyX_keGFm0zPYIYbCec27UgglOCSNwav5HIIcxYIC5Tk3iKNG_w%3D%3D)**.

[](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=eb8c40aa01b34576bafeeb0006ba6efa&_e=x1uiBL7onnBenHV5Q4p0jgYYrdtv6pdgny2TUiv-CByJc7K6RIMl3ym-HRW85oycqbXuXsH0Iq_FFvUtX4f9J3fQgpa2d6p-g6YrvVJnWuo1Yyhe_YaViCEzc_EHNXCjiwPrjywB-R4Xrut-BdVUcuYbhZWAbrvL-MEor1GmWmLJDMkceGQTVfBD5KwZXBhN2OIJYcjleIzvv4yUgjH81l4ZNanJL_n8h44uWX2oRNpe_IZd-iTaiBzQaTh6jVqy8CZJJzgFu-xnbEMY5jEJtnOMEow505G9OK6huRMdTeI%3D)

|

[](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=eb8c40aa01b34576bafeeb0006ba6efa&_e=x1uiBL7onnBenHV5Q4p0jgYYrdtv6pdgny2TUiv-CByJc7K6RIMl3ym-HRW85oycs6qDclt5HU7gWDphdi_cP7KzNfYPPZXCwvAjERcSr1OQkk0N1NKMGryFtljQ9jyDsFxrhA5Y-liEx1g1j3N-QIOskPZFaaq9zeHDMaPrhdVQlxfOf9saeMcx5bG9kmhhHLloIXcUrPkwBkPC3vo5qxZUv7bEEN0S5Puz9rAciPXHn-Zo7-zNUR7w-z7Kl6owD0tk7kL_fB3Eox2hsk1wg9XMsmXAT13CdvozBDLLR6w%3D)

People often stop me when I’m out and about, and thank me for having the courage to speak my mind even when it means I’m being critical about the leadership of my own party. What I tell them is that there is courage all around us happening every day, and each one of us is capable of making a positive difference in the lives of those around us. [Here is a short clip of me speaking more about this](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=eb8c40aa01b34576bafeeb0006ba6efa&_e=x1uiBL7onnBenHV5Q4p0jgYYrdtv6pdgny2TUiv-CByJc7K6RIMl3ym-HRW85oycs6qDclt5HU7gWDphdi_cP7KzNfYPPZXCwvAjERcSr1OQkk0N1NKMGryFtljQ9jyD_c90WcRZJpVzYNIHroYySgvhRzVUHl2s72-HYNnmuvweGAi3pJ3d7qRcg_i4QotO5r9n2OzdJCQ0LlO-gN8xgrATQheG0Cm-N-ibKjY2OT211B8ukbfLoatwCRXVLKFrBG5TqqKoWLZwIvOQ6urUJUVA3htaaZfeJLzjxQc4Utk%3D).

I recently had a fun time chatting with Susan Estrich on her new podcast, "[No Holding Back](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=eb8c40aa01b34576bafeeb0006ba6efa&_e=x1uiBL7onnBenHV5Q4p0jpq5P1TcrYnSlC9loX4m766s1efDSlS_txuO5A5gTuUjPIKykzBLfgDztUk409O3FJ1OLeK18bStkCsOq-4xFX4puobajwhMD9YqTNW3Yv1oUE_E_Bu53tiICPr31nyr47EeYgT31YCEr9bxPsAhaWuBwXEG67kTbqCJ_kCrorE4d0xAwIlkpyShYpexwAFbGAig_BwDZhjz6C8JK1qGYn0%3D)," and you can listen to our conversation about politics, life and current events by using this link. If you like what you hear, please be sure to tune in for future episodes of Susan's podcast!

I joined Meadows Mental Health Policy Institute President & CEO Andy Keller for a discussion about the importance of managing mental health during the holiday season. [You can watch our full discussion on Facebook (here)](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=eb8c40aa01b34576bafeeb0006ba6efa&_e=x1uiBL7onnBenHV5Q4p0jjAKp_vLg8_9i-mfvOcO7iuUNv2K-DA3cG54t7446bvYkwQT-EPr4IqopJ5yo5MD4VOMA9FfhZjdeRjTJOUMpzGC1Ngpwu2zPvcXBUgRDNSKFh8S3XS8q90gy1spdf_bSSZzjvUIFwJz25Ub4tEeAE0zTslE6_8kkHm_ttHU9xSS1xNe7eisV6oSjKQ2-_VWag%3D%3D).

**Peter, I'm out there every day working to heal the divisions in our country that prevent us from having real, meaningful conversations about how to face our greatest challenges**. One of the realities is that we need to raise the funds to continue rallying support for this positive agenda. [Will you consider chipping in with a donation before our December 31, 2022 fundraising deadline?](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=eb8c40aa01b34576bafeeb0006ba6efa&_e=x1uiBL7onnBenHV5Q4p0jlDp2ahHa_LTpk6_J-c8O8aJrdSh9fNEl2EH65m-m2eDWncg4r0dpH05jYicIsUpW4jTl2isx4K7U3_e41jBhua_3n3nCyNINRK29f6V0IBz9HvheMRML9xDfYCiqp73TmLq23Y48PNvRpM4lVAA9tPeHziMzdljeLUgdwldcb2OZGcc5RrGJ5sZtLjwfIByep3_FrPTlL3FvbmpiauxQ_E%3D) I'm so appreciative of your ongoing support. Thank you! -John

name: Senate Polling
subject: Official U.S. Senate Survey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC

name: VIRAL PETITION (Left Action)
subject: Shame on you, Greg Abbott!!
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | [Tell Texas Gov. Greg Abbott, "You're an a**hole!" for dropping off busloads of migrants in D.C. in freezing cold weather >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5c107bb0-b43b-4e43-ba11-7eb081b09397/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T41bd376c-7313-4c9d-948d-71fe1e1e85a8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | (Want to unsubscribe? See link below) The White House condemned Texas Gov. Greg Abbott for sending over 100 migrants to Kamala Harris’ home on Christmas Eve – the coldest night that Washington DC has experienced in decades! It’s absolutely disgusting that Greg Abbott and his administration are abandoning people, including children, on the side of the road in below-freezing temperatures – many of whom are seeking asylum. Thankfully, the people arriving were met by volunteers who provided blankets and transportation. This is a dangerous and inhumane political stunt – and Greg Abbott deserves to hear what we think about it. [Tell Texas Gov. Greg Abbott, "You're an a**hole!" >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta31241bb-9037-46f9-b0c8-2547f6252229/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

subject: re: Senator Kyrsten Sinema
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
we need to replace her with a real Democrat
| | **We’re still reeling from this news:** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/37748?t=6&akid=5933%2E878179%2ElZ2Phf) After spending the last two years sabotaging President Biden’s agenda, Sinema has officially turned her back on Democrats.

Now, we need to expand our Senate Majority and replace her with a REAL Democrat – one that won’t betray us.

**That’s why starting right now we’re starting a 2024 Arizona Senate Fund to defeat enemies like Kyrsten Sinema and we need $10,000 to get started!**

[**_The Senate Majority we expanded earlier this month is GONE. Please chip in anything you can afford to expand our Democratic Majority in the Senate._**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/37748?t=7&akid=5933%2E878179%2ElZ2Phf) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/37749?t=8&akid=5933%2E878179%2ElZ2Phf)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=5933%2E878179%2ElZ2Phf). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=5933%2E878179%2ElZ2Phf).**

subject: Can you help us reach our end-of-year fundraising goal?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Change for Arizona 2024 PAC
body:
| |
---

| **GOAL:** $10,000 raised for the Replace Sinema Project.
**DEADLINE:** December 31 at midnight MST. **[Will you help us reach our end-of-year goal today with a donation of $3?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ5XI6YHChR2bS-m44B_fctRFs3vPqYgFkTQGtWiC9jVfmqSYxhNVDsupAFsA3MRn2SQV51WAYodddWjXRxXUYwXkQZr1M4OV2r9IBc1sH2pSSgWn9xK5uRQ4N6AEzvGAiwtbZi1Uw1UKTOUI6stRo2Zf3x-pGO1Gi_9irwmPGX7gLkkJ0FbA3WxZ7LbSBR3OlX6wUTUjoVzDmC75bwCbMGCdPvfA5By4Y7H9kDjiyII2POK9-tmKJWa-0Kajqp9aGpYD-sG2pNqgOzdnsboo_ux3ITtF0NSuSjzyVI20O_GiN21Ia6NDQeeVC9yBI87FaZuRDaXA_zLzPCEc7Yku1h5H1-8ZiZPXgCFUdgsHNKg/3sc/RvZisjNZTfm-7rz7Gx701g/h0/hAyQdtMzqqS8bu7KcPIh9EUL8CmnFU-_rZsc3Gf4T70) ** [CHIP IN](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ5XI6YHChR2bS-m44B_fctRFs3vPqYgFkTQGtWiC9jelQs1EgS3F2_DiGhtexiRycwytAkxwA9KOMlHd8KjlzYdpMpo9s1mMwndPz9k-EZpu9wCjyTiBz5YfKx1mSc8OdHkyq9ApsAlfWO63sylOBqaEG6-YarQ2uN4B20T1-eAWfBaRtd16pxcPwBRmsac8GEWpOVrIRcfSswzH4ZivH3YlY5WJrV8j3jGp6NDrOL49q0u1ZzCMaKYb6vBAmAcDoPmHxVhrdhXlwqAnvg2jGRzO_Ynsq4M5cJc90KcWGgLurwA3g5cvXno8uZtja46Kyl02yacMvDPgbhvYuxhbUpe3rcLew_wCWouuNygsoYQ/3sc/RvZisjNZTfm-7rz7Gx701g/h1/ddqXPaovKoXi0ZMtJTk4bRw3xwYozgaNiBs5JPyPgPc)

Peter,
Another year full of Kyrsten Sinema proving she doesn't have Arizonans' best interests at heart.
Sinema has been one of the biggest obstructors of President Biden's popular agenda. She's a major reason women across the country are without access to critical healthcare because she refused to give up the filibuster to save Roe. She wants to tout about protecting democracy when in reality she’s spent the last two years blocking John Lewis's voting rights legislation by, you guessed it, refusing to give up the filibuster.
She constantly ignores her constituents to prioritize massages and her big industry and corporate donors who cut her six-figure checks. Not to mention the way she completely abandoned Democrats in her state during an especially contentious Senate and Governor race– ignoring the threat of Blake Masters and Kari Lake to go shopping in Paris and schmooze with Mitch McConnell in Kentucky.
Sinema’s indifference is not just infuriating. It’s dangerous.
**Kyrsten Sinema must be ousted from the Senate** , and we're here to hold her accountable. Our work is only going to ramp up in 2023 — and between amplifying our message and supporting grassroots organizations on the ground in Arizona, we'll need as much support as we can get to be successful.
That's why we've set a $10,000 end-of-year fundraising goal, so we can jump into 2023 with full force. [**Can you please chip in $3 to help us get there?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ5XI6YHChR2bS-m44B_fctRFs3vPqYgFkTQGtWiC9jeHheq-j5ark59uoOJTidhAP37iAfVI6hXBZZLPNVjrLMXCIv-U9HeNvFhYWvI9brFNdvyhrQM1fgHSAuYYb1B-GXeM6mtBpEw8IeWrvKzb_rWOf9bssS_y_SaTrcDyULwZ6MMi2MXROa8n2wlShMpzJu6XnNqPPDA3uExeZcAqsvsxHP8VgGcjuKROhr9L3zoUGbZUONrwuFQSVpT5JNQrO33elp99RSXnvhj5eOeqQcYfW1Z8F8WlU64KBV3vYKkl-oh0DaFEoGcDXQXJF-kmbTvQP_qLl858obEzeNhk8494QTlj_r3XuGj_CWGG9DA/3sc/RvZisjNZTfm-7rz7Gx701g/h2/ByBWX7bMsRGTJgeNho2qrCqDk-0CYOhEyCAH2E1UM-s)
__
[CHIP IN](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ5XI6YHChR2bS-m44B_fctRFs3vPqYgFkTQGtWiC9jQ1wxTtffLU0id7PCW0_T7OFCvwDL6DsQ4kFx4-Zx35eqzqQMvQwwkaFEtVp-w_eds5AS7HcroyzlyVd1IwRK_qXjrJDW36WXgnJtrpZ7Pt4UJN493E2DVe3nzR6NZgYIPuneu7JVRGBqGnk4liJYf75Lec4RFP0gG7pUJn2J1GdiqJhEVORMQyQ-MrR41FiaFx-NwrO8Uiehcv2BpTzwQruhBbZhB_8i_CEBrTPCquQ6JUwaMxZY6NrhMJ2PSjzAZjdw_gZ9IJQfua4spEbCzdHu59bCAzh4iKocVFM-ibcN7-_l0jVf20oCZn5ozce_Q/3sc/RvZisjNZTfm-7rz7Gx701g/h3/yQQ5VKM09xCkvajw6rjyHLsrCfiQUMPJgmYMzPG3_rY)
Thankfully, since we launched the Primary Sinema Project last October, we've received an incredible response. We're energized by all the Arizonans and folks across the country who are ready to join us to beat Kyrsten Sinema. And after all her antics this year, we’re more ready than ever to make sure her first term in office is also her last.
Because replacing Sinema isn't just about getting rid of one of the worst Senators in DC— it's also about protecting our fragile Democratic majority. Kyrsten Sinema blocking President Biden's agenda could imperil the reelection chances of Democrats across the country.
That's why we're working to hold her accountable now, and why we have big plans for 2023 — because we can't afford to wait.
So we have to ask once more: Can we count on you to chip in $3 to our movement and help us reach our $10,000 fundraising goal before our end-of-year fundraising deadline? 100% of your donation will go towards making sure this is Kyrsten Sinema’s last term in office. [CHIP IN](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ5XI6YHChR2bS-m44B_fctRFs3vPqYgFkTQGtWiC9jYhrJ9IVskI-Lqx_Act21n0yRSz5_toO7b4yQUf6lRYr5Xx_b-E_3JDlzLt5OqSQ-Xh8z2cPijcDwy6djJxKKrVrXIfpEHNT0L1cihgOYa0adP32vana8vGUyAjGwE-DX0D-43-mi4DiC8fMhVHnUYRp3TwV7eF7ltsmr481Ky4i4uDn0Eiiy0Foyt87OcEgmeAktvcNDTjT5bpks_B3iwr2-Wy3aRv3njl-3mmNpd2Mb1er3hezySfi91_UriKQFVSwmdI-6lMZb-3lqXpmTBi3bxvRtnPmm9w2Pp-MLnJJlS1xOwnLF_HpJdETNtf2rA/3sc/RvZisjNZTfm-7rz7Gx701g/h4/ltrUuPaUFH6Wky32OuXxM_o-J8VkcH8pgPnCOAfllWg)
Thank you for all your help this year,
-the team at Replace Sinema & Change for Arizona 2024 PAC

You should not rely solely on information contained in this email to evaluate the product or service being endorsed.Always exercise due diligence before purchasing any product or service. | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by newsletter@thegunpeople.com 514 Earth City Plz, Ste 310, Earth City, MT 63045 US | | | | ---|---|---

| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. This year, we saw our rights being stripped away over and over with no pushback. The current Senate failed to codify _Roe v. Wade_ and protect access to safe and legal abortion, and it’s no secret as to why.

**We won’t stop until our rights are secured once and for all, and it’s more clear than ever that Black women are our only hope.**

[Please, Peter, chip in whatever you can today to help us support the incredible Black women we’re fighting tooth and nail to elect across the country in 2023 and 2024 — our democracy is depending on you.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z13Gsiw4jYjb8npbjGXirZpggRAdO8gCgSpC8vk_fI5RfQVBlgA8RWXmAqUF9Z9IfWZXI5V3mD3vFGgIWodnxg3A4v6hTTx2IJhFlGwvp2ymdsUJ7fkwVj0FPvBj9kyPjabvPSM58SMi5Qv5qYvb9Qn0B2Vvp76EW1NL2zfPvOeHlx5hf2KzTsiaevaSjfYtSrvFgbW73F7Mj3saZJOon_JFYK_einrVHH3xF4DGQLBOHPltZyeym5I8vovqh578RrYsBIgBUwFuvtJB4CAlmfmC9PvZ78-v_OzEaT8gO-v3VCdZDdmjNq8x6jQCR-gzrsLwy-GGJyYR06-mWNSQ5wuPEBP9EhkSJzvW5witS_vsoTseKcDyTRtQXp2hsP828/3sc/SDBs4rGTSP6HuR70GhVjGQ/h9/CGxueXf9CYxILPKlAwGOhaf4PQe85H0t87aHiU1jkbk)

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, this year, Democrats across the country stepped up and proved that the so-called “Red Wave” was nothing more than a far-off Republican fantasy, and we couldn’t be more proud. But the truth is that the fight to #BuildBlackPoliticalPower in our country and create a government that is truly representative of its people is far from over — especially when there are STILL no Black women in the United States Senate. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | This year, we saw our rights being stripped away over and over with no pushback. The current Senate failed to codify Roe v. Wade and protect access to safe and legal abortion, and it’s no secret as to why. We won’t stop until our rights are secured once and for all, and it’s more clear than ever that Black women are our only hope. Thank you, The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. To Donate by Check: PO Box 15320, DC 20003 Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ** | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from The Collective PAC, please .

| | Dear Peter, Have you used your [Oregon Political Tax Credit](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56491465/385143674/913998683?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI3ZjY3ZmYzLTM0ODYtZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMGQzYTllYjkxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MnB2myi6Y1x1cyXv7hxNxmyA_iquVefx6gD2sf0Tomw=&emci=8d042d7a-3286-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=27f67ff3-3486-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=2107230) yet this year? If you're eligible, you can give $50 (if you file as an individual) or $100 (if you are part of a couple filing jointly) to a political group like the OLCV PAC and get it back when you file your taxes! You are eligible for Oregon’s Political Tax Credit if:
* You are an Oregon resident.
* You will submit an Oregon tax return for 2022.
* You make less than $75,000 (individual) or $150,000 (couple filing jointly).

**[Click here to use your Oregon Political Tax Credit](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56491466/385143675/913998683?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI3ZjY3ZmYzLTM0ODYtZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMGQzYTllYjkxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MnB2myi6Y1x1cyXv7hxNxmyA_iquVefx6gD2sf0Tomw=&emci=8d042d7a-3286-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=27f67ff3-3486-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=2107230)** Our work is powered by grassroots supporters like you. Please [donate](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56491467/385143676/913998683?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI3ZjY3ZmYzLTM0ODYtZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMGQzYTllYjkxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MnB2myi6Y1x1cyXv7hxNxmyA_iquVefx6gD2sf0Tomw=&emci=8d042d7a-3286-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=27f67ff3-3486-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=2107230) to the OLCV PAC today and help ensure that we have the resources we need to continue electing pro-climate, pro-environment candidates next year and beyond. Thanks for all you do. Sincerely,
Doug Moore

name: Amanda K. Edwards
subject: Endorsement Announcement
disclaimer_text: paid for by Amanda Edwards Campaign, Melanie Gray, Treasurer
body:
I am thrilled to announce an important endorsement from the Mayor of Oakland, CA, Libby Schaaf. | | | Amanda is fighting to ensure that our minority and women-owned businesses have the resources they need. name: Daniel Di Martino
subject: A Socialist Christmas Season… away from family.
body:
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=35ffa3475a044c7fa8649bcc64a3409f&_e=pvufJVrvDsu9cmgOhBo3UYISsUsfEiUNS8ukLai8J8PB_oAbqZS4U8lLkuEwPeOpKEXnfV1R3Y43Jh5gzhMRmFC0CoQeSDRIZjNnz1MdpAabrfsJvTY1hL8Gfodg5AMkHkU7jLWsNAkcU7op-LS470YNw82SPirAHW2QS6Zk_7n-P5__fDslhquvwWrgnDbJ75kdfIFM7cnItf9srufOTdkUahl3ofAJje56--IpB0aDU6mvqOVrGXGd8Dn8wyap9QUIz6zhxOxAgCLb0eLzQg%3D%3D)
Friend,

Seven years ago, I celebrated my last Christmas with all my family in Venezuela. While I'm with my parents again this season, my grandparents, cousins, uncles, and everyone else in my family are spread thin all over the world. All because Venezuela's socialist regime forced us to flee.

**Here 's my family's story:**

My grandfather was a shoemaker. He started out working for others but then created his own business. He went from being a hand-made shoemaker to owning his own factory.

**Our family went from poverty to riches. What does this sound like? The American dream! **

_But all of that changed when the socialists took over. _

It wasn't a violent revolution like Cuba, Russia, or China. This month, 24 years ago, _**Hugo Chavez was elected to office! **_

Once the socialists took control, the economy went downhill.

Venezuela sits on top of the world's largest oil reserves. Yet, we had to get in line for hours to get gas in our cars.

**Prices rose as the government tried to print its way into prosperity.** Eventually, I couldn't fit enough cash in my wallet to go to the movies because the money was so worthless.

**Socialists blamed businessmen and greed.** The government confiscated businesses and put price controls in place. Shortages became widespread. For a few weeks, there would be no milk. Then it would come back for a few weeks, and then, gone again.

I want to tell my story to high school students around the United States. They need to know the truth about socialism. **That 's why I founded the Dissident Project. **

[_**Can you donate $10, $25, or $50 to Young Voice and help us teach the next generation about the dangers of socialism? Click here to donate to support our work >>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=35ffa3475a044c7fa8649bcc64a3409f&_e=pvufJVrvDsu9cmgOhBo3UYISsUsfEiUNS8ukLai8J8PB_oAbqZS4U8lLkuEwPeOpKEXnfV1R3Y43Jh5gzhMRmFC0CoQeSDRIZjNnz1MdpAZaQow7F-6lLxW9V75eQwrGgLObjiqGRcM5grhYARh4HmHxFT3HbyxuITJSCIwysRVB8bl0bqZxSdlytUe5Xttc615_UqPLpomt0KoQmpypxN0TU9Y64tILZQBWvsV51CDCueydWv6apGdGByznYvu6nobM8m_5pOiTS_v9KVT0Hg%3D%3D)

**Young Voice 's Dissident **project brings survivors of tyrannical socialist countries to high schools around the United States to tell our stories.

We are countering the mainstream narratives about how peaceful and successful socialism can be. Too many young people are taught to believe the United States is an evil, oppressive country and that capitalism is a failure.

**Young Voices ' Dissident project has speakers from Hong Kong, North Korea, Cuba, and Venezuela. We all have unique stories that high schoolers must hear. **

My goal is to raise $15,000 by the end of the month to fund our speakers. It costs roughly $1,500 to host a speaking event on a high school campus.

Your generous gift allows us to keep these talks free of charge for schools.

[_**Help me share my story with young Americans and tell them about the true horrors of socialism. Click here to send your gift >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=35ffa3475a044c7fa8649bcc64a3409f&_e=pvufJVrvDsu9cmgOhBo3UYISsUsfEiUNS8ukLai8J8PB_oAbqZS4U8lLkuEwPeOpKEXnfV1R3Y43Jh5gzhMRmFC0CoQeSDRIZjNnz1MdpAZKS4vbmW1zpLDAEmKNF277J0aQPsPWaNgFnMjC_fqvMXyRdl7XC4ulu4dyRmiB6Ut5p9UhzzKqNDopw43Kqy4DhQbi2sNo-sveiUd2KgtSxgn2Rn412b-1z3veHfE5nBLOC6CnIwB1w8BpVIyFThfw3sVKv-KJ7_qmhubIvgLilQ%3D%3D)

In the mid to late 20th century, Venezuela was a free and prosperous country.

Venezuelans had the opportunity to go from rags to riches. Venezuela was the most prosperous Latin American country. Nothing was perfect, of course, but food was on our tables and gifts under our trees every Christmas season.

**But socialism ruined our country 's economy and led 7 million of us to flee.**

If America were to fall to socialism, it would not fall by bullets but by votes.

**The socialist takeover of America can only happen gradually, just like it did in Venezuela.**

By the time you notice the decay, it will be too late to reverse. Shortages. Skyrocketing crime. Inflation. Christmas away from family because they moved abroad, and video calls every week or every day to catch up with those who left.

We can't let it happen in America.

**Please help me share my story with high school students and help them stop socialist ideas from creeping into our society.**

To do that, I need your help.

Please donate any amount you can generously spare today.

clean_body: Friend, Seven years ago, I celebrated my last Christmas with all my family in Venezuela. While I'm with my parents again this season, my grandparents, cousins, uncles, and everyone else in my family are spread thin all over the world. All because Venezuela's socialist regime forced us to flee. Here 's my family's story: My grandfather was a shoemaker. He started out working for others but then created his own business. He went from being a hand-made shoemaker to owning his own factory. Our family went from poverty to riches. What does this sound like? The American dream! But all of that changed when the socialists took over. It wasn't a violent revolution like Cuba, Russia, or China. This month, 24 years ago, Hugo Chavez was elected to office! Once the socialists took control, the economy went downhill. Venezuela sits on top of the world's largest oil reserves. Yet, we had to get in line for hours to get gas in our cars. Prices rose as the government tried to print its way into prosperity. Eventually, I couldn't fit enough cash in my wallet to go to the movies because the money was so worthless. Socialists blamed businessmen and greed. The government confiscated businesses and put price controls in place. Shortages became widespread. For a few weeks, there would be no milk. Then it would come back for a few weeks, and then, gone again. I want to tell my story to high school students around the United States. They need to know the truth about socialism. That 's why I founded the Dissident Project. Young Voice 's Dissident project brings survivors of tyrannical socialist countries to high schools around the United States to tell our stories. We are countering the mainstream narratives about how peaceful and successful socialism can be. Too many young people are taught to believe the United States is an evil, oppressive country and that capitalism is a failure. Young Voices ' Dissident project has speakers from Hong Kong, North Korea, Cuba, and Venezuela. We all have unique stories that high schoolers must hear. My goal is to raise $15,000 by the end of the month to fund our speakers. It costs roughly $1,500 to host a speaking event on a high school campus. Your generous gift allows us to keep these talks free of charge for schools. In the mid to late 20th century, Venezuela was a free and prosperous country. Venezuelans had the opportunity to go from rags to riches. Venezuela was the most prosperous Latin American country. Nothing was perfect, of course, but food was on our tables and gifts under our trees every Christmas season. But socialism ruined our country 's economy and led 7 million of us to flee. If America were to fall to socialism, it would not fall by bullets but by votes. The socialist takeover of America can only happen gradually, just like it did in Venezuela. By the time you notice the decay, it will be too late to reverse. Shortages. Skyrocketing crime. Inflation. Christmas away from family because they moved abroad, and video calls every week or every day to catch up with those who left. We can't let it happen in America. Please help me share my story with high school students and help them stop socialist ideas from creeping into our society. To do that, I need your help. Please donate any amount you can generously spare today. Thank you, Daniel Di Martino The Dissident Project is a program of Young Voices, a 501c3 nonprofit organization. All donations are tax deductible and will be acknowledged via email receipt. Donations made to the Dissident Project will be spent exclusively on that program. Sent to Conservatives Give subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

As our momentum continues to grow even stronger than ever before, it's important that I continue to focus my time on pushing for our progressive agenda in Washington. **To do that, we’ll need the support of regular folks like you to rebuild our grassroots campaign in 2023.[That’s why my team has set a goal of raising $10,000 by the end of the year. As we head into the next election cycle, it's critical that we make sure our campaign is in the best position possible to compete with our opposition and continue our progress. There are many special interests and dark money groups who want to see the progressive agenda we fought so hard for fail in Washington – **and they’re already laying the groundwork to try and push me out of Congress in 2024.**
That’s why we can’t afford to be caught asleep at the wheel. Fundraising isn’t my favorite part of this work, but it’s necessary to ensure we’re ready – and I’d rather rely on the support of regular folks like you than spend my day calling up wealthy donors for money. [**So please, make a contribution of any amount before midnight on December 31st to help us reach our end of year goal!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56491843/385145673/-1741057876?refcode=E19888-20221227-CallTime-SL-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-EG&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTM4YjQzNC0zYTg2LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=51TUO38C8mcRnDGeqYgWLUtNyAUZnCZgE2zkgoR_X8s=)

**Becca believes the best thoughts are not always from the loudest voices in the room.** As President Pro Tem of the Vermont State Senate, she's led the charge to invest in affordable housing, fight climate change, enshrine reproductive freedom into our state's constitution, and so much more. Now, she's running for Congress to have a greater impact on more Vermonters. clean_body: | | Peter, As a new member of the House, one of the first things we are told to do is "call time" – hopping on the phone and dialing up wealthy donors to ask them to write big checks to your campaign in order to fund your re-election. The suggested amount of call time for new members is four hours a day to keep pace – that’s nearly 20 hours a week. That’s not how I plan on using my time in Washington. I ran for Congress to fight for our communities and families, and thanks to this movement of grassroots donors, I was able to devote my time on the campaign to meeting with voters and focusing on finding solutions to the issues that matter most to Vermonters. As our momentum continues to grow even stronger than ever before, it's important that I continue to focus my time on pushing for our progressive agenda in Washington. To do that, we’ll need the support of regular folks like you to rebuild our grassroots campaign in 2023.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = As we head into the next election cycle, it's critical that we make sure our campaign is in the best position possible to compete with our opposition and continue our progress. There are many special interests and dark money groups who want to see the progressive agenda we fought so hard for fail in Washington – and they’re already laying the groundwork to try and push me out of Congress in 2024. That’s why we can’t afford to be caught asleep at the wheel. Fundraising isn’t my favorite part of this work, but it’s necessary to ensure we’re ready – and I’d rather rely on the support of regular folks like you than spend my day calling up wealthy donors for money. = | = ---|--- Thank you, Becca Balint Becca believes the best thoughts are not always from the loudest voices in the room. As President Pro Tem of the Vermont State Senate, she's led the charge to invest in affordable housing, fight climate change, enshrine reproductive freedom into our state's constitution, and so much more. Now, she's running for Congress to have a greater impact on more Vermonters. subject: Bring Constitution 101 to your home
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD | | | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0e52848546354506955b3087807e3615&_e=zMcnS3FdSCxHu3kL-nKQ1HHhGqWg7Ak0hbFLNFpUkpvsCYDHbhGuvWlTm4HAFjslTY1Z9DCVn3uLR3qmCrQBwNteuoNz8niBWZMBrVJcDUzdpXjEuNSEkk0yYVupvAu8DhXH0AHgvvTv8_5_3Mda_fy7nNC2vr5-lK_U4sCH1A1f4-Gk3YDecmMWZyQNiCzkXUiNXtPAMsc4qB8VK-_mcnLvnA4GBQF7L_QxjQF49HpnAE2lqILXC8y3zHoIduAug9eYHV8hCvWPv_TXj_A7Or6f38A5C5Yg33aAf_fja03HDfVp-n3loR66o_H7CRDVScglgnLJTyHQfyRK8_sIfDdPP12sywxCJmFAp9eKJ8AGN6Zr1OsPNeUsNwaG_kQ8o47Sa-XUhBQo5tN2rAuceA%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0e52848546354506955b3087807e3615&_e=zMcnS3FdSCxHu3kL-nKQ1HHhGqWg7Ak0hbFLNFpUkpvsCYDHbhGuvWlTm4HAFjslTY1Z9DCVn3uLR3qmCrQBwNteuoNz8niBWZMBrVJcDUzdpXjEuNSEkk0yYVupvAu8DhXH0AHgvvTv8_5_3Mda_fy7nNC2vr5-lK_U4sCH1A1f4-Gk3YDecmMWZyQNiCzkXUiNXtPAMsc4qB8VK-_mcnLvnA4GBQF7L_QxjQF49HpnAE2lqILXC8y3zHoIduAuCDye-LwKUT5W9sMNWE9rw2JFE4s6YwF6MdFfE7qNKEBg-E-ad7aa3JUs9Hz8AJaotaNT1DKbdYGzUE7Tkvknue84YLoFIyrO-omB0eS2k-bTGmYH-aYJmv6YJj5HcpJ9m5kZx9EKOK98U482xOgsCQ%3D%3D) I hope you're having a great day so far. Today, I'm writing to let you know that we've produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our "Constitution 101" course, and I'd like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College's world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. "Constitution 101" is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0e52848546354506955b3087807e3615&_e=zMcnS3FdSCxHu3kL-nKQ1HHhGqWg7Ak0hbFLNFpUkpvsCYDHbhGuvWlTm4HAFjslTY1Z9DCVn3uLR3qmCrQBwNteuoNz8niBWZMBrVJcDUzdpXjEuNSEkk0yYVupvAu8DhXH0AHgvvTv8_5_3Mda_fy7nNC2vr5-lK_U4sCH1A1f4-Gk3YDecmMWZyQNiCzkXUiNXtPAMsc4qB8VK-_mcnLvnA4GBQF7L_QxjQF49HpnAE2lqILXC8y3zHoIduAuLHfJV9MO7G9V9-cMkcKsqNlyAk4vnbRCjUaZwqQxR0tFE85lMbzIHkrmRhnVP0qw0IYfC5HWnYPaDGQFMFuFsqTTHKhoAc8B_8gidsRXzAs8rahJTnksw0BM5Cx90bqDoFvqrI8g-bEeD8cLFslsCg%3D%3D) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new "Constitution 101" DVD box set are limited, so I hope you'll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth--Defending Liberty since 1844
---

---

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Why I’m already talking about 2024:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
The stakes are really high. |
---

| | | | I know what you might be thinking -- we have been talking a lot about 2024, and that can feel like a long way off. [_**I want to explain why the stakes are too high to leave anything to chance.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56473919/385119097/1535696363?refcode=sbe221227&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTQwM2E2NC0xMjg2LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gWLzUpVCf3rglfYEWzr0ljGLfJKc19D4l5pZShMsz8Q=)
---
| | **[CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56473922/385119098/1535696363?refcode=sbe221227&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTQwM2E2NC0xMjg2LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gWLzUpVCf3rglfYEWzr0ljGLfJKc19D4l5pZShMsz8Q=)**
---
This year, we expanded our Senate majority by one seat. That means Republicans only need to flip two seats to retake control. They already have a majority in the House. Senate Republicans have been very clear about what they want to do if they seize power: Cuts to Social Security and Medicare. A nationwide abortion ban. Take away access to health care from millions. Raise taxes on working-class families. Those policies would mean uncertainty for Ohioans about where to get health care when they need it. Uncertainty about a secure retirement and a sound financial future. A harder time paying bills. All the while knowing the system is stacked against them in so many ways. There’s a reason why this is the GOP’s plan -- Republicans are acting with their donors’ interests in mind rather than working people’s interests. That’s not how I operate. I put working people front and center of every decision I make in Congress. That’s why I fought to secure a million people’s pensions. It’s why I fought to bring thousands of new manufacturing jobs to Ohio. And it’s why I’m fighting to restore the expanded Child Tax Credit to give working families a little more breathing room. There are two possible outcomes in 2024 and they would have two very different impacts on Ohioans. We need to start preparing for our election now so we have the resources to keep up with Republicans’ special interest-funded war chests. And while it may sound corny, I can assure you it’s the truth -- we rely on the generosity of people like you to fund our campaign. [_**The last FEC deadline of the year is less than a week away. Any amount you can contribute before then would help a great deal.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56473923/385119102/1535696363?refcode=sbe221227&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTQwM2E2NC0xMjg2LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gWLzUpVCf3rglfYEWzr0ljGLfJKc19D4l5pZShMsz8Q=)
---

Team,
Let me explain why the next week is so important for us.
This past election was extremely difficult. Millions of dollars were spent to sow division, hate, and fear. It was the most difficult test our movement has ever faced, but we stood strong. We were positive, and voters responded.
Like all tough campaigns, we had to leave everything on the field to win, and that means we still have some final expenses to settle up before the New Year.
To cover the final costs of our hard-fought campaign, we need to raise $50,000 online by New Year’s Eve. I just heard from my team on where our numbers stand, and I wanted to follow up personally.
To reach our target, we still need to raise more than $30,000 by Saturday. But here’s the good news: According to our records, you’re still eligible to make a refundable $50 ($100 for couples) this year with Minnesota’s Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program.
[**Team, don’t leave your free donation on the table! You have until December 31 to take advantage of your 2022 PCR before it resets. Make a refundable $50 contribution today so we can make up the difference and continue fighting to help people afford their lives and live with dignity, safety, and respect.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56474023/385119405/1344961175?refcode=body&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS85MDI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNmRkZWIwMC0xMzg2LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1bQPrHk_SwImDod5MSfe_DQ_nAAeBGJawanTjQvmIz8=)

name: Katie Porter HQ
subject: Bad news for Wells Fargo
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Congress
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/12?t=1&akid=15588%2E3422442%2E-9i27F)
Derek,
In a win for consumers, **Wells Fargo is being forced to pay $3.7 billion to settle allegations by the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau** that it mismanaged various types of loans and accounts. The allegations range from surprise overdraft fees to illegally repossessing cars.
For years Wells Fargo has used deceptive practices to scam families, and **Katie has used her voice in congressional hearings to hold them accountable and reveal some of their shadiest practices.**
**Katie has spent her career standing up to the Big Banks**. When the state of California secured a multibillion dollar settlement from the five biggest banks to repay families who had been cheated during the mortgage crisis, Katie was appointed to be the state’s Independent Monitor to make sure Wall Street held up its end of the deal. **Her and her team met with families from across the state, and held the banks’ feet to the fire to make sure people actually got the money they were owed.**
Wall Street Banks shouldn’t be allowed to scam and mislead families. **Katie’s one of the few Members of Congress who doesn’t take a dime of money from their CEOs, lobbyists, or corporate PACs.**
Thanks for being a part of Team Porter,
-KPHQ
**[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/13991?refcode=EMAE27_WFB_20221227_V1_F&t=2&akid=15588%2E3422442%2E-9i27F)**

Paid for by Katie Porter for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to update your information, please **[click here.](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/em-update-info-footer/?t=3&akid=15588%2E3422442%2E-9i27F)** Our campaign is powered by grassroots supporters chipping in to emails just like this one. If you would like to receive fewer emails, please [**click here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=15588%2E3422442%2E-9i27F).

To contribute via check, please address to: Katie Porter for Congress, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

body:

| | | Hi Friend, its South Dakota Governor Kristi Noem!

**And that 's why I'm so excited to offer you an exclusive copy of my new memoir _Not My First Rodeo_.** Plus, if you claim your copy today, I'll even sign it, Friend.

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Gov. Greg Abbott thrust poor, unsuspecting migrant children in t-shirts onto buses, sending them on an overnight journey to be dumped in front of the Vice President's home in Washington, D.C. in dangerously frigid temperatures. Immigrants like these need our mercy and support this holiday season.
body:
Inexcusable and evil
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T293e0acc-152c-490b-86a9-d1a7519214d0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, Unconscionable. Inexcusable. Evil. _Texas Governor Greg Abbott likes to call himself a Christian, he's closer to a devil. _ This morally scarred misanthrope, like many of his Republican brethren, likes to make a good show of Jesus' being his Savior. Yet, he apparently never read The Parable of the Good Samaritan, where his God commands Abbott to take care of those he finds penniless, harmed, lost and/or in need of sanctuary on the road. **_Abbott, being not simply a hypocrite, but a simmering, toxic ghoul, thrust poor, unsuspecting migrant children in t-shirts onto buses, sending them on an overnight journey to be dumped in front of the Vice President's home in Washington, D.C. in dangerously frigid temperatures. _** [**_Will you join us in helping those in need by giving $5, $10, $25, or whatever you can afford to the NILC, who specifically help low-income immigrants and their families._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfc77a8ad-e3fb-4fee-8572-edc070faee00/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _On Christmas, Ya know, as his Savior would've done._
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8e9770d9-91ba-4faa-8575-4375d5e794f1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | No matter one's religion, or whether they practice any, _**it only takes knowing right from wrong and common decency to do the opposite of Abbott. To not purposely dump kids into the streets in temperatures that cause frostbite to exposed skin in minutes. **As the National Immigration Law Center (NILC) tweeted, "seeking asylum is a human right--regardless of who you are and where you're from."_ Damn right. [**_Let's be better--Far Better--than human oil-spill Abbott this holiday season. In the emergency situation he created, will you join us in helping those in need by giving $5, $10, $25, or whatever you can afford to the NILC, who specifically help low-income immigrants and their families._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4b819aa5-4f0a-44e8-a3c4-c5f5a1c5717c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for your kindness, Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. | | Friend, **Have a 2A Task Force New Year! ** The holiday season focuses on the things that truly matter - God, family, and our country. The 2A Task Force focuses on defending one of our most essential constitutional rights, the right to keep and bear arms, and highlights the importance of not complying. Despite the Biden administration and the radical left’s mission to rewrite our Constitution, our mission is to reinforce and protect us from tyrants using the power of government to take away our liberties. The 2A Task Force is led by one of the country’s most respected voices on the Second Amendment, Donald Trump Jr. He recognized an opportunity to better organize pro-second amendment efforts and already succeeded once by sinking Biden’s radical anti-gun lobbyist nomination to lead the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms, and Explosives, **but now we need your HELP!**

subject: Americans find this “British Bulldog” captivating
body:
You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, “Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,” on DVD. This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=096c0f2c8529462d80e267040a764826&_e=Fvb0sdRmeK_Zpw-qzVIel7piC2RknObG32mzPWkxGk_714e_EJ9W0F7pjPMwz3xBdbqRWB0W2Sns5oiynZEeZgXUAxyBGXEiX8P7MkVmKVljoJVsQLyoqu7JxVtIE2bQxa_-ADwxx2ZnlEH1QA9Rz9aTB4t3NmezZ-BQqVC-2pvxC8TsCtAwJ5LcsQnEOfP8AfyRY9T8YCcamJW77U1C7xFpYP8wiT6CSD0RsJeHoe-VQLVgHqEfSHlzko6OSW2Zy6_uvM5hZbZZHMGzBvMwvtgR_cRtu-o_Z68KJ21w1xeDJwuiFWxlX9CNrsPtZXA_0noaJmXsOLAczq5HUvWpqYhS9fKAV_RWbD7Foa58t5neWo8uVqsWobcpH1vMDyMio-JgfT6XID_R2yyjV-Ze8w%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, You can now own one of Hillsdale College's most popular online courses, **" Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,"** on DVD. Thousands of people have enjoyed this in-depth course online since its release, _**and now you can add it to your personal library or give it as a gift.**_ In recent years Winston Churchill, who is best known for his leadership during World War II, has been portrayed in numerous films and television shows, proving without a doubt that Americans find the "British Bulldog" captivating. The reasons for this sustained interest in Churchill are profound. No statesman has better diagnosed the threat of modern technology; no statesman has spoken more effectively in opposition to socialism; and, no statesman has displayed more courage in the face of tyranny. It should come as little surprise that so many "academics" and activists are working to smear his legacy, which makes studying a true account of Churchill's accomplishments more important than ever. **For precisely this reason, I am so excited to offer you this powerful DVD set:** **_[https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=096c0f2c8529462d80e267040a764826&_e=Fvb0sdRmeK_Zpw-qzVIel7piC2RknObG32mzPWkxGk_714e_EJ9W0F7pjPMwz3xBdbqRWB0W2Sns5oiynZEeZgXUAxyBGXEiX8P7MkVmKVljoJVsQLyoqu7JxVtIE2bQxa_-ADwxx2ZnlEH1QA9Rz9aTB4t3NmezZ-BQqVC-2pvxC8TsCtAwJ5LcsQnEOfP8AfyRY9T8YCcamJW77U1C7xFpYP8wiT6CSD0RsJeHoe-VQLVgHqEfSHlzko6OSW2ZWN1Yv2HcLPtO7Bj-1yf97V7ZyomYTwDHjltsH9cVsy3xMhBkbg3xJFr2H57Gm-6wdd8VLus8Rq_dSAuKBOIEhsU3QqhA1pPjuENnP0mEc6ql59YszRzKoPkQItM5i9EvXG0naVvNoPW0ho9HFwtACA%3D%3D)_** As a student of Dr. Arnn myself, I know that his lectures on Churchill will teach you more about this subject than any of the many books and videos available to you, and they will reveal profound lessons that can be applied to the urgent problems of today. [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=096c0f2c8529462d80e267040a764826&_e=Fvb0sdRmeK_Zpw-qzVIel7piC2RknObG32mzPWkxGk_714e_EJ9W0F7pjPMwz3xBdbqRWB0W2Sns5oiynZEeZgXUAxyBGXEiX8P7MkVmKVljoJVsQLyoqu7JxVtIE2bQxa_-ADwxx2ZnlEH1QA9Rz9aTB4t3NmezZ-BQqVC-2pvxC8TsCtAwJ5LcsQnEOfP8AfyRY9T8YCcamJW77U1C7xFpYP8wiT6CSD0RsJeHoe-VQLVgHqEfSHlzko6OSW2ZcopU9dTraY7LXXM5NhZFuEJsY5NTRwBsRR-GFofJEFUaqzphpZ_KrlYdtBqlZdgrmDB2_3jVSkgAcWn6-mDImfcZS4saxrX7TBWJQ7rRM-t8shkVspqvR18ieQdwidFxlZzpNGcngRwdtIFcIF5w_g%3D%3D) Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you'll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift--before they're gone. Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of **" Winston Churchill and Statesmanship**" on DVD: _[**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=096c0f2c8529462d80e267040a764826&_e=Fvb0sdRmeK_Zpw-qzVIel7piC2RknObG32mzPWkxGk_714e_EJ9W0F7pjPMwz3xBdbqRWB0W2Sns5oiynZEeZgXUAxyBGXEiX8P7MkVmKVljoJVsQLyoqu7JxVtIE2bQxa_-ADwxx2ZnlEH1QA9Rz9aTB4t3NmezZ-BQqVC-2pvxC8TsCtAwJ5LcsQnEOfP8AfyRY9T8YCcamJW77U1C7xFpYP8wiT6CSD0RsJeHoe-VQLVgHqEfSHlzko6OSW2ZAFPVleSO6GuSVfRY8G8VdRaJMr2_uJpOcSuzZjcTTK9I4etuoIdkoYnDhBlwRarjGCxpx3Re3hPEqDc3cTZ4ulaMD6aQ0eHZhAEltcir5csioLApW4wfHOsuSxG5d57fDWbO5rE6e30DTy61pRNAAw%3D%3D)_ You'll undoubtedly enjoy this close study of Churchill's words and deeds.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Lavern=20Spicer?=
subject: A few days remain
body:
| | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=f0445fe0a7&e=fdefed58de)
---
Hello Peter,The end of 2022 is officially here. At Curley’s House, we’ve had an incredible year filled with helping our community and those who live in it.Sadly, it’s been a rough year... much rougher than most. Families have struggled more than ever to put food on the table because of the disaster state that our economy is in. **It’s worse than ever, trust me.** This is a labor of love for me but financially our food bank has been hit by the record inflation too. Buying what we buy costs much more so frankly we have less to give out. I’ve done my best to make up that gap every way I can, but if it keeps up like this we may be in trouble.
[](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=4cfb28a1c1&e=fdefed58de)
I’m never going to stop feeding this community and that’s why I’m writing to you today.Every donation that you make to Curley’s House is tax-deductible. I’m sure that as they year comes to a close you’re doing your charitable donations as we all are. I want you to consider donating to our food bank here in South Florida so we can continue the great work that we do.When you donate here, the money goes directly to buying food for the people. I’m a Christian conservative woman who supports our community, our police and our freedoms. There are so many scam charities out there and it breaks my heart to see. What we do here - we do for the community and we’ve done it for twenty years.So, please, if you want to help the great people out here to continue doing what we do - click below and donate your TAX-DEDUCTIBLE donation right now.

clean_body: | | | Hello Peter,The end of 2022 is officially here. At Curley’s House, we’ve had an incredible year filled with helping our community and those who live in it.Sadly, it’s been a rough year... much rougher than most. Families have struggled more than ever to put food on the table because of the disaster state that our economy is in. It’s worse than ever, trust me. This is a labor of love for me but financially our food bank has been hit by the record inflation too. Buying what we buy costs much more so frankly we have less to give out. I’ve done my best to make up that gap every way I can, but if it keeps up like this we may be in trouble. I’m never going to stop feeding this community and that’s why I’m writing to you today.Every donation that you make to Curley’s House is tax-deductible. I’m sure that as they year comes to a close you’re doing your charitable donations as we all are. I want you to consider donating to our food bank here in South Florida so we can continue the great work that we do.When you donate here, the money goes directly to buying food for the people. I’m a Christian conservative woman who supports our community, our police and our freedoms. There are so many scam charities out there and it breaks my heart to see. What we do here - we do for the community and we’ve done it for twenty years.So, please, if you want to help the great people out here to continue doing what we do - click below and donate your TAX-DEDUCTIBLE donation right now. | | | | | | | | With love and gratitude,Lavern SpicerFounder of Curley’s House | | | | | | | | Copyright (C) 2022 American Conservatives United. All rights reserved.

body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=1501%2E5257348%2E7VZA5C ]Adam Schiff for Congress

Hey Derek — we know some folks out there might be in a sour mood
to be receiving fundraising emails during the holidays.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2022_abs_em.lAzlNJ&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20221227_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1004&akid=1501%2E5257348%2E7VZA5C ]Bill Murray: They're like this every day of the year. I guarantee it!

Well, we’re here to change their minds. Because this email is just a
little bit different.

Feeling better?

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2022_abs_em.lAzlNJ&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20221227_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1005&akid=1501%2E5257348%2E7VZA5C ]Bill Murray: Couldn't be better.

Ready to chip in before Adam’s big FEC deadline?

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2022_abs_em.lAzlNJ&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20221227_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1006&akid=1501%2E5257348%2E7VZA5C ]Bill Murray: Let's get this over with.

You’ll feel better if you do chip in — knowing these resources go to help
Adam fight back against Kevin McCarthy, MAGA Republicans, and the new GOP
majority.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2022_abs_em.lAzlNJ&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20221227_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1007&akid=1501%2E5257348%2E7VZA5C ]Bill Murray: It's great! It's a good feeling. It's really better than I've
felt in a long time.

Because we know, deep down, even the Scrooges recognize that warm, fuzzy
feeling you get when you take part in something greater than yourself:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2022_abs_em.lAzlNJ&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20221227_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1008&akid=1501%2E5257348%2E7VZA5C ]Bill Murray: I care!

We know you do, Bill...We know you do.

So what do you say, Derek?

Don’t let Adam and our campaign get “SCROOGED” before our end-of-year FEC
deadline — chip in $5 or whatever you can spare today:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2022_abs_em.lAzlNJ&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20221227_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1009&akid=1501%2E5257348%2E7VZA5C ]DONATE

Happy holidays,

— Team Schiff

150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502

In their final ratings this year, election experts at Cook Political Report and Sabato's Crystal Ball rated Washington's 8th District as "Lean Republican." [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56487148/385130497/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGZkNTUwZi0yMTg2LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YQhkirta4_0zMJRt1H9Rdfc7dNz8WHX0nul0iYJ2xc0=&emci=f67a2bef-587d-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&emdi=a8fd550f-2186-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=15820338)

Kim's no stranger to beating the odds, Peter. Kim flipped Washington's 8th District blue _for the first time ever_ in 2018.

But this year was her toughest fight yet. In their final ratings this year, election experts at _Cook Political Report_ and _Sabato's Crystal Ball_ rated Washington's 8th District as "Lean Republican."

Thanks to the support of this incredible grassroots team, we were able to defy expectations!

It's clear that WA-08 remains a true purple district and we have an uphill battle ahead of us next cycle. We've beaten the odds before, and we can keep beating the odds – but only with your help.

name: moms for katie porter
subject: Peter, why your support is urgently needed
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MOMS IN OFFICE
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Peter,
We are getting closer to our final end-of-month deadline of 2022 and we really need your help.
Here’s the truth: We need 123 supporters from your area to step up if we want to reach our goal tonight.
Our end-of-year deadline is coming to a close in just a couple of days, and we are still 50% away from our $10,000 goal. Can you chip in what you can today and help us close out the year strong? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatie]
Inspired by our work and victories in 2022, a generous group of donors has pledged to TRIPLE match all gifts. Meeting our $10,000 goal will ensure we can continue to fight for every vote in competitive races like Katie’s in California– but we can’t do this without you.
That’s why we’re asking:
Can you rush an urgent end-of-year donation? You can triple your impact today, so there is no better time to give than right now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatie]
Your $25=$75 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatie]
Your $100=$300 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatie]
Your $500= $1500 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatie]
Your $1500=$4500 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatie]
Thank you for everything!
Simona Grace
Founder and Executive Director

Here’s the truth: We need 123 supporters from your area to step up if we want to reach our goal tonight. Our end-of-year deadline is coming to a close in just a couple of days, and we are still 50% away from our $10,000 goal. Can you chip in what you can today and help us close out the year strong? [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zstk52bmv4skso39ivrls2in6eekg2f83gninfl8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2chie8o30cdh2bs) | #### [ Which Candidates Will Take On Trump Throughout 2023? name: Ro Khanna
subject: Transforming the Democratic Party
body:
#
Peter, it’s Ro Khanna here.
**I am proud to be endorsed by Justice Democrats.** I admire their advocacy and mobilization for economic and racial justice and bold climate action.
We need fresh voices and new ideas in the halls of Congress. We need more representatives who reject the influence of corporate PAC contributions and instead listen to their constituents. We need more Justice Democrats in Congress.
Justice Democrats needs to raise $75,000 before midnight on the 31st to fully fund their 2024 Candidate Recruitment. I wouldn’t be asking for your help on their behalf if it wasn’t really important, Peter.
[**Will you rush a contribution to Justice Democrats right now to help them recruit more leaders who will fight alongside me for Medicare for All and a Green New Deal?**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123874?refcode=em20221227-26765&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=26765%2E1203867%2EsktLp5)
**[Contribute $3](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123874?refcode=em20221227-26765&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=26765%2E1203867%2EsktLp5)**
This cycle, Justice Democrats recruited and helped Summer Lee win in Pennsylvania’s 12th district. **This is a major deal.** Summer Lee overcame millions of dollars from outside right-wing super PACs and now she will join me in Congress next month.
I am proud to be the very first member of Congress endorsed by Justice Democrats. Their work is crucial to building the future of our Party.
Medicare for All, ridding corporate influence in our politics, protecting our planet for future generations, and legalizing marijuana are all issues that I am passionate about fighting for and I know Justice Democrats will recruit more progressive champions to help make these changes in Congress.
[**If you can afford it, please help Justice Democrats reach their goal of raising $75,000 before the end of this year to fully fund their 2024 Candidate Recruitment. As a grassroots funded organization, your contribution will make a difference.**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123874?refcode=em20221227-26765&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=26765%2E1203867%2EsktLp5)
Thank you for supporting Justice Democrats today and for joining me in the fight to transform the Democratic Party.
In solidarity,
Ro Khanna

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=22&akid=26765%2E1203867%2EsktLp5) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=23&akid=26765%2E1203867%2EsktLp5) and your state public health department.
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20221227-26765-footer&t=24&refcode2=26765_1203867_sktLp5&akid=26765%2E1203867%2EsktLp5)**
---
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Federal candidates or officeholders mentioned above are not asking for more than $5,000 per calendar year from individuals or other federally permissible sources, nor are they asking for any funds from corporations, labor unions, or any other federally prohibited sources.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226, Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: [us@justicedemocrats.com](mailto:us@justicedemocrats.com)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=25&akid=26765%2E1203867%2EsktLp5)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=26765%2E1203867%2EsktLp5)

name: Update
subject: Deadline Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEMOCRATS WIN SEATS PAC
body:
|
---
| | This is our last Federal Election Commission (FEC) public filing deadline before the new session of Congress begins.

With their new small House majority, the GOP will be on the attack immediately. They’ve made it clear that they intend to obstruct any attempt to get things done for the American people.

**But if we learned anything in the midterms, it’s that control of both chambers of Congress came down to just a few races and just a few votes. Every second we work and every dollar we raise can lead us to victory in 2024.**

It’s hard to believe the year is almost over — but here’s the exciting news: one week from today I will be sworn in as the new U.S. Representative from Ohio’s 1st District. = | = One dollar can make all of the difference — our campaign was built upon small‐dollar donors like you chipping in what they can, when they can. I am proud to refuse donations from corporations and special interests — I’m only interested in support from hardworking people like you. And with every dollar, our team strengthens our grassroots network across OH‐01. We’re committed to working for the people, but it takes a lot of resources to get the job done. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = Thank you, Greg Landsman Congressman-Elect, OH-01 | | Paid for by Landsman for Congress P.O. Peter, it’s Congressman-Elect Maxwell here. In less than a month, I will be making history as the first Gen-Z member of _Congress!_ And I would like to officially invite you to a virtual rally hosted by Future Generations tomorrow, Tuesday, December 28, with me and Gen-Z activists Anish Mohanty and Chitra Calderon! We will be discussing my historic race, my message of love, and plans for Congress...and I hear Future Generations has big news to drop, too! **[Will you join us on Zoom at 7:00 pm ET on Wednesday for a virtual rally with me, Future Generations, and special guests?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ys5VnOAn5GJ6PPUUX-IF5xBIcoG6OuOmY5SMgHFT3Qi1IFktYZ1trDsBMlLe8HqjDN1tGzeFZnSQK_PcNd65YlR8JqUwrE7E_n_ynVFjw03XBiEpo6XiYqplnMZnnqw5QDw9MIc0fynXEjaFYGMnLayY_7l0jg5hPn_sTaxxLjLcQOvGp1savd9yE4UqltpauAwpZ31EgXgahd7ZpMnl6i5gRnXy3-BmED92gZr_j4amUwupK1vI1LfiGo-YoEwsY_cToWtXYzFlPx9eOSwkq-n5_IuNnPrjwdeOoG7FjHROFukAj-Xl_g5VnPcFTDn542wQnPRQQ6E6nGWtz8qclnob0huuJdh6cQWGy0Pa_q3QmwY0kE1Wq1gfUQpexEOZoGZj6Vfe5Ihq5pvNRurW0pYCCJ_5YSxLZlIAz5yjb-IA/3sc/6Bz_RA-lT0qSR7JP2QmXEA/h1/-hJJ3Wnsky_bmU3hFTILM15C5VYQp2XcvNHGbDlvcw4)** Politics is grueling. As you may have seen me discuss on social media, I have been working hard as a full-time candidate which takes many tolls on a person and especially financially. You’ve elected another member of Congress with the lived experiences Congress has always been lacking. I’m excited to inspire more Gen-Z members (and others!) to get more involved because the result is _worth it._ I hope you’ll join us tomorrow.
