body:
State Democrats are counting on you to become a member today, but before you do, we’ll answer an obvious question: Why should you? | | |
---
| | We’re in the final days of our 2023 Membership Drive. Becoming a DLCC member will support our mission to elect Democrats in all 50 states – so we're counting on you to become a member today. But before you donate, we’ll answer an obvious question: _Why should you become a DLCC member?_ The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee is the official Democratic Party organization dedicated to electing Democrats to statehouses. The work we do is so important – when elected, our Democrats have the power to protect voting rights, stop GOP gerrymandering, expand early voting, and so much more. Our average online donation is just $22.58 – and it fuels our expert political team in all 50 states. So we’re asking you to chip in today. **[Will you donate $10 today to activate your 2023 DLCC membership and have it go 7X further to help state Democrats win in 2023? >>](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xP1bRbO086_ZX-9NTtP6aHgbdSEJ6yzScLSGxxZ2hbbsoOU3R_zhLeln2EZfwqZLTIFLtuL-m1q-WUGSgt1ksyvb9h4SE-lhp1Qb6buDdBFJcH3aWaKOxdyQIoLYhrpL530hgdrQohu5SIwWDJS34tUIws-vIvaGhPky72KUAf0bODZ-inbw1Hwx-DPjOFMg3RN7rF5f4P1U8uKbSxlvxu91J8bdLMpKGnrNobnIvHeq30biSLyDAE6u-ZlhsE4IeNeC_fy7XhSu-M00a7S4G90fC3FMBCa6fDbwPCz7HOZgqpSqA4nqH8H_lc4s4GQrsF6exu08baqqCEhTvZb-7M2N9GWpZKUJjGkjjPX0DHIm3hVE0SAjZik-n9mVZvI9dW-bjXB8WcZ3QCc481Jrbb_w9R-2RdHR4flo9Q1qti2qZhKH8uHf8hd26xWpzHJQPuKFtia5-IsGtdx0-PgjLO/3sc/_FtpHmbYSQaCglQ-AvUh4g/h0/A-BIgi1cQCx33-UrvhTnIIHeszsF5KnSoZaLb5fHq8w)** [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xP1bRbO086_ZX-9NTtP6aHgbdSEJ6yzScLSGxxZ2hbbsoOU3R_zhLeln2EZfwqZLTIFLtuL-m1q-WUGSgt1ksyvb9h4SE-lhp1Qb6buDdBFPRNrTkp5Rxs17X6L87wOOdrGKhKVYWNk0WfPF33PikksttP21xdFb-OjJc2-TA_TkddY3dCQzg6kU-t2QYga16CFHyhjYu9zqFyVvvOEJU0dqLCEnuaoEe-9ga9rplfxF43MJodgmX3Ywinc8AqL8AHvTiM8zY1dQlX5stq0uniBVnw36I_WG-uHU1qQ2rrr8o_HJBTHKF2CClU0hPMO2qkWPuEdTBN93e35zM3b4YwhcdejcxGsZpVzFzblr-c7s6oiVfKMAZp1EdBQYaUKaIfObRwWqkPyrKl5Qel6wQFQgiHo2NLxiDp-zDqfg2gBVjDgZ3brwuiPtQdf8o8KOs/3sc/_FtpHmbYSQaCglQ-AvUh4g/h1/hidksWFpxAbvtNiduZXxS1AYmCgfCF2GqGN4tj7PLGM) **By giving today, you’re helping state Democrats prepare for tomorrow.** There’s nothing more impactful than early money when it comes to electing more Democrats. We’ll need all hands on deck if we want to win these upcoming competitive elections. clean_body: State Democrats are counting on you to become a member today, but before you do, we’ll answer an obvious question: Why should you? | | | | | We’re in the final days of our 2023 Membership Drive. Becoming a DLCC member will support our mission to elect Democrats in all 50 states – so we're counting on you to become a member today. But before you donate, we’ll answer an obvious question: Why should you become a DLCC member? The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee is the official Democratic Party organization dedicated to electing Democrats to statehouses. The work we do is so important – when elected, our Democrats have the power to protect voting rights, stop GOP gerrymandering, expand early voting, and so much more. Our average online donation is just $22.58 – and it fuels our expert political team in all 50 states. So we’re asking you to chip in today. By giving today, you’re helping state Democrats prepare for tomorrow. There’s nothing more impactful than early money when it comes to electing more Democrats. Your early investment gives us the power to uplift, empower, and support races well in advance of Election Day, meaning candidates will have more time to reach out to voters and meet their goals. We’ll need all hands on deck if we want to win these upcoming competitive elections. Can you join our movement today? | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Thank you, DLCC Team | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Team Slotkin
subject: Let's recap 2022
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresssecure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq42022?refcode=email12272022 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq42022?refcode=email12272022]
Team,
As the year comes to a close, we wanted to look back on how your support helped us succeed in 2022 by the numbers.
This year we raised and spent $11.3 million, which supported a staff of 19 people (plus dozens of paid interns and over 200 paid canvassers on MSU's campus). And with the help of nearly 2,000 volunteers, our efforts translated to more than 85,000 doors knocked, 670,000 phone calls made and more than 1 million text messages sent!
We also distributed over 3,000 yard signs and 30 jumbo yard signs across the district.
Our historic war chest allowed us to get up on TV in July – months earlier than the competition – and stay up through Election Day with a total of 10 TV ads.
Being on TV that early checked a few boxes for us: first, Elissa had extra time to become a familiar face to the new areas of the district that hadn’t voted for her before. Second, she was able to clearly communicate her record before the attack ads started and they started to distort her bio. By the time our competition got up on the air, our ads were drowning them out.
Elissa was also on TV for two memorable debates and gained national attention when U.S. Rep. Liz Cheney (R-WY) endorsed Elissa, the first time that Congresswoman Cheney formally endorsed a Democrat.
They may have real policy disagreements, but both Elissa and Rep. Cheney know that our country needs two healthy parties to function – and some things, like patriotism, rise above partisan lines. Voters agreed: Our event with Rep. Cheney attracted 600 attendees. (The biggest event we hosted all year!)
Whether your support came through donations, working a volunteer shift or showing off an Elissa Slotkin for Congress sign on your property: THANK YOU! We’re excited for 2023.
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq42022?refcode=email12272022]
Team Slotkin

# [#]
About Elissa
Elissa Slotkin proudly represents Michigan’s 8th district in Congress. In 2022, she was elected to represent Michigan’s newly-drawn 7th district, which covers two-thirds of her existing district. Keep up with Elissa and the latest from the campaign trail on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/elissaslotkin] and Twitter. [https://twitter.com/ElissaSlotkin]

Hi, we wanted to bump Jennifer's message from a couple weeks ago.

The 2024 cycle is already gearing up, and we need to prepare for another competitive race. Republicans just held Jennifer to her narrowest margin yet, and they will be eager to pour more resources into VA-10 when the new year begins.

That's why we need to meet our end-of-year goal of $15,000. Hitting this benchmark will allow us to make early investments in staffing and digital ads that will prove critical in a close race.

[**So will you donate $10 before our December 31 deadline?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56492023/385145978/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_221227EOY_N_TW_FULL_13_NG_N_L1&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjM4YjQzNC0zYTg2LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QF8ibmT1CwstPlagIy4r7tgf9jWG4zR80HUrRr3LsYg=)

Thank you,

Team Wexton

_**— Begin Forwarded Message —**_
> A blowout. A shellacking. A red tsunami.
>
> A lot of pundits seemed pretty sure about how this year's midterm elections were supposed to go for Democrats and declared things to be a disaster well before polls closed — **but through our hard work, we proved them wrong.**
>
> Democrats _expanded_ their majority in the Senate. We gained governorships. We flipped four state legislative chambers from red to blue. We kept our House losses to a minimum, protecting many of our most vulnerable incumbents and leaving us in a strong position to retake the chamber in 2024.
>

> Democrats massively outperformed expectations and historical trends because we had a real record of results to run on. We passed historic economic relief that helped millions who had struggled during the heights of the pandemic. We expanded infrastructure. We passed the first climate bill in a generation. And we made it easier for folks to afford life-saving prescription drugs.
>
> While it's disappointing that we won't have a House majority for the next two years to further build upon these successes, it's clear that the American people valued our policy agenda over the extremism of the GOP. **Republicans who aligned themselves with election deniers lost across the board, and voters consistently lifted up proud pro-choice Democrats in the first midterm since _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned.**
>
> So I'm ready to keep fighting for our values. I'll continue to champion the policies that strengthen the middle class, protect our environment, create jobs, and expand opportunity. I'll be a voice for women, LGBTQ+ folks, and anyone whose rights are threatened by today's far right. And I'll _always_ defend the tenets of our democracy that allow for free and fair elections.
>
> I know that my principles will make me a GOP target yet again. And we saw this past cycle just how fast a district like VA-10 can shift from appearing safe, to looking like a tossup. So I’m already starting to lay the groundwork for a robust campaign operation.
>
> [**That's why I'm asking for your support today so we can hit the ground running next year. Please, will you donate to fund our initial 2023 outreach to voters?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56492045/385146007/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_221227EOY_N_TW_FULL_13_NG_N_L3&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjM4YjQzNC0zYTg2LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QF8ibmT1CwstPlagIy4r7tgf9jWG4zR80HUrRr3LsYg=)

> Thank you so much,
>
> Jennifer

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: our campaign debt will be public
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
Our (victorious!) campaign has some debt to pay off, and the amount we owe will be publicly reported at the end of the year.
| | |
---
_Hi – our (victorious!) campaign has some debt to pay off, and the amount we owe will be publicly reported at the end of the year. If you could give $3 right now to help us pay it down so that I can continue focusing my energy on serving in the Senate, I’d be very grateful. Here’s the link:[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_email_mw](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56492115/385146172/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2173-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDM4YjQzNC0zYTg2LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=27YY4TpVcWXaHaGC5ePN4M_Is0iYhRFwiKmUH9e0Fzw=)_
|
---
Look – GOP spending against us SKYROCKETED in the last few weeks of the campaign. Polls tightened to within a point or two, and pundits doubted whether we could win.

My team put our heads down and focused on making the final advertising investments necessary to win. We were making decisions with the information we had, hoping with all our might that the funding we needed would come through.

Unfortunately, all of our funding didn’t come through, and now my campaign has a hole to fill to get our last bills paid. That debt will be publicly reported after the end of the year. Since you’re one of my most important supporters, I’m hoping that I can count on you to help shrink the number.

**[Will you please give $3 or as much as you can to help us retire our debt? I’d be grateful for anything you can give.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56492116/385146173/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2173-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDM4YjQzNC0zYTg2LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=27YY4TpVcWXaHaGC5ePN4M_Is0iYhRFwiKmUH9e0Fzw=)**

I’m proud of you and our campaign team and the work we did together. Now, we just have to finish this thing off once and for all.

If you’re able to help, you can donate here: [**https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_email_mw**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56492117/385146180/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2173-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDM4YjQzNC0zYTg2LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=27YY4TpVcWXaHaGC5ePN4M_Is0iYhRFwiKmUH9e0Fzw=)

Thank you for your help.

With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

name: Team AOC
subject: 2022’s biggest electoral victories came because of you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20221227.YpKFl2&refcode=em20221227-3738-P_FND_EGR_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3738%2E2526796%2E05mQNL)
As we get ready to close the books on 2022, we wanted to look back and reflect on our incredible work together this election season. So today, we’re starting with our work to support and elect progressive candidates up and down the ballot through our Courage to Change campaign.
This cycle, for the first time, [**Courage to Change was proud to support 60 candidates**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10440?t=2&akid=3738%2E2526796%2E05mQNL) who received the Courage to Change Policy Pledge Distinction – from local school boards, to City Council, all the way up to Congress – for their commitment to progressive policies and values. Some of these races may seem insignificant or “boring,” but the truth is that these races often carry enormous power and impact.
In part thanks to our movement’s efforts, 35 of our Courage to Change candidates were elected to office!
**Here are some notable Courage to Change wins:**
* **Pamela Price** is set to become the first Black District Attorney in Alameda County, California.
* **Maxwell Alejandro Frost** of Florida is now the first of Gen Z to be elected to Congress, at just 25 years old.
* **Ruwa Romman** is the first Muslim woman to be elected to the Georgia State House.
* **Triston Ezidore** became the youngest elected public official in the history of Los Angeles County.

And those are just a handful of the electoral victories we claimed in 2022.
**Now we’re gearing up for 2023. Even in an “off-year”, there will be elections. So we need to continue to build the progressive infrastructure to elect change-makers and people’s champions to office across the country.**
[With your $3 contribution today, we’ll be able to keep our pedal on the gas going into a new year of new races. Can we count on your first $3 split contribution to Courage to Change and our campaign today?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20221227.YpKFl2&refcode=em20221227-3738-P_FND_EGR_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3738%2E2526796%2E05mQNL)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20221227.YpKFl2&refcode=em20221227-3738-P_FND_EGR_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=3738%2E2526796%2E05mQNL)**
Together, we will continue to build the infrastructure to elect grassroots, progressive leaders and change the way politics are funded.
Thank you for being a part of our movement,
Team AOC
*PAC stands for Political Action Committee. PACs have been around since 1944 and exist for the purpose of raising and spending money to elect and defeat candidates. Too often, PACs are used by corporations and dark money groups to buy off politicians. Unlike super PACs that can take unlimited money from billionaires, Courage to Change is a leadership PAC that runs via small-dollar donations.

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20221227?refcode=em20221227-3738-P_FND_EGR_MIS&t=23&refcode2=3738_2526796_05mQNL&akid=3738%2E2526796%2E05mQNL)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20221227-3738-P_FND_EGR_MIS&t=24&akid=3738%2E2526796%2E05mQNL)**

So today, we’re starting with our work to support and elect progressive candidates up and down the ballot through our Courage to Change campaign. This cycle, for the first time, who received the Courage to Change Policy Pledge Distinction – from local school boards, to City Council, all the way up to Congress – for their commitment to progressive policies and values. Some of these races may seem insignificant or “boring,” but the truth is that these races often carry enormous power and impact. In part thanks to our movement’s efforts, 35 of our Courage to Change candidates were elected to office! clean_body: How I'm going to make it happen | | | | | | | | | | Friend, I’m officially challenging Kevin McCarthy as Speaker in the new Republican Congress. If you agree a CONSERVATIVE should lead us in Washington... not another RINO Establishment hack like McCarthy... My efforts to win over Congress are FAR more powerful if they know that VOTERS want a conservative in charge. | | | | Kevin McCarthy does NOT have the values, the backbone, or the courage to stand up to Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer. Like most Establishment Republicans, he sees conservative voters like you and me as the real enemy...and he’ll stab us in the back every chance he gets. For 2 years, I served as Chairman of the House Freedom Caucus... the most powerful and successful congressional bloc of conservatives ever. I figured out exactly how the Establishment operates and exactly how to defeat them at their own game. I’ll make you this promise right now, Friend: I will NEVER betray conservative voters, surrender my principles, or stop fighting for what matters most. We won the House in November because the American people voted to STOP Biden’s radicalism and BREAK the Establishment’s stranglehold on this nation. McCarthy won’t fight for us...so we’ve got to do it ourselves. But we only have a couple weeks before Congress picks our new Speaker. | | | | | | | | | Yours in Freedom, Andy Biggs Republican Congressman, AZ-5 | | | | Paid for by Biggs for Congress
